name: Georgia Voter Action Project
subject: Must take away this opportunity to subvert elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We know this all just amounts to another way that opponents of voting rights can try and ignore voters and subvert the will of the people. We have to get this loophole in Georgia eliminated before the vote suppressors use it in other states.
RUSH $25 or more today to fight back against any loophole that reduces our voice in our elections and harms our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=091125_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Bolts: After a Judge’s Death, Renewed Scrutiny for a Georgia Loophole That Can Nullify Elections [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=091125_2&amount=25]
A quick story, Team: After losing an election race last year, a Georgia State Court Judge turned to a loophole in state law that could have erased the result and blocked the winner from taking office.
We're not making this up. In Georgia, if judges announce they’ll quit at some point before the end of their term, they hand the governor the ability to choose their replacement for the next two years. Even if an election was about to be held for their seat, that race gets canceled and kicked years down the road. Even if an election for their seat has already happened , a judge could still resign after they’ve lost, giving the governor the power to make an appointment that would nullify the result.
Looking to trigger this rule after losing his nonpartisan runoff, conservative Georgia State Court Judge Stephen Yekel told Governor Brian Kemp in a Dec. 6 letter that he intended to resign effective Dec. 30, just one day before his term was set to end. Kemp rejected his resignation letter, thankfully, but that doesn't mean a more cynical governor would do the same in the future.
Opponents of voting rights will take ANY opportunity to silence the will of the people and hold onto their power. We need to fight to close this loophole in Georgia and similar loopholes around the country.
Voter suppression comes in all forms, Team, both in Georgia and nationally. Step up and defend our right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=091125_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=091125_2&amount=35]
While Kemp didn’t give in this time , he has used the loophole to postpone or cancel other judicial elections, though state observers say he has never done so to block a winner after an election has already taken place, only before elections.
But that doesn't mean it won't happen in the future, either with him or another governor. In fact, Kemp had a direct hand in the controversial 2020 maneuver that effectively created the loophole in its current form and gave him the authority to cancel judicial elections.
“ You’re creating an opportunity to bypass an election, ” Sara Tindall Ghazal, a member of the Georgia Board of Elections, said. “ If the judge or the governor doesn’t like the outcome of the election, there’s this opportunity to encourage the incumbent to resign and then fill the seat. ”
Georgia needs stricter legal guidelines now. Our fundamental right to vote needs defending across the country. Our democracy is too important to let these petty dictators, MAGA sycophants, and conspiracy theorists stay in control.
We have to start working now to defend our democracy in next year's elections. Chip in $25 or more right now to join the fight for our rights before it's too late >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=091125_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091125_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091125_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=3CldvlinOAQEXxaJSFF0iEvQO99SfJAs%2FAkkeLbQOOp2UtVO709WcYt6u2twR%2B6qg5Fm0oYaQzph8R6r3npuXfFGDPw91A%2BJhWwCXLprgEY64uTqoSItYspm18ONWa7Oz%2F9AGpPvm%2FWNQl8Ah9q2ZIv1RrXRbgv3byQ5GdvQy0ETtB8sMpVd%2BUMznK07beUCW0kkJ6SQtWKjXUN8Z4Rb1Fhfr3KBnEU%2BFa5tIWsSB99tqNYeSSUZHSxvzgrYUp%2BWeA8mnCurxMg1aHLs%2F99%2FqHkpRF%2FwhM1qsPc18FiaRtpPrC9j8KZwJt7cpJNo82VpwhWA2tIsE9Ig7suBQ16zCrVt5gWpdjznOfMvpHTE%2BPWTzCYNDpKriJkp8%2FkW0H7oSXk4CblOfcEbZ8y2Fwaqv%2FXfvtx3jifWkReBnwxfq78%3D .

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: A tragic day for America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
The assassination of Charlie Kirk is a sad and tragic day for our country.

| | | | | [|
---](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=38fd8ebb70&e=5a45b9550e)
|
---
| | | | | | The assassination of Charlie Kirk is a sad and tragic day for America. No one did more to spread the conservative message with force and optimism to young people. In his short life of 31 years, he changed America for the better and will be terribly missed by millions.I did not know Charlie well but did have the opportunity to sit with him at a dinner a few years ago in Spokane. He had also visited WSU just last April, so he was no stranger to Eastern Washington.
---
|
---
| | It goes without saying that murder is wrong, political violence is wrong, and a public assassination of a father, leaving behind a young widow and two toddlers, is unspeakably cruel and immoral.Charlie Kirk was a fierce fighter and outspoken advocate for his values, rejecting all of the “woke” agenda and the attempts to rewrite American history.I admired that he was always open to debate, and to giving the microphone and a platform to those folks that disagreed with him. I hope young people at colleges and high schools throughout Eastern Washington can be inspired by his example – to speak out forcefully for the things you believe in, to be open to debate and to listening to opposing points of view. And with the Grace of God, reject the violence that has darkened our lives and left so many living in fear.For my part, I intend to renew my efforts to have townhalls and forums where different voices can be heard, and to listen openly to all the people in Eastern Washington. We honor Charlie Kirk by staying true to our conservative values and speaking out fearlessly to ensure that although Charlie is gone, his values will continue to have a voice in our America which we love so dearly.May Charlie Kirk rest in peace, may his family find comfort in the Lord, and may his memory be a blessing.
-Michael 🇺🇸
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---
| | | | | | | | | You can [update your preferences](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&e=5a45b9550e&c=18c49d0158) or [unsubscribe](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&t=b&e=5a45b9550e&c=18c49d0158)
---
|
---
| |

**$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – a gift of $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. $7 donations are exactly what we need to win and loosen the GOP’s grip on state legislatures.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21192%2E878179%2Exlbi8M). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21192%2E878179%2Exlbi8M).**

The horrific attack that happened on 911 was the worst terrorist act on our country and should never be repeated again. Unfortunately terrorist networks have expanded since then including, Hamas, Hezbollah, Houthis, Al Qaeda, and many others. None of the can ever acquire nuclear or biological weapons. We must cut off the funding by sanctioning governments that support them.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeq6g2hc78pdn9pig5si93c0nfpafeq3u10acelo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdjm8oj0cjh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoaftupqte8ag3rgtfae3fr5u8bmolceg630dr4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdjm8oj0cjh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z72bkds0gpld1h0fkf35ddmh51o06p3bhfg9ecpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdjm8oj0cjh2bs)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z86r32dd8v42sttcnpeq7o8h07b9pn0gmjhs8d30_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdjm8oj0cjh2bs)

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Learn the truth about our Founding Fathers
body:
As we approach the landmark 250th birthday of our great nation in 2026, my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation are proud to offer a new eBook:

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpbhb9d88nrrot7hm2r601jfmh70f1a9n70qrai0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdjm8oj2c1h2bs)
---
| |

Dear Fellow American,

As we approach the landmark 250th birthday of our great nation in 2026, my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation are proud to offer a new eBook:

American Founders: Leaders at the Creation of the Republic
---
|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9totjvp70mu8inat8v2uus5clcjvdsoktaa6gto_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdjm8oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | This comprehensive 300+ page guide brings to life 16 of the nation's most influential Founders--not as mythical figures, but as real statesmen confronting the immense political challenges of their time. From George Washington to Thomas Jefferson, you'll explore their pivotal decisions that laid the foundation for American liberty and self-government.

I invite you to claim your FREE copy of this insightful eBook by following the secure link below:

[**https://secured.heritage.org/american-founders-ebook/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjccum59athu918h9oir3ius41scclfc50och2ng_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdjm8oj2c1h2bs)

May this guide deepen your appreciation for the patriots whose vision and sacrifice gave us the inheritance of freedom we enjoy today.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Get your free digital copy of The Heritage Foundation 's new book, _American Founders: Leaders at the Creation of the Republic_ at this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/american-founders-ebook/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze3jese753l2e59klk8b1jlnu57bh64pfvk2mi5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdjm8oj2c1h2bs)**

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Team Evergreen
subject: [Last chance] Tell EPA to do its job to stop pollution
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Deadline: September 22
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3972179/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| 17,717.

That’s how many Evergreen advocates have called on the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to drop its proposal to rescind the endangerment finding.

We’re blown away by this number, **but your voice is still missing, friend.**

Without this bedrock climate regulation that gives EPA the authority to limit climate pollution, Big Oil and Gas and other corporate polluters will have a free pass from the federal government to poison our communities, stoke climate-fueled disasters, and raise our energy bills.

**It’s reckless, unjustified, and outright immoral to weaken climate pollution protections at a moment like this—all so that Trump’s wealthy, fossil fuel donors can continue profiting off of destruction.**

We must do everything we can to stop this baseless proposal.

[**Add your name to our public comment calling on EPA to do its job to protect people and the environment.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3972180/87SdQ4wZ) |
[](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3972181/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Put simply, EPA’s proposal is an effort to make climate denial the official policy of the federal government, **opening the door to dirtier air and deadlier disasters while Trump’s polluter pals cash in.**

We know that no amount of denial is going to stop the extreme weather events that will only increase in severity the longer we delay our transition away from dirty fossil fuels. [**Will you join us in calling out EPA for abdicating their responsibility and demand they drop their dangerous proposal? The deadline is September 22, and every signature counts.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3972182/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3972183/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for getting involved.— The team at Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

name: The Flyover
subject: Kirk Assassin Manhunt, Space Jets, and an Orca Near-Crash
body:
The FBI released [photos of a college-age person of interest](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb7bgGkw8MHTxlq4dLQrXgYQfC0isvH3lqm_Q-ZPOp3O-rutV--DT7VNHVG3La8KjBmwNy_rw5aFr1bX6FHVyz9Tqrg3eV6Agejr3DFarfXivvLNqQwQcO1RMCjlJNnHROcXldIGL4GiZFMZQzmaNRiKTZhs1NZ1XJ43ODBilEvgwWynELAxME-NWM8IpWt9yGe7Zp-ZwC-_8wjKYHLugXGt7JeMHgYXAchzHYNK3OUcCy4kmsNCZwMIYgcU4XYLH_nTrq8u5Yen_5PpWnnEfXIuhK8ruhw_B10kSTm9R-_B72P5V6aXgJwAA__8o2nrF) and offered a $100,000 reward for information leading to the arrest of those responsible for the assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGupCAQBuDT4E4jBUKzYDFJx92b7SwNkbKt9wANYJu-_cRJJ32AWdXiS_6q-v98TV-OAqXHbxfR1mWbEp4lYK2Ypx_KP64UVwql6NJ6pFp2N-P3BD0MbW9aDpN3FF6TbLxdEAFFg5brQSvNlRya1RojtBQL3sxNL1ppiTeuQXGnDAcE1ZC90nrDgfe9BtkZr4fBDDMoxaV3nMkePdUtd98bpbriEl7bE3M3b7EJdq11L0z8YjAyGM_z7LKjQuliBiOm9ijXdOXV1q1FlxMT41HjFNHTEZm4f35moC4p25FnZOL-2faW2cXd0SMxcS-4Vxha8ZaK-cpa0LfzUZts_X5SCFSUZrJ_REfh38X1v2p-WvgbAAD__3uzkmc) | |
# Friday, September 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1958, Jack Kilby, a newcomer at Texas Instruments, [built the first integrated circuit](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGOwiAUANDT0J0N_FKQBQuTSTMb3bpsvvBrUVoMUE1vP5m5wlzgLd71PJ4xxLDeL7iQrVMaV_qUSLVSHp8hP7EULCWsC67zttbyQkePETj0B24OAkaPIe6jbLydiIC6hqzQvVZaKNk3s4UJtVDaTHjkaJx0khxwBUeS3CDemmB_NW4ECM41yNZ43femd6CUkB4Fk5x8qCm3jxTWOtMU9_Sm3Lq0NNHOtb4K604MBgbDnra6tTdiMFz96fvinO66O-uGibBumVj3VWbM5Jts_esTYgxFaSb5fcEQ_8j6r4e3hZ8AAAD___gFcMw), revolutionizing electronics. He received the Nobel Prize in Physics in 2000 for this invention. Today, we bring you [images from NASA’s James Webb Telescope](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuu2zAQRVcjdWOQ1L9gkcbdS5tSGItjiXr8CJzxE7T7wF5AmtTn4uLg_Pmav9AHn9bfGMnKM8-JTg4kQmX-9uUbmZHZp4hpeyXhAxfaZ6NMB2oCbWaHPlxzWzv7JDLU1GT10A39oPu2qzfr0DS97ptBT5MbFS30VGP3WPS4jIQN1t6-39SkjVZqMO1tckPXTd1i-l63DnXVKnJecrnt2SfZ6Bmu_EPltuRYB7uJHFw1vypzr8z9PM_bR_JNK3NHlpJTjldl7jtGYjjp8YDPBIQC8ZIP-icEH3ElBkq5xPxiYMECvOUsPq2QXwJy-gQ7CcMIwa-bwEVYGEJOa12sO04fgud-qFq1RvTh4y7_FfzHmr8BAAD__z_LmdM), which just captured a colossal baby star firing off twin jets stretching eight light-years—an awe-inspiring peek into how massive stars are born. Tired of big banks shortchanging your savings? Today's sponsor, [Raisin,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGupCAQBuDT4E4jBUKzYDFJx92b7SwNkbKt9wANYJu-_cRJJ32AWdXiS_6q-v98TV-OAqXHbxfR1mWbEp4lYK2Ypx_KP64UVwql6NJ6pFp2N-P3BD0MbW9aDpN3FF6TbLxdEAFFg5brQSvNlRya1RojtBQL3sxNL1ppiTeuQXGnDAcE1ZC90nrDgfe9BtkZr4fBDDMoxaV3nMkePdUtd98bpbriEl7bE3M3b7EJdq11L0z8YjAyGM_z7LKjQuliBiOm9ijXdOXV1q1FlxMT41HjFNHTEZm4f35moC4p25FnZOL-2faW2cXd0SMxcS-4Vxha8ZaK-cpa0LfzUZts_X5SCFSUZrJ_REfh38X1v2p-WvgbAAD__3uzkmc) helps you protect and grow your nest egg with access to 75+ banks, high APYs, and up to a $1,000 bonus.
|
---
## Manhunt for Charlie Kirk's Killer Intensifies
The FBI released [photos of a college-age person of interest](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb7bgGkw8MHTxlq4dLQrXgYQfC0isvH3lqm_Q-ZPOp3O-rutV--DT7VNHVG3La8KjBmwNy_rw5aFr1bX6FHVyz9Tqrg3eV6Agejr3DFarfXivvLNqQwQcO1RMCjlJNnHROcXldIGL4GiZFMZQzmaNRiKTZhs1NZ1XJ43ODBilEvgwWynELAxME-NWM8IpWt9yGe7Zp-ZwC-_8wjKYHLugXGt7JeMHgYXAchzHYNK3OUcCy4kmsNCZwMIYgcU4XYLH_nTrq8u5Yen_5PpWnnEfXIuhK8ruhw_B10kSTm9R-_B72P5V6aXgJwAA__8o2nrF) and offered a reward of up to $100,000 for information leading to the arrest of those responsible for the assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University. Kirk was fatally shot during a Turning Point USA event on Sept. 10, 2025, with authorities recovering [an older model Mauser .30-06 bolt-action rifle](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGS3CAURE-DMqbgC5AICJyQrVOHKlZ8Rn-XgSlgVjW3d8lXcN71uvv9-dg-AmUq99_hgW6kuhU8e8YxsG3f1L5D76F3Ko9QjlcZ_Rl2_NpAgObCcglbDJTfm5qiS4iA84ROLnoxizRKT4dTRq5Gm1WkuM5J2GT3NWmFM5goRLATuYsmrAQpxALqZuOitdU7GCNVDJIpgZFGbbevSmUcmPK7_mC77fUxZXeM8exs_sXAM_Dned5ePYwaw_sKMPB91PZm4K9nDPzVxsALy8BLycCnT-IN9wvZ-WfNg4d9UC28UcrIXx0jp8L7Ueugcuc18f0ILRPyyxADvxph5xmUEAsDPzUXnyflTN0sTIn7I1D-N3b8l-EfB38DAAD__yH8jWA) in a wooded area where they believe the suspect fled. Kirk’s death was announced by President Trump, who praised the influential activist as a “truly Great American Patriot.” On Thursday morning, Trump, at an observance of the 24th anniversary of the Sept. 11 terror attacks, said he would [posthumously award Kirk the Presidential Medal of Freedom.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3O4yAQxvHT4I4IxmDHBcU2dNl2S4s143gSPizAiXz7lfcKbz3ST_N__jzmh6NA6fnbRTRtzXPCbw3YGpb5TeXtanW1UooubUdqdXcLvmYQoLmYuITZOwrnrDpvVkTAvkMjRz0OoxyU7jZzdzA4WLxQKPSqp1FM2Ku_d9f7XiolOzKXJiYJUogR1G3yo9aTXmAYpPJOMiXQU8vl9sqU2oZrOPMHy23JsQtma22vrP_FwDKw6dxzbdeJgb1gBlZMDKyUDOxR-dXHwC6bK4GQX428ZV5wQfog3wtW8pgaucAjehd4XvlaEH2O_LK3I-ajhpO3csSdge2K8fuXQqA6jEyJZ3QU_j_XfrTox8C_AAAA__9nQIq5) [Vice President JD Vance’s ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAUBOCnsTssfMxPXFBs4y7bbmmdheOYBEMEJGz26a98X-HWI83omz_X9Yo--Hj7jQeZuqU1UiuBaqW8Pnx-YClYio8Hxv0Va3mipfsKHCTjMxthdejDZxW9MxsR0NSTGbXUSo9KyH43kqMSYFEqB5pfLIIVfycnYJo41xfVe3O28XmEkXMNYpidlnKWFpQahcOxE5ycrykP9-Rj3WkLn_SmPNh09MHstT5LN_3qYOlgaa0NW_p3Ks68g6VmfFPoYLE75uCJnazCLJYHVbaF1CJDn9mWsiVWW2JbTgd7VdwZZv8_Reyzcc_mQ_BF6U7w24E-fM_XH332NvAVAAD__zTugi0)plane, Air Force Two, was set to transport Kirk’s casket from Utah to Arizona on Thursday, where his family lives and Turning Point USA is headquartered. Vance and second lady Usha Vance were scheduled to meet with Kirk’s family and close friends in Salt Lake City before the trip.
## Paramount Skydance Eyes Warner Bros. Buyout
Paramount Skydance is preparing an [all-cash bid for Warner Bros. Discovery](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupCAUxvGnwU4DiDIUFNvYzbZbmiPnzMgMggFmjG-_8b7Crf_J70u-f_f5Dj74-PwLG9n6SHOkowSqlfL89vkNpUApPm4Q10-sZQdHr1lyObTctELOCD6cs2rQPogk9Q1ZoQc9ajGqoVmtg34cbz0qRze1oNDaOMTeDAa5gl433l4aN0IKzrVUnUE9DGZwchyFQhBMcUJfU-5eyce60iOc6Uu5c2lrgl1r3Qvr_zA5MTkdx9G5uLgrMjldNJMTN0xOQlwdcqTcLjmVFn1xF3S2O2TY0ifWtrxPhOioXTx2a91Cky3uhw_Bl1EzxZ8b-PAzXX_119fK_wEAAP__Q-R-tA), aiming to acquire the entire company before its planned corporate split, according to reports. ## Poll: Cost of Living Tops U.S. Concerns
Nearly half of Americans now identify [the cost of living as their biggest](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAQQL_GdCB7sOEoXFxDl2uvRAMeYBJjIns2KH-_yv7C9k_vSe__bbohR07bPzzIy3pOia4SSYTy9OD8wFKwFE4Hpv0rSXniQvcJNLhaD7WBKSDH92Sr4FcioLYib3rXd73prKt2TxrdTKhbsH3brgg0uD_dMAdrWrA0V-w_Nj0YMFr3YJsh9M4NboGuMzagUVZTYDlzcz85yU5rfJ8vys1yHlX0u8izqPavglHBeF1XUwSFi-AHUDAuO2ZRMLZOO6tgnHnbqEi97BgjpY1KveJCoZ7fNR6UecFUFIxV9uF5cYxcul5ZvR3I8Scqvzr18vAdAAD__7hVfOg) personal challenge in 2025, according to a new Statista Consumer Insights survey of over 4,000 U.S. adults. Physical and mental health concerns ranked significantly lower at 26%, marking a notable shift from pre-pandemic trends when health and political issues dominated public sentiment rather than personal economics. The survey reflects broader economic realities after years of inflation and higher interest rates, creating what analysts called a "silent squeeze" on middle-income earners. clean_body: The FBI released and offered a $100,000 reward for information leading to the arrest of those responsible for the assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University. | | | | | | Friday, September 12, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1958, Jack Kilby, a newcomer at Texas Instruments, , revolutionizing electronics. He received the Nobel Prize in Physics in 2000 for this invention. Today, we bring you , which just captured a colossal baby star firing off twin jets stretching eight light-years—an awe-inspiring peek into how massive stars are born. Tired of big banks shortchanging your savings? Today's sponsor, helps you protect and grow your nest egg with access to 75+ banks, high APYs, and up to a $1,000 bonus. | Manhunt for Charlie Kirk's Killer Intensifies The FBI released and offered a reward of up to $100,000 for information leading to the arrest of those responsible for the assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University. Kirk was fatally shot during a Turning Point USA event on Sept. 10, 2025, with authorities recovering in a wooded area where they believe the suspect fled. Kirk’s death was announced by President Trump, who praised the influential activist as a “truly Great American Patriot.” On Thursday morning, Trump, at an observance of the 24th anniversary of the Sept. 11 terror attacks, said he would , Air Force Two, was set to transport Kirk’s casket from Utah to Arizona on Thursday, where his family lives and Turning Point USA is headquartered. Vance and second lady Usha Vance were scheduled to meet with Kirk’s family and close friends in Salt Lake City before the trip. Paramount Skydance Eyes Warner Bros. Buyout Paramount Skydance is preparing an , aiming to acquire the entire company before its planned corporate split, according to reports. The potential deal would combine under one umbrella, plus a treasure trove of sports rights and blockbuster franchises. Warner Bros.’s nearly $33 billion market capitalization is more than double that of Paramount Skydance. Warner shares surged 29% on the news, with Paramount Skydance up 6%. The bid is backed by Larry Ellison, who this week became the world’s richest man, while his son David Ellison is set to lead the combined media giant. Poll: Cost of Living Tops U.S. Concerns Nearly half of Americans now identify personal challenge in 2025, according to a new Statista Consumer Insights survey of over 4,000 U.S. adults. Physical and mental health concerns ranked significantly lower at 26%, marking a notable shift from pre-pandemic trends when health and political issues dominated public sentiment rather than personal economics. The survey reflects broader economic realities after years of inflation and higher interest rates, creating what analysts called a "silent squeeze" on middle-income earners. . | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. That's why we set an emergency fundraising goal of $15,000 to help Democrats support a bill to save our Social Security before Trump DESTROYS it. | | | | | | | – Blue Amp Action | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Lombardo for Nevada
subject: YOU'RE INVITED: Join Governor Lombardo for a Special Announcement
body:
You don't want to miss this.
| | | | |

| YOU'RE INVITED: Join Governor Lombardo for a Special Announcement
---
| Dear Nevada Supporters,
We're excited to invite you to a Special Announcement with Governor Lombardo in both Las Vegas and Reno, and we need you to be part of these historic events!
Governor Lombardo has always answered the call to serve Nevada - first as Sheriff, now as our Governor - and always as a leader we can trust. As we begin this new chapter, we need you standing with us.
These events are the first step in building the movement to keep Nevada strong, safe, and prosperous, and your voice and support are critical.
Please RSVP below to ensure your spot and gain entry to the event!

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Red Bull Flugtag, Egg Sandwiches, and Friendliest Places
body:
More than 30,000 spectators are expected to visit Lake Carolyn in Irving's Las Colinas district tomorrow for Red Bull Flugtag, an annual competition featuring homemade, human-powered flying machines. The Metroplex last hosted the event in 2013.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1866, Lyne T. The discovery marked the first oil-producing well in Texas. A unique spectacle is taking over Irving's Levy Event Plaza this weekend. **From the Founder’s Desk:
Why I Want _The Flyover_ Readers to Own _The Flyover_**

When I decided to accept investors in _The Flyover_ , one thing mattered to me more than anything: that our readers would have the chance to become our owners. If I had my druthers, [every single investor](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD0PmzAQhn-N2YL8ATgMHiqlbGmWSO1mGfuAq4wdwRGSf1_RplL3ru9z9-ju_X61V4cR0_jNzWDoNWSbYF8jEMFiFwj9FuMQt5HcCOO4uhR29JOVXNYn3p6EtMFhfNuqCKbnoRUFGKFr3ejq3LbFZKTnTc29dkI6Ib0OvRYB1CBaX1VSDQWaQ8ZbIYXgQuoyiN7DWUHtPK9Er1nFISDlpaQJCF5uHeI7P2EpfZ6LaCaix8rUFyY7JjtMT1ip_Jkx0QT_TB5YdRvNds3b4oGpy9eAhDkx2RzxDAG3manLbU8QTlcI6D7Iu_nhcExMXbo_xr8gJ4JEx9K9-2QEy2G5_-huthVS1sViwmPHGHFtjm_G2WH8fTz9X-VPI38FAAD__3vJl14) in _The Flyover_ would be a _Flyover_ reader. That’s why we’ve structured this offering with you in mind:
* **5% bonus shares** for all _Flyover_ readers who invest
* **An** **additional 5% bonus** for those investing in our current round from $1M to $2M

Legally, the offering is open to any U.S. citizen. But my heart—and our strategy—are focused on keeping ownership in the hands of our readers. Right now, we’re less than $130,000 away from hitting $2 million raised. Once we cross that mark, the extra 5% bonus goes away. That’s why I’m asking our readers one more time: will you consider [investing in _The Flyover_ today](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD0PmzAQhn-N2YL8ATgMHiqlbGmWSO1mGfuAq4wdwRGSf1_RplL3ru9z9-ju_X61V4cR0_jNzWDoNWSbYF8jEMFiFwj9FuMQt5HcCOO4uhR29JOVXNYn3p6EtMFhfNuqCKbnoRUFGKFr3ejq3LbFZKTnTc29dkI6Ib0OvRYB1CBaX1VSDQWaQ8ZbIYXgQuoyiN7DWUHtPK9Er1nFISDlpaQJCF5uHeI7P2EpfZ6LaCaix8rUFyY7JjtMT1ip_Jkx0QT_TB5YdRvNds3b4oGpy9eAhDkx2RzxDAG3manLbU8QTlcI6D7Iu_nhcExMXbo_xr8gJ4JEx9K9-2QEy2G5_-huthVS1sViwmPHGHFtjm_G2WH8fTz9X-VPI38FAAD__3vJl14)? But some of our readers are asking: **"How do I get a return on my investment?"** Here’s why _The Flyover_ is different:
* **Already profitable after just two years (most start-ups never are)**
* **80% gross margins and 24% net income (exceptional margins)**
* **In the top 1% of media start-ups (proven strength)**

How investors could realize returns:
1. **A Sale** – Only to a partner who shares our values. (CNN or the**** New York Times need not apply.)
2. **Public Listing** – Shares traded openly on an exchange.
3. **Profit Distributions** (Dividends) – Because we’re already profitable, this is possible.

**Recap: Sale. Listing. Distributions.
** My Closing Pitch
More than 1,225 _Flyover_ readers have already joined us as investors. We’re just $130K away from our next milestone—and once we hit it, the chance at 10% bonus shares drops to 5%. If you’ve been considering investing, now is the moment. Let’s finish this round together and make _The Flyover_ a news company truly owned by its readers. Will you be one of the investors who help us keep _The Flyover_ reader-owned?

[Invest in _The Flyover_ Today](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD0PmzAQhn-N2YL8ATgMHiqlbGmWSO1mGfuAq4wdwRGSf1_RplL3ru9z9-ju_X61V4cR0_jNzWDoNWSbYF8jEMFiFwj9FuMQt5HcCOO4uhR29JOVXNYn3p6EtMFhfNuqCKbnoRUFGKFr3ejq3LbFZKTnTc29dkI6Ib0OvRYB1CBaX1VSDQWaQ8ZbIYXgQuoyiN7DWUHtPK9Er1nFISDlpaQJCF5uHeI7P2EpfZ6LaCaix8rUFyY7JjtMT1ip_Jkx0QT_TB5YdRvNds3b4oGpy9eAhDkx2RzxDAG3manLbU8QTlcI6D7Iu_nhcExMXbo_xr8gJ4JEx9K9-2QEy2G5_-huthVS1sViwmPHGHFtjm_G2WH8fTz9X-VPI38FAAD__3vJl14)
|
---
## Public Figures Scrutinized for Kirk Remarks
Several Texans in public-facing positions are taking heat for [inflammatory remarks](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L_OozAQBPCngQ5kL38MhYtr6L5rr0Rre8FWNhjZTkje_pS8wleP9JvR_PtZfzBwOPa_eCddXltcD7oyUymU1kTOPJg3fuwFd9r3jIe7gvUrCBgaMTcSVoeB32tfO22Em2VNWqpBjaqf5rn2eiToFDocOoPT5IxyCpAmM0o7zMPm6qA_mJglSCkkqNZJY2nqaEAremlU1QtyocTUFk-FXpg3fscnpdbGe83al3LmqvtTwVLBcl1Xa32KxyetYDkjhxJsrmDBVIJlqmCxHhMHam4h3RpHWHzzhZtsfYycG5Cih7Gf29OfddLuvAJzyONnzH7HwN_u8rvHnhr-BwAA__93f4Fr) made following the assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk on Wednesday. At least one person has been fired. Goose Creek ISD teacher Jennifer Courtemanche [wrote on Facebook](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0bGu4yAQheGnsbuJgDhxXLiIVkqXbbe0Bjg2KBgiwNc3b7_ylfYJtv5GI_06f57Tk33wcfnNK8b6PacpYi8BtSJPGVZvIcxhWyovWJbC0e7euEkJdSExkFSTZR8-U9faUQs7yBaj7C_9te9uw9C6UcjBGFzNbRAako1Q_Qyr9Y2V7bpOt348nolBKimFVP3JSm1wO-PCRnRS900nYH1N-VQdKr65zOGTvpBPJq1tGF2t79Kc7416NOqx7_tpLfGwRj0QaSuNerw3HbyhwjPqhzhawoq8IBqPwx04VPcD_24Ccj1oSamATAZeZHyxVMHGIdMWLTLNPoPmlMmkdUWshVinrZJxnIMHvXx-USELrq5RD850v8tn-KXObR7te_ch-HI9IpeVffhpqv-3xNeo_gYAAP__Wuah5g), "Could this have been the consequences of his actions catching up with him?" A Pasadena ISD employee also made "inappropriate and insensitive comments.” Both districts [denounced the remarks](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupDAQBNDTmMwjuzFgBwSbkP1NN0RtuwFrGjwyns-f26_YK2xcUulV_fmavzBxOtbfuNNYf5Y8H3SdTLVSmQtF_2Ze-L1WXGldTzzilcI2g4JOKic1zBETf2bTxNGr6HRDox66oR-Mda7ZRvDa297GgdA609nYRtMtntxggm2datJ4lymnQWulYXhE7QPZljoMymg_CKMopprLo25U6QfPhT_5m8oj5L3hcav1dYr2l4BJwHRd1-O55fcdCpiw1BSYBEz3LgET54AsYHrhiZEOlOmMMmxYOJF8pvKUtL84f4hkyPtORxUwge0kkfOLNr0EMlYaRCut67xcrDJ9r5ShFpsyxteVmNPZ3-51x8T_mPX_zv0e4W8AAAD__zAsjKg) and promised to review each employee's conduct. ## Illegal Immigrant Kills Motel Worker
Yordanis Cobos-Martinez, a 37-year-old illegal immigrant from Cuba, has been [charged with capital murder](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD2OszAQPY3pQPYAAQoXX0OXr90SjT2DsTRAhJ2Q3H5FrrDte3q_P_fpjlHiFv7jyja_533a-EzCOfMxHUzuKTLLM2QMHELCjc7olwk0tKUeSgMTYZTP1BRknabBFGxN13a3rumHoVgsgnZQg2_qQaOZ6-bW8kCs-5bI99oV0V5mejBgjDbQVWSc577mFr1ujOtUo5li3o8qL5z5jWmWz_7io_L7Wohdcn4kVf9TMCoYz_OsvEvXiotXMH4lCsYLUjASimAq1z2zlCmjc3ELZcL1ySKlkxcpGIvD0uOMIjHdrgJhxSjfvPy3l14WfgMAAP__IMB9XA) for allegedly beheading a motel manager in Dallas on Wednesday. According to an affidavit, Cobos-Martinez and a coworker were cleaning rooms around 9:30 a.m. when the victim, 50-year-old Chandra Nagamallaiah, informed him that a [washing machine was broken](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAQRk9jd0SAfykotkmXbbe0xswEkMZgGRInt19lr7D1J33v6f3clhtEjsl_w0a2vu55SXQWplrpWA7C9cF854ev4Mn7AgnP6MKipR6ENELpBSHye-lbtKtEo1qyahqmcepnY9pglelp6PqZcHSDk2boNMnZTQZx6Fbq22g_Z9IorZRUerqgWh3NHQ3gZK_WqeklYaz5uNRAlV5Q7vzOTzouLm8t21DrXpruq9HXRl93yjvTZ2r0FYEZitggiZUCARKKkCuxgMM_NkpVnFBCTF5s4EJMJPbM0ZFQapazHGV7WNzPyBzL-DHxG0T-A9f_5Xpa_RsAAP__W6J_8g). Nagamallaiah [spoke to the witness](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAQhU9jOpDHEIwLF9vQZdst0dgzgKUBInBCcvsVe4Wt39P3fn7uwx2TpHX6xoV9fo_bsPJ5COfM-7AzhafIKM8p48TTdOBKZ4rzYLS5ldqVYAbCJJ-hKcgHTQ4K9mBvtrVN51wx-wjYuRbraDg2BNYFsFbXAWwHY0dNkfwF0w4MgAZjK4IQuav5hlE3EKxqNFPK217lmTO_8Rjls714r-K2FOLnnB-Hqr-U6ZXpz_Os1hBpPC9Zmf7ao0wvW0RRpl9wLY-MITCVgWdGYioXjBe6JBTBo1y2zJe3dtC62irTF7unx5lE0tFehaYFk_zl5_-99vLmNwAA__84boEH) to translate, which angered Cobos-Martinez, who stepped out of the room and returned moments later with a machete and killed him. Cobos-Martinez was previously in federal custody but was released on Jan. 13 because there were "no removal flights to Cuba,” [according to ICE](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0TGuozAQxvHTQOfIdsDGBcU2dG_bLdHYHsDaAUd4iF9uv0qaPcArRyP9pZ--P1_zFyRKx_obdhz5e8nzgbUQMuM5nxj9RbTQtTKsuK4FjlhT2GYtdS-kE0rPERK95q6No5fRqRZHZXtrbDc4126j1r32wwJ2McZ33rngh7uV9m58Z4Pt2zS-Y9IprZRU2t6i8gGHO_YQZKe8bTqJMXE-b7wh4zeUhV75iect5L2lcWN-lOb-q9FTo6da660uAO9noyc4OQXCRk9vV6MnygGo0VMEIigi5Ovg1__70xd7ZiThcUOI6VgFMEP4Kx6ZUkARcz0410OUKzEWUWC_kEj4fBE-4YyNnvRgBQ5RRutRhLhY0ZkwCGeME6aTTvXBL4ihPcf4qIkoFfOWrjsk-sD4Z3M8R_0vAAD__xGPoHc).
## Irving Hosts Red Bull Flugtag
More than 30,000 spectators are expected to visit Lake Carolyn in Irving's Las Colinas district tomorrow for [Red Bull Flugtag](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u6zAQhE8jdTTI1Q_NgsVr1Pm1KQWKu6KYrEWDoiz79oGC3CD1AN_MNx-38eYixzX8d3ey5TWncaVjYyqF8pgJp5155j0UFyiEza14RL-MIKET0ggFI7rI77Gt0U4SjarJKt3pXrdXY-rFGgVwVaglzrOcOo8t-KmD3hmpwci-jvaESaNAKalAX1BNnq4Ndc7LVk26aiVhLClfykKFXm6b-Z2elC8-3Wu2SymPrWr-VTBUMPijac6gguE0qWDg5B1XMGRCceqIXx-B8yEylT2vmyhJsPsi4V1O_F7FEcsiPncMdCLqbPFxROa49eeecHeRf-rL3057WvgOAAD__-JOgeo), an annual competition featuring homemade, human-powered flying machines. The Metroplex last hosted the event in 2013. Participants in the [event](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAQRU8DHRZMbBMXFNu4y7ZbWsCMbSRiR4BDcvuVV7nB1k968-b_3KabDTFsy7e9kymveZ82qjlSKZSmROiOGOd4LMUutCzZbliDXyeQ0Ak5CAUT2hDfU8vROImD4mSU7nSv2-sw8NX0znqv3SxRdX4mC7112GvX9l07KOV4MKdMDgqUkgp0g8p5ul6os162ymnWSsJQ9tSUlQq9bJ7je39Savx-59GspTwyu3wxGBmMtdbm031yBuORBW0MRnrSVjKDMRGKk4vPYwLnKo5sxRnCYOTJ4KOGGEPuz-vL3YY_GS__m-hp4DcAAP__2xF7jA), whose name originated from the German term for "flight day," will launch their aircraft from a 22-foot-high ramp. The winner will be determined by three criteria: flight distance, creativity, and showmanship. More than 30 five-person teams are [expected to compete](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2zAQhJ9G6tYg15J1KlS4UXWXIs2VwopciUz4Y5CUab99oCBvkGKqAWbmm--v5Yuss2H_QZ6n8triErhmx6VwWhLr9XBuc8deaOd9zxR0tcosKLAHMYLERZN176Vr9bQKPcqWJzn0w23oPsaxNVO30bXrBI6rQFLY0YBy5RFlv_VS6FtrpzNMjBKlFBKHi5ar4o8r96REJ9eh6QRrW2K6FMOFX5Q3945PThcVfesmU8ojN9d7g3ODc6314nM4vQZnDnDkBufCyoTo4v5ucKanpWJjaHA20bMnzUBBgzk8BXjEyok1nDrp4R8-2Awrqd9gA2jYKtBWOIGPiaEYCkCgWZHmsyHB_S4_f_76_G7TpB_VOmfz7UTZPVn3d3n5v7-fE_4JAAD__078loo) in the event, including Barbie's Revenge, 100 Men vs Gorilla, and TACO a.k.a. Texas Aeronautics & Crash Organization. Judges include pro volleyball player Madisen Skinner and local TikTok creator Romeo Centeno. The free event will begin with a skydiving demonstration by the Red Bull Air Force. "_It’s our opportunity to bring a smile to their face—or at least a laugh_ ," [said David May](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3SpCAQRZ9GMyxoESQg2MTs23RDq4FGqUKdQmacefstp_YNNu6fe8798zP_YMppX37jRra-4zHvdJ2ZaqUyFwrumXPMz6XiQsty4h6u5NcZOAyMGyZgDpjyZ5ZtsI4HI1qyQg9aaTka0652iMFwAVIMgEFx7QbnQ_TCcVKcnGyTvZ9xI0AILkB3QThPY08Dei6F043kFFI9SldXqvTGM-bP8aLS-WNrs11rfZxN_6uBqYHpuq7uioj3sIEJS00-UwNTJKzPQmcDUyqvtC-sUGC3H_snyPaj1JV9I1jMn3tnQ7-m_XsFo2ZGjkqKyJkE7ZjkMrLR9IoZpRxFpfoefVtseFwp53SqG37ZMOUva_2_hl8W_gYAAP__nHOO6w) of the Margarita Voladora team.

If I had my druthers, in The Flyover would be a Flyover reader. That’s why we’ve structured this offering with you in mind: 5% bonus shares for all Flyover readers who invest An additional 5% bonus for those investing in our current round from $1M to $2M Legally, the offering is open to any U.S. citizen. But my heart—and our strategy—are focused on keeping ownership in the hands of our readers. Right now, we’re less than $130,000 away from hitting $2 million raised. Once we cross that mark, the extra 5% bonus goes away. That’s why I’m asking our readers one more time: will you consider ? But some of our readers are asking: "How do I get a return on my investment?" Here’s why The Flyover is different: Already profitable after just two years (most start-ups never are) 80% gross margins and 24% net income (exceptional margins) In the top 1% of media start-ups (proven strength) How investors could realize returns: 1. A Sale – Only to a partner who shares our values. (CNN or the New York Times need not apply.) 2. Public Listing – Shares traded openly on an exchange. 3. Profit Distributions (Dividends) – Because we’re already profitable, this is possible. Recap: Sale. Listing. Distributions. My Closing Pitch More than 1,225 Flyover readers have already joined us as investors. We’re just $130K away from our next milestone—and once we hit it, the chance at 10% bonus shares drops to 5%. If you’ve been considering investing, now is the moment. Let’s finish this round together and make The Flyover a news company truly owned by its readers. Will you be one of the investors who help us keep The Flyover reader-owned? | Public Figures Scrutinized for Kirk Remarks Several Texans in public-facing positions are taking heat for made following the assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk on Wednesday. At least one person has been fired. Goose Creek ISD teacher Jennifer Courtemanche , "Could this have been the consequences of his actions catching up with him?" A Pasadena ISD employee also made "inappropriate and insensitive comments.” Both districts and promised to review each employee's conduct. A Baylor University graduate student interning with Midway ISD was after saying Kirk's assassination "makes me giggle." Fort Worth City Councilwoman Elizabeth Beck a post in which she derided the Turning Point USA founder's defense of gun rights. Meanwhile, a Texas State University professor was for his remarks to the online Revolutionary Socialism Conference: "Without organization, how can anyone expect to overthrow the most bloodthirsty, profit-driven, mad organization in the history of the world—that of the United States? " Illegal Immigrant Kills Motel Worker Yordanis Cobos-Martinez, a 37-year-old illegal immigrant from Cuba, has been for allegedly beheading a motel manager in Dallas on Wednesday. According to an affidavit, Cobos-Martinez and a coworker were cleaning rooms around 9:30 a.m. when the victim, 50-year-old Chandra Nagamallaiah, informed him that a . Nagamallaiah to translate, which angered Cobos-Martinez, who stepped out of the room and returned moments later with a machete and killed him. Cobos-Martinez was previously in federal custody but was released on Jan. 13 because there were "no removal flights to Cuba,” . Irving Hosts Red Bull Flugtag More than 30,000 spectators are expected to visit Lake Carolyn in Irving's Las Colinas district tomorrow for , an annual competition featuring homemade, human-powered flying machines. The Metroplex last hosted the event in 2013. Participants in the , whose name originated from the German term for "flight day," will launch their aircraft from a 22-foot-high ramp. The winner will be determined by three criteria: flight distance, creativity, and showmanship. More than 30 five-person teams are in the event, including Barbie's Revenge, 100 Men vs Gorilla, and TACO a.k.a. Texas Aeronautics & Crash Organization. Judges include pro volleyball player Madisen Skinner and local TikTok creator Romeo Centeno. The free event will begin with a skydiving demonstration by the Red Bull Air Force. name: The Maine Wire
subject: TRIBUTE: Honoring The Legend Charlie Kirk
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** TRIBUTE: Honoring The Legend Charlie Kirk (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=5a0fd811db&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By DCNF on Sep 12, 2025 06:30 am
By David Bossie Forever the happy warrior, my good friend Charlie Kirk was tragically assassinated yesterday doing his life’s work in the public square. name: Sign Petition | Left Action
subject: Tell Democrats: "Don’t back down. Don’t cave to Republican shutdown threats. Don’t fund Trump’s damage."
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Democrats: "Don't Cave to Republican Demands Even if They Threaten a Shutdown"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19a26721-f15d-4e89-bec5-f7e892140181/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d127655-3221-4b33-b638-d5080bf9777c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5c64259-33a9-47e5-a677-8f134b9dd6ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), then forward this to friends to help build support!)_ There is a shutdown looming, ahead of a September 30th deadline, and Congressional Democrats are meeting today to plot strategy. [**Tell them not to cave to Republican threats, and to let the Republicans shut it down unless they offer meaningful concessions.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ffea050-2cbd-4b6e-9651-fd855ca0b00e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Many Democrats are already showing courage, and ready to stand strong, but we need as many as possible on board to defend essential programs and priorities. [**So let them hear from you!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f51d6d8-e9de-4180-81ea-a79d7128b900/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Now, the reality is that Republicans control all branches of the government, so there is a limit on what we can get. But they will need 60 votes to pass it in the Senate, so Democrats do real some power here. This is the chance to undo some of the damage done by Republicans under Trump, and to push back on Trump's push towards ever-increasing authoritarianism. And if Republicans refuse, and shut it down? Let them go for it, and good luck explaining to the voters why the party that controls all levers of government can't keep it running. [**Sign on: Tell Democrats: "Don't Cave to Republicans Demands Even if They Threaten a Shutdown."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01dabaa3-a20f-4678-b813-6a7371463e04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab9d4bf2-b0b5-42a6-a63a-0781bfac1eec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47dc6238-50be-42c0-ab9a-ee7f69f9f1ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te36be7d9-5d24-419b-bbb2-45559e1ef439/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ac00518-9634-4d6c-bc68-85a548523802/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

clean_body: National Republicans now have 5 times more money in the bank than Democrats, with Donald Trump bragging about his $1.5 billion warchest for the midterms. | = | Peter, National Republicans now have 5 times more money in the bank than Democrats, with Donald Trump bragging about his $1.5 billion warchest for the midterms. Cook Political Report rates us as the only toss-up district in New York—Trump’s home state. If we lose it, taking back the House next year becomes much harder. This could be where the fight will be won or lost. Our public fundraising deadline is at the end of the month and we still have work to do. Every contribution helps us reach voters, respond to attacks, and defend this seat. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with us and helping keep NY-04 blue. —Team Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: You deserve to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Here is the absolute truth. Not a bunch of nonsense like you see in other fundraising emails.

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. You deserve to know why this request is so important, especially today.
Here is the absolute truth. Not a bunch of nonsense like you see in other fundraising emails.
We started this campaign with the lead. We are being outspent by almost 2-1 on television. And now our lead is shrinking a bit.
And it can get worse. The one man largely bankrolling the opposition has already spent $30 million to beat us, and can keep writing another $10 million check every week if he wants.
Almost all of our donations come from people giving what they can, when they can. And our ability to win this election depends on people like you who know how important a victory would be for control of Congress.
On Monday, we face our next budget checkpoint -- and some tough decisions.And right now we are behind where we need to be. So I have to ask:
[**Can you please contribute $3 to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California? We need a huge number of individual donations before Monday to help us fill our budget gap.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250911&refcode2=2541_4767699_J-MQFJ&akid=2541%2E4767699%2EJ-MQFJ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Gavin Newsom

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: No doctors to be found — rural Tennessee is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
This is what GOP healthcare cuts look like.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K4YZCTYDPPYB0JR6C6TK1VJN_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K4YZCTYDPPYB0JR6C6TK1VJN_1)
---
| | | | Peter, Right now, emergency rooms across rural America — including some in Tennessee — are operating **without a single MD on-site**. A recent report found that**7.4% of ERs nationally have no attending physician on duty 24/7** , with that number surging to **46% in states like Montana** , and over 50% in the Dakotas. This isn’t just a statistic — it’s a death sentence for many Americans. Rural Tennesseans have been abandoned by Republicans. As more local hospitals and clinics close or scale back, families are forced to drive **hours for basic care**. Pregnant women have to be driven over 60 miles when they go into labor. No dialysis. No chemotherapy. No full-time doctors in emergency rooms. Just a skeleton crew of healthcare professionals doing their best. Why? Because Republicans are gutting our healthcare programs and allowing the insurance industry to run amok and unregulated. **These healthcare cuts are having a direct and devastating impact on people’s lives.** Tennessee deserves better. Our neighbors deserve better. **You deserve better! So help us fight back.** ** ** **Donate $50** **right now** to put the Power of the People back in your hands to combat these special interests pouring dark money into politics! The only thing Tennessee Republicans will understand is blunt force and action. We need to bring the fight to them! **
**
---

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: Minnesota could flip red
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Here’s how we make it happen

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbsmkgko2ql3t2mo5dda07qnamsdr2h7306f5l5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda.
**[Before you read any further, I have to ask,**_will you chip in $25, $50, or anything you can today to help me win this critical race?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd1vcpgrifsbj40jjgnavddkdragp2i0mqufa4to_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6hdbdbh076b92nebdgejr880qdki48auc250s90_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
| | Walz’s record is a warning for America: **higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies.**
If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states.
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. _I’m ready to take it on._
This race isn’t just about Minnesota. **It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state.**
But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now.
**If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget.**
**_[Will you chip in a donation to support our campaign today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za3q4il4ukccic54erp442lba5tupkadvakkb958_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)_**

[DONATE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za623br1ndi06cfvcpb7hq0ngg6c4f56kpbprne0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
[DONATE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zan0vtmra4od27rcos9u2k44u426i16ts85aq7f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsnlbgopiudmo7oknu1rr9dfnkkkffv989b7khuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
| | Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota

---
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8s4kjkk4g6ge1ori389m3m9d5ikvg5i99rhki38_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zao0g5qvl5vc5jqirfds6iasdbeopg6ok5fii3mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm9khrunc6oe64rn6jkb8t56mfqb2bg2l3dirr78_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
|

| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt3eufrttp7f5pdicnbne9r6i09of8tuocfirut8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)
---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
_[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn12hj3l3p62notmm2gvu1e5f9jh34e8dtbn41m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie6ob2c1h2bs)_
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

name: Andy Roth
subject: Grieving for Charlie
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pLtRa0_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer46FEYFDoQutDm9naxVA3NbmxAxx90LNI-2BXtt3nvwgBrhlq9zt1zjf0P8uKgT-2FpbFvw-2BVdp9MtwdpD6y0vyg52y3MUiT8vob-2FvlOIX8jdgidhU2O7Tr0qFK58gpGBE66eRDyAcgcOUzYSAgl5-2B64-2FbvyQBVk6O50vyamuWnNw5XOqac-2BSbt-2F3Fnr7QgWS8lVTdoaul6-2BdswOts3L1WkiJS1jdelfzrf5PuZYJcqZZOy8-3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, Each Friday we normally share with you the good work of our members and, this week, a recap of our recent annual Summit, which was a huge success. But in light of the horrific assassination of Charlie Kirk, it does not feel right to celebrate or report. Instead, we thought it appropriate that we all spend more time with our families and hold close the people we love. We will send you a full Summit report next Friday. For now, our prayers are simply with Charlie’s family, friends, and all those grieving the devastating loss of a great man. We pray God brings comfort to his beautiful wife and children, that He would bring healing to our fractured nation, and that perfect justice will come soon.
---
In Liberty,
---
---
Andy RothPresidentState Freedom Caucus Network

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Each Friday we normally share with you the good work of our members and, this week, a recap of our recent annual Summit, which was a huge success. But in light of the horrific assassination of Charlie Kirk, it does not feel right to celebrate or report. Instead, we thought it appropriate that we all spend more time with our families and hold close the people we love. We will send you a full Summit report next Friday. For now, our prayers are simply with Charlie’s family, friends, and all those grieving the devastating loss of a great man. We pray God brings comfort to his beautiful wife and children, that He would bring healing to our fractured nation, and that perfect justice will come soon. In Liberty, Andy RothPresidentState Freedom Caucus Network |

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Political violence of any kind is unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We must come together and collectively lower the temperature

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=829%2E49239%2EuYYTmo)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5858?t=2&akid=829%2E49239%2EuYYTmo)
---
null, my heart is with Charlie Kirk's family after he was killed at an event on a college campus yesterday.
**In this dark moment, I want to be very clear: Political violence of any kind is unacceptable** – from the assassination of Minnesota House Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark, to the shooting of state Sen. John Hoffman and his wife Yvette just a few weeks ago, and now to the assassination of Charlie Kirk, we cannot deny it: Political violence is surging.
This is not the direction we want for our country. This year alone has shown that our political leaders, organizers, children, and communities are in serious danger from rampant political violence. America is built on the right to speak freely and the right to celebrate our political differences. No matter where you land on the political spectrum, we’re Americans at the end of the day.
If we do not come together and collectively lower the temperature, the current path we're on will take our country to an even darker place.
Every American should be able to exercise their right to participate in our political system without fear of violence. Our democracy depends on it. I will do everything in my power to protect that right – and our democracy along with it. That is my promise to you, now and always.
Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5854?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=829%2E49239%2EuYYTmo) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5858?t=4&akid=829%2E49239%2EuYYTmo)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Abigail’s career shows what happens when women are prepared, supported, and trained to lead. She is exactly the kind of leader Emerge trains every day.

[_**Your support today can help train the next Abigail Spanberger: women ready to run, win, and advocate for their communities across Virginia and the country.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115077238/569115122/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-12_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ZjU3Yzk0LWRjOGYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LPMoODT26CeqhqlfxzhdPNoG9coaHHqqsBbX4CY9NJw=)

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious

| |
---
| | | | | | | My back is against the wall, Friend.

The Left has too much influence, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now, their sights are set on me:
---
| | **[**Jeffries super PAC looks deep into GOP territory for 2026 map**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj5vkeemnpjbros4enji50k5phn2e08bf7blb4fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie1oj6cph2bs)**
---
_[_Axios_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zepu33at9uo5r2qpkn3akj5jr45rdaua8mjmmmg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie1oj6cph2bs)_
---
| | If I don't catch up, I'll be handing the keys to the radical Left and surrendering our Republican majority to the same forces hell-bent on destroying our country.
---
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's first Secretary of the Interior and was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**

**I 'm also desperately trying to hold on to the most critical seat in Congress. **
---
And if Schumer and Jeffries can take me down, then I can guarantee you no other Republican will stand a chance.
a new paragraph block.
---
**In 2022 and 2024, I led the team of Navy SEALs that held onto the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I 'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington, D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. **
---
So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[I _f you chip in just $5 right now_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8fidt1e7i7f90aiishr5u142er6p9fi9f5s2hf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie1oj6cph2bs)** __, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Left 's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkfku3rhcfa9gjvrc0sth3k775kf7mbr1cgbgd9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie1oj6cph2bs)
---
You have my word; as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeu6bq77gkddksumomqgm16ju1an3b8hl2iok1k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdie1oj6cph2bs)

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68690?t=3&akid=23385%2E4449941%2EB3ObA1) [**DO YOU SUPPORT RENAMING THE KENNEDY CENTER OPERA HOUSE AFTER MELANIA TRUMP?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68690?t=4&akid=23385%2E4449941%2EB3ObA1) | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68690?t=5&akid=23385%2E4449941%2EB3ObA1)
---

[NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68690?t=6&akid=23385%2E4449941%2EB3ObA1)
---
_** 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED FROM YOUR STATE BEFORE MIDNIGHT **_
Look, MAGA Republicans are doing everything to glorify Trump and his family like kings and dictators do:

⭕ Adding his face to Mt. Rushmore...
⭕ Making his birthday a national holiday...
⭕ Renaming the Washington, D.C. subway the “Trump Train”...

**_But they’ve stooped to a new low._**

[The Kennedy Center Opera House is a historic institution honoring President Kennedy. Slapping Melania’s name on it is nothing but an embarrassing attempt to curry favor with Donald Trump.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68690?t=7&akid=23385%2E4449941%2EB3ObA1)

This is dangerous. If we don’t push back, they’ll keep rewriting history the way Donald Trump wants it to be told.

If we’re going to stop this, we need to prove that Americans from Arkansas to Arizona agree. So please, friend, let us know what you think below:
[**DO YOU SUPPORT RENAMING THE KENNEDY CENTER OPERA HOUSE AFTER MELANIA TRUMP?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68690?t=8&akid=23385%2E4449941%2EB3ObA1)

Fight for Reform

President Donald Trump announced that a suspect for Charlie Kirk's assassination was turned in by his own father through a minister connected to law enforcement, with sources identifying the suspect as 22-year-old Utah local Tyler Robinson, **[the NY Post reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/ebd117fb-440f-4ffb-bdb4-d2c2e0a0b938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ebd117fb-440f-4ffb-bdb4-d2c2e0a0b938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"I think, with a high degree of certainty, we have him," Trump told "Fox & Friends" this morning.
Trump expressed hope that the suspect would be found guilty and receive the death penalty, calling Kirk "the finest person" who didn't deserve what happened, while admitting he refused to watch the graphic video footage of the shooting.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/202a6bc0-93c4-46de-92ee-07ddd8cec98b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Shooting details** : Kirk was fatally shot by a single gunshot to the neck from about 200 yards away while answering a question about transgender mass shooters during his "American Comeback Tour" event at Utah Valley University, with the gunman positioned on a rooftop east of the library.
* **Investigation timeline** : The FBI initially detained and released a different person of interest after questioning, offered a $100,000 reward for information, and involved multiple law enforcement agencies in the manhunt before this breakthrough arrest.

This news is exciting for so many reasons. For one, Debra **absolutely destroyed** her male opponents, securing nearly 40% of the vote, while the runner-up was a Republican man with 17.4%.

**This means Her Bold Move’s 100% winning streak CONTINUES. Her Bold Move has not had a single loss in more than 10 months. This is unbelievable. We are proud, but we are not surprised. We are proving that if we take a chance and implement our tailored programs for qualified women running for office, _regardless of where they live_ , we can win. **

In 2024, the Republican (an incumbent at the time) running for this seat defeated his Democratic challenger with more than 70% of the vote. However, we knew not to count this Georgia district out. The results from this election show that Georgia is still very much a purple state, and like all of us, voters in the state are sick and tired of _**male** GOP supermajorities_ writing dangerous laws about women’s bodies.

The bottom line: if you’re losing hope, given everything that’s been happening since Trump took office, we believe there’s plenty of reason for optimism. Incredible, progressive women are running for local and statewide office in red states and districts – and WINNING.

[**The top two candidates from this special election will face off for the runoff on September 23. This seat is flippable, and would give pro-choice Democrats one more influential seat in the Georgia State Senate – which currently has only 16 female lawmakers. Debra needs our help to make this a reality. You can join Debra’s race for this seat by rushing a split $20.25 or more donation today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115079167/569120124/-1604983161?refcode=EM_F_250911Win_N_EH_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyZDIwNmIyLWRlOGYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fBXbSdJLdN2leaASY4l7EOBsK531GaFgNbzSbiDYI8w=)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move

name: Red tide
subject: Dems staring down defeat in biggest 2025 race
body:
The high court in PA is a crucial must-hold backstop against MAGA’s total and complete takeover of our democracy. Pennsylvania is one of the biggest prizes: a swing state worth 19 electoral votes. As
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FRfQlIlaRcE2GTJhbxaENjP3-3QuxCfRbxi0UzWhFT7I0LiIb-04ocrZu6Vr5v6lKf6fdg2ePUd8W-vmQDi1wyiN8NOJrZkzaZaPlKcBLohu_NeMzIqts0PCeVWQ1tenApEMB7Adm1JyAEcaT3Vip-f4SgK8EB4TiP7QO9s1wehGuqy2tAdACePjU6OZPVGTPmHSBi4IeOAUKwxFeaYLjVNVFSfotu3A&c=x9pyJyamDAbjow9k37eH54ZXy8chEzWm_5_qk5oX6qC29M6NiwntSA==&ch=_V64c3XUS16t36Hlz4a-GCGXPRdwy2GDr9tlZGOmY8yK20dUugDjLQ==)
---
| Peter,
We've never seen MAGA this energized. In the all-out battle to win Pennsylvania's little discussed Supreme Court Election, the stakes are astronomical.
Right now, Dems have a 5-2 majority on the state supreme court. With it, they have stopped extreme abortion bans, protected voting rights, and prevented Trump from stealing the presidential election in 2020.
But all that is at risk now. MAGA activists have deployed thousands of door to door canvassers, held voter registration drives in every single county at every single fair and community event, and mailed millions of "vote NO" pamphlets to voters across the entire state.
And now, the big one has finally arrived: the GOP's equivalent of a political nuke that could obliterate any chance we have of maintaining Democratic control over the Pennsylvania Supreme Court for generations.

---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FRfQlIlaRcE2GTJhbxaENjP3-3QuxCfRbxi0UzWhFT7I0LiIb-04ocrZu6Vr5v6lKf6fdg2ePUd8W-vmQDi1wyiN8NOJrZkzaZaPlKcBLohu_NeMzIqts0PCeVWQ1tenApEMB7Adm1JyAEcaT3Vip-f4SgK8EB4TiP7QO9s1wehGuqy2tAdACePjU6OZPVGTPmHSBi4IeOAUKwxFeaYLjdTKi7RFtZV8&c=x9pyJyamDAbjow9k37eH54ZXy8chEzWm_5_qk5oX6qC29M6NiwntSA==&ch=_V64c3XUS16t36Hlz4a-GCGXPRdwy2GDr9tlZGOmY8yK20dUugDjLQ==)
---
| | | | If we lose here, we lose any and all protection against a total abortion ban, massive GOP partisan gerrymandering that could wipe out a handful of Dem House seats, and vote by mail will disappear just in time for the 2026 Midterms.
As of this writing, the GOP has placed millions already behind their simple message to voters for November: VOTE NO to end Democratic control in Pennsylvania once and for all:

The high court in PA is a crucial must-hold backstops against MAGA's total and complete takeover of our democracy. Pennsylvania is one of the biggest prizes: a swing state worth 19 electoral votes. As goes Pennsylvania, so goes the nation.
Defend Our Courts has been blaring the alarm for months now, and national Dems have still not woken up to the danger we are in here. Things are looking pretty bleak at the moment. That's why we desperately need your help right now to pull off a massive upset and shock MAGA into silence by winning these critical contests in November.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Some notes about the U.S. Senate races in Iowa, Michigan, and North Carolina. Please read:
#

**If you’re ready to help us flip the Senate in 2026, please consider making a donation of $15 or more right now.** **[MAKE A DONATION HERE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94610?refcode=em20250912-9404&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9404%2E614464%2EfvZ1wE)** If you want to know more before chipping in, please keep reading to learn about THREE of the open U.S. Senate seats we need Democrats to WIN in 2026.
---

**— IOWA —** Iowa’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Joni Ernst, who recently announced her intent to retire. Earlier this summer, Cook Political Report UPGRADED Iowa’s U.S. Senate race TOWARD Democrats. This is one of our TOP opportunities to expand the Senate map — and your support today could help us build on the incredible momentum we’re already seeing in Iowa. **[FLIP IOWA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94610?refcode=em20250912-9404&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9404%2E614464%2EfvZ1wE)**
---

**— MICHIGAN —** Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Gary Peters, who announced his intent to retire earlier this year. This is the only OPEN U.S. Senate seat held by a Democrat that Cook Political Report currently rates as a TOSS UP. Your support today could help us defend this seat in what will inevitably be one of the nation’s top battlegrounds in 2026. **[DEFEND MICHIGAN: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94610?refcode=em20250912-9404&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9404%2E614464%2EfvZ1wE)**
---

**— NORTH CAROLINA —** North Carolina’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Thom Tillis, who recently announced his intent to retire. This is the only OPEN U.S. Senate seat held by a Republican that Cook Political Report currently rates as a TOSS UP. We know this will be one of the most expensive elections next year — and we’re urgently counting on your help to stay prepared for the fight ahead. **[FLIP NORTH CAROLINA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94610?refcode=em20250912-9404&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9404%2E614464%2EfvZ1wE)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdc-email-footer?refcode=em20250912-9404-footer&t=5&refcode2=9404_614464_fvZ1wE&akid=9404%2E614464%2EfvZ1wE)**
---
