name: Kendall
subject: My 5 truths
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I’ve thought a lot about my 5 truths...

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ej48f28gn5nh69igis82kg8cuqjqn35269ls30_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)
---
| | Friend,
1. Where you start in life doesn’t have to be where you end up
2. The American Dream is alive and well
3. You don’t escape poverty by blaming others for your problems
4. Minnesota needs a political outsider who’s ready to turn things upside down
5. I live in an exceptional country and serve an exceptional God.

Those are my 5 truths, Friend, and they’re why I’m running for Governor of Minnesota. [Will you help me fight for them by making a grassroots donation today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm069g94tsmmaqme7a4smn6nopjbcppbaakfla9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)

---
[PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za0pigub2vgi0rukqehumgg9800rd0ocfcuvdi18_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)
| | Maybe my truths aren’t your cup of tea. Maybe we’re not on the same page. That’s fine. But if we are - and you’re ready to send an outsider to shake things up in St. Paul - then it’s time to hit the ground running.
I’m no career politician. I was born into poverty, surrounded by crime. I spent part of my childhood living in trailer parks. Despite that, I joined the Army. I worked my way through college. I got married - stayed married - and raised a family. I became a Christian and made my faith my “true north.” I found success in the private sector.
None of that would have been possible without the belief that with hard work and determination, the American Dream is possible.
_[If you can relate to any part of my story, or if you think my five truths are worth fighting for, then I’d be honored to have you on the team.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z77574l1k8dkdl82dah375ia7sfmdfdmmfp51ta8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)_
I’ll end with this: I plan to fix what Tim Walz broke, and I’m never going to change who I am or compromise my values to win an election. Truth is truth, and I plan on taking that message all the way to the governor’s office. Will you join me?

---
[PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj1h1jes0nao0b8118nmqres3b55dbq5qdd2g8ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)
Regards,
Kendall Qualls Husband. Father. Conservative.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi95cr42ehtenqv9jsp79ftrm3nq90e54sfpmpu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg2qvlna61jg2ik3r8ueng9m5fnbvr63act0f18g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt3pe219o6u07nicmn1oo6j7p2nlipbuqepnripo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)
|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsvm2ukiqss6ueabg3fadlkk5hll3fm88f6iufc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)
---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
_[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztjpjmro4pr2pabb8eq73el0n8bfcocv7h0boojo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg60o34c5h2bs)_
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

---

a God-given right — the ultimate shield against tyranny.

name: Shinji Oh
subject: 🚂All Aboard the PDAB Train🚂
body:
It’s time for Virginia to get on board– a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, that is. Most countries arou
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
It's time for Virginia to get on board- a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, that is. Most countries around the world help to regulate the cost of prescription drugs on a Federal level, but the United States (which has the [highest prescription drug prices in the world](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g8rQFqr3J_t4dgakRS0C_5-W3o2bRPiJ28btotmVTN6e5T8apF8yZgK8CWETGzEYUSvUFtP-b7ISWFtHN_LK2C96Dww6SQsaviASckb2ACzwoMS5I-rOm2IGFxThxlNPb6T02-DIfooVBqtgztGTfrS1wq9WgRI_qH132uWEhi64TUEm9gSk2KFv_RlaskPXnaZSOcsibmD_52Ag2RZrzvh_sdM4U1MAXLeZfIODcck=&c=cEdu4FhrQUeF4yV4rhTJrZO1prJr7iQs4wIADkhps4Z4y51Jbbxv-Q==&ch=g3odN8n6Ks66UBEI3xm9kH6r_zEg_xCyEtXEv22AznRTFkvbfPCuhw==)) generally does not, with a few exceptions. Medication that you can't afford is medication you don't take, which means that Virginians already struggling to keep up with the cost of living are choosing to forgo life-saving medications in order to keep food on the table and a roof over their heads.
---

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: A Billion Dollar Boondoggle Rebrand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Changing the Department of Defense isn’t just stupid. It’s expensive. Recent estimates put the price tag for the rebrand at or above $1 billion.
#
Peter —
Changing the Department of Defense isn’t just stupid. It’s expensive. Recent estimates put the price tag for the rebrand at or above $1 billion.
Why? Because they would need to make that change across 700,000 military facilities in 40 nations and all 50 states.
It’s a logistics nightmare. It’s a time suck. It’s a waste of resources. It’s another boondoggle, an expensive vanity project from the president responsible for driving up inflation, devaluing the dollar, increasing tariff taxes, stalling out the economy, and taking billions of dollars out of Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, and the VA.
VoteVets has no intention of letting Congress appropriate a single dollar to turn the Department of Defense into the Department of War. We’ll fight this tooth and nail, and we’ll win.
Are you with us?
[**Add your name to this petition and tell Congress: SAY NO TO THE DEPARTMENT OF WAR.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250906_vv_dow/?source=em250912-1-120&akid=34605%2E3013755%2Eq949eH)

subject: $10… for what?

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1813%2E791427%2E4xkqHs)

Friend — From time to time we ask you to chip in $10 or some other amount to support Ilhan Omar’s campaign for reelection.
But you may wonder, what really happens to my $10 after I donate? What is that $10 for?
Well, our campaign believes in full transparency, so we want to pull back the curtain and tell you **exactly what your $10 pays for:**
* **Campaign staff** who will work tirelessly over the next year to organize in our district and coordinate this campaign.
* **Paid canvassers and volunteers** who will knock doors, make phone calls, and show up for our campaign at community events.
* **Mail pieces** that outline Ilhan’s accomplishments and vision for the future that we can send to the mailboxes of every voter in MN-05.
* **Television ads and digital ads** on platforms like Facebook and Youtube that spread Ilhan’s message far and wide.
* **Operational expenses** like transportation, lodging, and office space, as well as things like bumper stickers and yard signs.

All of these things help Ilhan win, and all of them are funded by grassroots donations from people like you, chipping in $10 at a time.
Really! We don’t ask billionaires to buy us a spot for a TV ad. We don’t get Super PACs to send mail pieces out into the district.
So, we’re hoping that by explaining how this campaign works, we can convince you to chip in $10 or whatever you can afford today. What do you say?
**[Make a contribution today to power Ilhan Omar’s campaign for reelection. We have a lot of work ahead, and any money we can raise right now goes right back into our efforts to win over voters in Minnesota’s 5th and continue to organize against the corrupt Trump administration.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250912-1-180&t=2&akid=1813%2E791427%2E4xkqHs)

name: DemsGive
subject: An update affecting Tennessee families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Guard duties in DC and access to SNAP at home.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K4Z4T28B6PKTDWD4A846NJPT_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, Below is a message from the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus. It shares their perspective on the Tennessee National Guard deployment to Washington, D.C., and on SNAP in Tennessee, including hot food waivers, work requirements, and what policy changes could mean for families and local retailers. When you have a minute, please read on. With gratitude, Andy DemsGive.org
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, Governor Bill Lee just yanked 160 Tennessee National Guard personnel away from their families and their jobs and sent them to Washington, D.C. These brave Tennesseans are being used as political pawns, rather than being reserved for the life-saving and emergency response functions for which they were trained. None of these individuals volunteered to participate in Donald Trump’s militarization of our nation’s capital. Donald Trump and Bill Lee’s willingness to abuse their power is threatening American citizens in one of our country’s most beautiful cities, causing personal hardships for Guard personnel, and costing Tennessee taxpayers millions of dollars. Meanwhile back home, Bill Lee is begging Donald Trump for exemptions just to allow working Tennesseans to buy hot food with their SNAP benefits. That’s right: Tennesseans need a **federal waiver** to buy a rotisserie chicken. Tennessee families rely on SNAP just to put food on the table—an average of **$118.21 million** in benefits are distributed monthly across the state and accepted by **over 6,600 food retailers.** SNAP dollars don’t just feed families—they support farmers, truck drivers, grocers, and local economies. Now, Republican work requirements are set to slash those benefits by 20%—a **$250 million cut** that will push more families into food insecurity. It’s outrageous. We MUST fight back. Troops in American streets and depriving families and children of food is not normal, and we cannot allow it to be normalized. **Your donation is your voice** —a voice for working families, for hungry children, for forgotten communities. Help us stop the GOP’s cruel cuts to the programs on which Tennesseans depend. **Chip in $20 right now** to shift our focus from political stunts with our state troops to fighting the real battle—**the battle against hunger in our state.**
---
| | [ Donate Now ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K4Z4T28B6PKTDWD4A846NJPT_1)
---
| | | | | |
---
| — Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
---
| |
---
| | | _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_

clean_body: Guard duties in DC and access to SNAP at home. | | | | | | | | | Hey Peter, Below is a message from the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus. It shares their perspective on the Tennessee National Guard deployment to Washington, D.C., and on SNAP in Tennessee, including hot food waivers, work requirements, and what policy changes could mean for families and local retailers. When you have a minute, please read on. With gratitude, Andy DemsGive.org | | | | | | Peter, Governor Bill Lee just yanked 160 Tennessee National Guard personnel away from their families and their jobs and sent them to Washington, D.C. These brave Tennesseans are being used as political pawns, rather than being reserved for the life-saving and emergency response functions for which they were trained. None of these individuals volunteered to participate in Donald Trump’s militarization of our nation’s capital. Donald Trump and Bill Lee’s willingness to abuse their power is threatening American citizens in one of our country’s most beautiful cities, causing personal hardships for Guard personnel, and costing Tennessee taxpayers millions of dollars. Meanwhile back home, Bill Lee is begging Donald Trump for exemptions just to allow working Tennesseans to buy hot food with their SNAP benefits. That’s right: Tennesseans need a federal waiver to buy a rotisserie chicken. Tennessee families rely on SNAP just to put food on the table—an average of $118.21 million in benefits are distributed monthly across the state and accepted by over 6,600 food retailers. SNAP dollars don’t just feed families—they support farmers, truck drivers, grocers, and local economies. Now, Republican work requirements are set to slash those benefits by 20%—a $250 million cut that will push more families into food insecurity. It’s outrageous. We MUST fight back. Troops in American streets and depriving families and children of food is not normal, and we cannot allow it to be normalized. Your donation is your voice —a voice for working families, for hungry children, for forgotten communities. Help us stop the GOP’s cruel cuts to the programs on which Tennesseans depend. Chip in $20 right now to shift our focus from political stunts with our state troops to fighting the real battle—the battle against hunger in our state. | | | | | | | | | — Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | | | | | Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer | No longer want to receive these emails? . name: Josh Turek
subject: rewind the tape
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Hey team, it’s Josh Turek checking in. I’m the Democrat in the race for Iowa’s U.S. Senate seat, which could decide Senate control. There’s no denying this race is CRITICAL, so before I tell you a little about my background and how it brought me into this race, **I’m personally asking you to consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton today. No donation is too small to have an impact.** _Let’s rewind the tape:_ I was born in ‘79 in Council Bluffs, Iowa and diagnosed with spina bifida caused by my dad’s exposure to Agent Orange in Vietnam. I had 21 surgeries before the age of 12. I grew up with the wrong color lunch ticket at school, wearing Goodwill hand-me-downs. I come from a big, close-knit family. But even still, life as a small-town, working-class disabled kid in the ‘80s wasn’t all peaches and cream. I was bullied so badly I had to leave public school in sixth grade. I was an isolated kid with a chip on his shoulder. One summer, an adaptive sports camp across the river in Omaha introduced me to wheelchair basketball. Suddenly, I had a purpose. I played throughout high school and college. I even went pro overseas for several years, where I met my wife, Jarolin. I competed in four Paralympics and took home two gold medals and one bronze for Team USA. After I retired from wheelchair basketball, I won my first election for Iowa State Rep by just 6 votes, in a solid-red Trump district no one thought I’d win. Fast forward to now and I’m proudly representing Council Bluffs and Carter Lake at the Iowa State Capitol. But when Joni Ernst replied to a constituent worried about Medicaid cuts with the infamous line: “Well, we all are going to die,” I knew I had to get in the game. Then, she voted to cut Medicaid coverage for millions of Americans and over 100,000 Iowans, _**and I was all in and ready to replace her.**_ **I’m in this Senate race to give Iowans a shot at building a life, a family, and a legacy they’re proud of. I’ll be a Senator they respect, who respects them in return.** That’s the part we’ll achieve in the U.S. Senate (Step 2). First, we need to get started on Step 1: **winning one of the most-watched, must-win races in the country.** [**Folks, every vote and every dollar counts to help us build out the team and ground game to win in Iowa. So please, don’t sit on the sidelines. name: Kendall
subject: My 5 truths
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I’ve thought a lot about my 5 truths...

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1370m3hhv6mq6apv4f4bhmpf81t7peavfuptc5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg68o72cph2bs)
---
| | Friend,
1. Where you start in life doesn’t have to be where you end up
2. The American Dream is alive and well
3. You don’t escape poverty by blaming others for your problems
4. Minnesota needs a political outsider who’s ready to turn things upside down
5. I live in an exceptional country and serve an exceptional God.

Those are my 5 truths, Friend, and they’re why I’m running for Governor of Minnesota. [Will you help me fight for them by making a grassroots donation today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl9v1l3vjs25i96c0ttdh66ae6sqvtiakkbbuua8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg68o72cph2bs)

---
[PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0ifim509d80hmrl9lmc8pupr0bubh8cqfo80fao_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg68o72cph2bs)
| | Maybe my truths aren’t your cup of tea. Maybe we’re not on the same page. That’s fine. But if we are - and you’re ready to send an outsider to shake things up in St. Paul - then it’s time to hit the ground running.
I’m no career politician. I was born into poverty, surrounded by crime. I spent part of my childhood living in trailer parks. Despite that, I joined the Army. I worked my way through college. I got married - stayed married - and raised a family. I became a Christian and made my faith my “true north.” I found success in the private sector.
None of that would have been possible without the belief that with hard work and determination, the American Dream is possible.
_[If you can relate to any part of my story, or if you think my five truths are worth fighting for, then I’d be honored to have you on the team.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zspb1v9i0q89rc0gfm888uojrlsvfuvdao9k3s2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg68o72cph2bs)_
I’ll end with this: I plan to fix what Tim Walz broke, and I’m never going to change who I am or compromise my values to win an election. Truth is truth, and I plan on taking that message all the way to the governor’s office. Will you join me?

---
[PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za573h6ihs325ekuvms2kjkt3o5e8vir5cqvtjvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg68o72cph2bs)
Regards,
Kendall Qualls Husband. Father. Conservative.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4mpdqb19f1on5pe1g7fef9f9f55r9v7ukji8h50_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg68o72cph2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zml67sbtdcvcaakg7ipsk5nq3qv31qv64m8jup50_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg68o72cph2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhuuij7vknkh67dpgkcfh3j5c1jjsc0gftdt63vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctg68o72cph2bs)
|

clean_body: I’ve thought a lot about my 5 truths... | | | | | | Friend, 1. Where you start in life doesn’t have to be where you end up 2. The American Dream is alive and well 3. You don’t escape poverty by blaming others for your problems 4. Minnesota needs a political outsider who’s ready to turn things upside down 5. I live in an exceptional country and serve an exceptional God. Those are my 5 truths, Friend, and they’re why I’m running for Governor of Minnesota. | | Maybe my truths aren’t your cup of tea. Maybe we’re not on the same page. That’s fine. But if we are - and you’re ready to send an outsider to shake things up in St. Paul - then it’s time to hit the ground running. I’m no career politician. I was born into poverty, surrounded by crime. I spent part of my childhood living in trailer parks. Despite that, I joined the Army. I worked my way through college. I got married - stayed married - and raised a family. I became a Christian and made my faith my “true north.” I found success in the private sector. None of that would have been possible without the belief that with hard work and determination, the American Dream is possible. I’ll end with this: I plan to fix what Tim Walz broke, and I’m never going to change who I am or compromise my values to win an election. Truth is truth, and I plan on taking that message all the way to the governor’s office. Will you join me? Regards, Kendall Qualls Husband. Father. Conservative. | | | My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school. I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit. Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation. We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities. That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. With gratitude,Kendall Qualls | | | | | The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts. When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Trump has been stoking the fires of hate and violence since he rode down the escalator to announce his candidacy. He doesn't get to preach what he doesn't practice. subject: The new leaders of the Democrat Party.

body:
An outright Marxist...
| **_A SECURE BRIEFING AUTHORIZED BY REP. JIM JORDAN_**
---
Friend,
---
I never thought I’d see something like this happen in the United States of America...
---
_**But fueled by millions of dollars from radical Left-wing donors, socialists and outright communists are _TAKING_ _OVER_ the Democrat Party to force their Marxist agenda on the American people! **_
---
_**...Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash as Democrats Remain Divided**_
**“Far left’s prolific fundraising shows appeal to party’s base”**
[Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
---
The unfortunate reality is that in politics, money often leads to political power.
---
The Democrats are only going to get _more extreme_ as they become more and more dependent on cash from radicals who hate America and the values that make our country great.
---
I don’t even want to begin to imagine all the horrible things these extremists would do if they took back the People’s House in the midterms...
---
_**But I know the first thing on the agenda would be _IMPEACHING_ President Trump! **_
---
It’s no exaggeration to say that the fate of Trump’s presidency and his America First agenda all depends on Republicans winning the midterms!
---
**Given just how dire the stakes are, I’ve teamed up with the House GOP Leadership Chair to help Republicans build our own war chest earlier than ever before – and we’ve set an ambitious target of 1,000,000 new grassroots contributions before the end of the month.**
---
It’s vital that we offset this influx of cash that’s flowing to the most extreme Democrats with our own influx of contributions from America First patriots like YOU, Friend.
---
Remember, it’s not the size of your contribution that matters. What’s important is the sheer number of patriots who step up to help fight for President Trump’s agenda when it matters most.
---
_As long as the America First movement remains united, we can always _OUTRAISE_ the Democrats – no matter how many millions they haul in from their radical donors! _

body:
You're invited to join Governor Roy Cooper

| | | | | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fourtenn.org%2F/1/010f01993e71ea3e-42688dcc-9d2e-4036-abc6-4f92b8dc853c-000000/_CqUw_hewcJJjN_E3rH3S6qTbjA=228)
---
Peter,
I wanted to send over this invite to an exciting reception with Governor Roy Cooper coming up next week on** Tuesday September 16th at 5:30 PM in Nashville**. This is a great opportunity to hear from the former governor of our neighboring state and ask questions on how to win tough races so we can flip seats here at home. [**Click here to register for a ticket.**](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F250916nashville_murdock/1/010f01993e71ea3e-42688dcc-9d2e-4036-abc6-4f92b8dc853c-000000/FsyUEdwafxtGLzz5JahD5BsltR4=228)

| | [](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F250916nashville_murdock/2/010f01993e71ea3e-42688dcc-9d2e-4036-abc6-4f92b8dc853c-000000/iBmg_0MJKwXLliQVLyVh8wx5vUA=228)
---
In solidarity,
Chris Murdock
Our Tennessee Future PAC Team
---
| [Donate to Our Tenn](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Four-tennessee-future-pac-1%3Frefcode=TENN25_EM_Cooper/1/010f01993e71ea3e-42688dcc-9d2e-4036-abc6-4f92b8dc853c-000000/SWwFjjmw5ppk--tcSupiJixlAb0=228 "Donate to Our Tenn")
---
_Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. clean_body: You're invited to join Governor Roy Cooper | | | | | Peter, I wanted to send over this invite to an exciting reception with Governor Roy Cooper coming up next week on Tuesday September 16th at 5:30 PM in Nashville. This is a great opportunity to hear from the former governor of our neighboring state and ask questions on how to win tough races so we can flip seats here at home. | | In solidarity, Chris Murdock Our Tennessee Future PAC Team | "Donate to Our Tenn" Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight. | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee mailto:info@ourtenn.org | | 901B Coral Road Nashville, Tennessee 37204 USA

name: Weston Imer
subject: Remembering Charlie Kirk, and the path forward
disclaimer_text: paid for by Team Imer PAC and was not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
Friends, Charlie Kirks legacy must live on, and the void in our hearts is still fresh with grief and sorrow. Where do we go from here?
| | | | | [](https://udmlh9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v3DXt99oENQTcvgP6LlNlPOGnvGXL428eRr4oPMeaBl4ERymUvcq108215YolpAZx-HjKXdB1_81WZoNKPBdnPvwQwI1lN-xKY8aRx9JHsBg_wgV73dB7vNdZRmlGk8XyubpUWgP4t_II1MQV-3kPioJJJZzHvCHEqKfFmNYh3eemL-cyK02tx18fSqgiENLTcjnWsrEvbuEp8Z6S9ccgx4xDq7GFDtHSXCeuIpg7MJoCk41Flh-Q5kMx06PGbaL&c=zhKoueZgdWPxuvSnh1hkshnTxLf6JU6_cdYWwMbxUTjSnVbc5sl3-w==&ch=EV9o1fZjQBsBmMv9KVsGMffyOomaPP_k0gUt_gRp9-8dj2stB-iL_w==)
---
---
| | [](https://udmlh9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v3DXt99oENQTcvgP6LlNlPOGnvGXL428eRr4oPMeaBl4ERymUvcq108215YolpAZcOMdx5ToKZBAV1An96NOJ_sE2G2rxtsP2YSikvBq8EXJYZjcwdLr1nBsqTXRujHi1eELbAc-K3cLK0Xb7b-RnZkNDn6QkKUNBwfbK9Zb_WR2spLXrld0W37z5FuSW1TL&c=zhKoueZgdWPxuvSnh1hkshnTxLf6JU6_cdYWwMbxUTjSnVbc5sl3-w==&ch=EV9o1fZjQBsBmMv9KVsGMffyOomaPP_k0gUt_gRp9-8dj2stB-iL_w==)
---
| Patriot, I recently joined Jeff and Bill to talk about my friend Charlie Kirk. You can view my interview here: [Watch Now!](https://udmlh9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v3DXt99oENQTcvgP6LlNlPOGnvGXL428eRr4oPMeaBl4ERymUvcq108215YolpAZcOMdx5ToKZBAV1An96NOJ_sE2G2rxtsP2YSikvBq8EXJYZjcwdLr1nBsqTXRujHi1eELbAc-K3cLK0Xb7b-RnZkNDn6QkKUNBwfbK9Zb_WRuzkZBDOZOd1T-YN8AJEKc&c=zhKoueZgdWPxuvSnh1hkshnTxLf6JU6_cdYWwMbxUTjSnVbc5sl3-w==&ch=EV9o1fZjQBsBmMv9KVsGMffyOomaPP_k0gUt_gRp9-8dj2stB-iL_w==)
Our friend Charlie Kirk's death has left a void in all of our hearts, but especially ours here at Team Imer.
Charlie Kirk was the inspiration behind our organization. His efforts to increase young voter turnout, engage the next generation, encourage free thought and expression, and, most importantly, call on the next generation to live their lives for God and Family are the cornerstones of our organization.
Laurel and I share tremendous sorrow at the loss of our friend CK, but we must not let this grief and sorrow diminish our resolve.
Knowing Charlie for nearly 10 years will be one of the greatest honors of my lifetime. Charlie saw something in me at a very young age, encouraged me, lifted me up, and gave me the opportunity to get involved in Turning Point USA.
Throughout my years with Turning Point, I learned from the best of the best on how to engage the next generation, how to mobilize, activate, and win.
Now, as we reflect on the void left by Charlie, we are all called to step into that empty space and move the torch down the field in his name.
Charlie Kirk was the best of us. Charlie was the architect of one of the most significant movements of our time, and this is the Turning Point in America.
As we move forward from this tremendous loss, we remain resolute in our commitment to safeguarding the American Dream for future generations and to being a beacon of goodness in the world.
In some small way, we intend to help fill the void left by the monument that is Charlie's legacy, and we call on everyone in the Conservative movement to step up and do the same.
Charlie's death is a wake-up call. A wake-up call to end the division, the hatred, the animosity, the backstabbing, and the political games.
We must unify in Charlie's name, forgive and forget, and work towards our shared goal of protecting the next generation from facing extinction at the hands of the radical left that perpetrated this heinous act of violence.
We ask you all to continue to pray for Charlie's family, Erika and their two young children, the Turning Point Family, Charlie's friends, and most importantly, our country.
This act of terror at the hands of a homegrown extremist has torn at the fabric of our republic, but as President Trump so boldly said,
"In America, we take blows, but we never buckle. We bleed, but we do not bow. We defy the fear, endure the flames, and emerge from every hardship. Stronger, prouder, and greater than ever before."
In Charlie's name, we will continue to stoke the flame of liberty, and we ask that you stand with us as we move forward in the wake of this terrible tragedy.
CK, we love you, we miss you, and we have the watch from here.
In Liberty,
---

name: Voter Action Project Registration Team
subject: This would make a huge difference in our upcoming elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We can't stress this enough: For less than the price of a latte at your local coffee shop, you can help cover the costs of registering a new voter.
We have to start now to be ready for next year's elections. RUSH $24 or more today and help us register a tidal wave of new voters nationwide >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091225_1&amount=24]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091225_1&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091225_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091225_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091225_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091225_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091225_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091225_1&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. Please, can you pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters ahead of this year's registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091225_1&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091225_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091225_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=M5EQH4IcViHe7k8kX7ES%2FDzQBWYEtF%2FcpU9YyIZgkOqGsQcLOnYPNd8ajyjnZsmF0e3hF6V%2BDEtcVNiZ7b22WrJfJYQ696K1XiaENBIlLtIFZpiBq%2FEPhhA4HN1e03yjNHeIFsZHKf5gcqAJ0UP1emG4pFsJEQfDQCU0cXdQ7SPYsHpui0AmbP%2B0M2ycpjg%2FcX5hwb9elOxt8HF3xx03K0VPk%2FREl3VT79D10uxxlzyu25lPmrK%2BCtG1OsvJlyQ4HxC5JD1PB8jR6fhN18x2%2BvQ7Z1FDGskNi5IIinW8PWJ7HnCoSlVRCJIm%2B8l4CEYEoodBLYn%2ByWU35PDBQjBhCwK%2BGIL8SEPvVWA25mxas8ESWg7MAheYdsRwuXnQm1qKA2LBV8pKtIhgCSAy9PNHMH2DMnEkwseUhnhSvqHtJ%2BU%3D .

subject: No more magic money — we need real funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | It’s mid-September, Peter, and Pennsylvania still doesn’t have a state budget, even though it was due more than 70 days ago. **That means we STILL do not have funding for mass transit across the Commonwealth,** as well as for schools, libraries, and much more. [**Without action from Harrisburg, our transit systems face higher fares, fewer routes, and unsafe conditions. Take a moment to urge Governor Shapiro and state legislators to provide the long-term funding Pennsylvanians need for reliable transit.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-w6S7BTdKS-lKrNbXd09UbEFxHHQ9oO6XQxWp3QhiPstxAfO5BjDNTsHzMRIYLQ2v4nn6D4zoYAiG42PWjejB2Wnquv-VFdPwE0wb42yqYHh-nedhqP7aOjN02JVrzWAESvqmhN6zZAXTxn1MZZ4N2g5tUtoFFxVRFLkwq3NhmGt-xzYkhpglchDgB9e5zsBralsxAmTsgwA0tsAEvRXiVaGVnVQ20G_1Yi1NgQ3hl0unv5ie4bH-4bC6XTCsF_ijlnnS_FvPfig4xDZ7Td05BqGRnSCIrPiBjhHXInW73-Md3t9zCgbEpMtquw3cTRj4k07sUimh3CbjoeoCjLtsfDpnIY-UUoHbm06ebLlvD7SM1U5gCb-BADraclb-a00s/4ju/E8C6SgtLQz-S_vvm_IEJNg/h0/h001.Ak3vqi2nDxLx3q2G9dvyocl1GTBYk-zPIYxrXZHOHJs) **[Sign the letter »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-w6S7BTdKS-lKrNbXd09UbEFxHHQ9oO6XQxWp3QhiPstxAfO5BjDNTsHzMRIYLQ2v4nn6D4zoYAiG42PWjejB2Wnquv-VFdPwE0wb42yqYHh-nedhqP7aOjN02JVrzWAESvqmhN6zZAXTxn1MZZ4N2g5tUtoFFxVRFLkwq3NhmGt-xzYkhpglchDgB9e5zsBqkLP--BR2iz91SJPsucge7tABV_B_6z-o_sAJwVRppAt8muJezGumJ_8I6kCHtRQa2adN5C3kjIJolgz2ufw8u-gOyuAvIYWaKfWV88Yr7eATNBs31pA0rfvZ03Oj34AvTmXRH45G3xa69EW5YOOYOIHJyf3V-J-ziSt3QQ1HW0r5oq1UxMBK52KA4y__4Cu0/4ju/E8C6SgtLQz-S_vvm_IEJNg/h1/h001.07rXTkm7M046vShlAWneMY71lnwqD-9xp5sEQD4POtg)** Earlier this week, Governor Shapiro approved SEPTA’s request to raid its critical capital funds — money meant for repairs, safety and accessibility improvements — just to prevent immediate service cuts, and Pittsburgh Regional Transit (PRT) is likely to follow suit. Let’s be clear, Peter: **using funds meant for _maintenance_ and _upgrades_ to cover _daily operations_ puts the future of our transit systems at risk — and everyday riders will pay the price.** For SEPTA and PRT, this move only delays the inevitable budget crisis. For the many smaller transit agencies across Pennsylvania’s 67 counties, there is no big capital fund to fall back on — which means service cuts and fare hikes are coming, fast. **Pennsylvania will not escape this crisis unscathed. We need a permanent, reliable funding solution now.** When money for maintenance, infrastructure, and vehicles is siphoned off for daily operations, riders pay twice: in the short term and long term. Delays will pile up as aging equipment is neglected and takes longer to replace. Accessibility upgrades, like elevators in subway stations, will be kicked down the road. And transformative investments to improve speed, reliability, and vehicle fleets, will go unfunded. **Meanwhile, SEPTA is still raising fares — for the second time this year!** A bus ride now costs riders nearly a dollar more than it did just a year ago. Everyday people are _paying_ for Harrisburg’s inaction. **The status quo is unacceptable. We need to keep up the pressure.** ****[**Click here to send a letter to your legislators and Governor Shapiro demanding revenue and long term funding for Pennsylvania transit and more.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-w6S7BTdKS-lKrNbXd09UbEFxHHQ9oO6XQxWp3QhiPstxAfO5BjDNTsHzMRIYLQ2v4nn6D4zoYAiG42PWjejB2Wnquv-VFdPwE0wb42yqYHh-nedhqP7aOjN02JVrzWAESvqmhN6zZAXTxn1MZZ4N2g5tUtoFFxVRFLkwq3NhmGt-xzYkhpglchDgB9e5zsBp326eDQh3A2aDTx-_IH-_tITEmIQ_AVVm85fpYhPBSujquxWdoUF3lbjBwjNo9KSa2uak0w3ocsS2B3KLktqMXvzaZCIbl9v3XsR1XMBhJo71gOmsHoP7SEJs4ZO71a0FXMwC7xiRqT5RjjExcfuVKxGsJuzNj01iWDuT--8pHyqpYJ0Fm6QPkm-x6iOE7--U/4ju/E8C6SgtLQz-S_vvm_IEJNg/h2/h001.ZcuLCD0N_MCPhI72MfiqhPwuJsK0JYdh7Ye3BMEpYVI) clean_body: | | | It’s mid-September, Peter, and Pennsylvania still doesn’t have a state budget, even though it was due more than 70 days ago. That means we STILL do not have funding for mass transit across the Commonwealth, as well as for schools, libraries, and much more. Earlier this week, Governor Shapiro approved SEPTA’s request to raid its critical capital funds — money meant for repairs, safety and accessibility improvements — just to prevent immediate service cuts, and Pittsburgh Regional Transit (PRT) is likely to follow suit. Let’s be clear, Peter: using funds meant for maintenance and upgrades to cover daily operations puts the future of our transit systems at risk — and everyday riders will pay the price. For SEPTA and PRT, this move only delays the inevitable budget crisis. For the many smaller transit agencies across Pennsylvania’s 67 counties, there is no big capital fund to fall back on — which means service cuts and fare hikes are coming, fast. Pennsylvania will not escape this crisis unscathed. We need a permanent, reliable funding solution now. When money for maintenance, infrastructure, and vehicles is siphoned off for daily operations, riders pay twice: in the short term and long term. Delays will pile up as aging equipment is neglected and takes longer to replace. Accessibility upgrades, like elevators in subway stations, will be kicked down the road. And transformative investments to improve speed, reliability, and vehicle fleets, will go unfunded. Meanwhile, SEPTA is still raising fares — for the second time this year! A bus ride now costs riders nearly a dollar more than it did just a year ago. Everyday people are paying for Harrisburg’s inaction. The status quo is unacceptable. We need to keep up the pressure. ** In solidarity, Team PAWFP Become a Working Families Party Member!** Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My op-ed in Time Magazine
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read this.
#

Friends: after this week’s assassination of Charlie Kirk, I wrote an op-ed for TIME Magazine discussing the alarming rise of politically -motivated attacks and the need to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
We may never be able to eliminate all gun violence. But we must realize that all gun violence is preventable.
I’ve attached the op-ed below. Thank you for reading.
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250912-1-b&t=1&akid=10868%2E3935704%2EupJER6)**

* * *
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250912-1-b&t=2&akid=10868%2E3935704%2EupJER6)
**Gabby Giffords:I Mourn for Charlie Kirk’s Family**
September 2025
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250912-1-b&t=3&akid=10868%2E3935704%2EupJER6)
---
I mourn for Charlie Kirk’s family.
I didn’t agree with almost anything he said, but he had a right to speak. Just as he had a right to go on a work trip and return safely to his wife and two young children at home in the state we share, Arizona.
Just as Melissa Hortman, the Speaker of the Minnesota State Legislature, deserved to be safe at home with her husband and her dog. Instead they were all three shot dead together one night in June.
Just as President Donald Trump had the right to campaign without fear of being assassinated, as two different people tried to do last summer.
Just as I had the right to meet with my constituents safely on January 8, 2011 — the day when instead I, a young congresswoman in a purple district, was nearly assassinated. Eighteen other people were shot and six were killed.
Our stories are unique, but what Charlie Kirk, President Trump, Melissa Hortman and I all have in common is that someone who wanted to kill us had a gun.
We can and should talk about political violence, and its toxic relationship to political rhetoric. We can and must talk about social media’s role in these moments. We all, as individual Americans, need to do a better job considering our words and their impact. But anyone who responds to preventable tragedies like this—tragedies that over time begin to erode the very fabric of our country—by refusing to face the problem of gun violence and crime head-on is missing the point.
What we share, and what puts all of us in danger—from elected leaders to little children, like those shot while praying in church in Minnesota a few weeks ago—is the overwhelming prevalence of guns in this country and the loopholes that make it appallingly easy for dangerous people to access them.
In America, we now have more guns than people. Many states take sensible steps—background checks, extreme risk protection orders, and safe storage laws—all policies that help reduce gun crime and gun deaths. Other states—like Utah, which year after year receives a F grade in the annual Gun Law Scorecard released by my organization, GIFFORDS—do far too little to save lives. Utah has expanded gun access in recent years, and gun deaths have increased along with that, soaring by 45% from 2014 to 2023, according to the CDC.
I was gutted to learn that Charlie Kirk died yesterday in Utah—and it’s also true that in Utah, someone dies from gun violence every 20 hours. Too many families know the pain of having a loved one killed by guns, in that state and across the country.
In fact, mere hours after Kirk’s shooting, at least two students were shot at a high school in Evergreen, Colorado.
Americans of both political parties desperately want this violence to end. Our research suggests that the vast majority of Republican voters want to close loopholes that allow criminals and dangerous people to get their hands on guns. When you ask parents what they want most for their children’s education, they tell us again and again that keeping their kids safe from gun violence is their top priority. The American people are far more united than their representatives in Washington. Our polling shows 88% of Republicans support background checks on all gun sales, 75% support laws to get untraceable ghost guns off the streets, and a surprising 81% support requiring a license to own a gun (just like Americans need licenses to drive cars). Yet somehow Congress refuses to act.
It is physically very hard for me to speak due to my injuries from the bullets that hit me that day in January, and after watching yet another political shooting violently steal someone’s life before our eyes, it’s even harder to find words. So I want to speak plainly to my former colleagues in Congress, both the House and the Senate: Do something. Take action. Pray also if you want, but understand: your job is action. Nobody goes to the polls to elect someone to pray for them. We vote because we trust the people we elect will pass sensible, moderate policies that make our country a better, safer place to live and raise a family.
We may never be able to eliminate all gun violence. But we must realize that all gun violence is preventable. We know what to do to make our country safer for all of us, and our elected representatives can do it immediately. Come to the table, as Republicans and Democrats, to pass solutions to the epidemic of gun violence that’s killing both of us. There’s no shortage of policies with a history of bipartisan support: closing background check loopholes, supporting violence intervention programs, funding law enforcement—including the brave agents at the ATF who catch violent criminals and crack down on the small percentage of gun dealers who break the law—among many others. Above all: prioritize American lives over the donations and profits of gun industry CEOs.
When I was shot, my friend Judge John Roll was killed. He was a Republican. We didn’t always agree, but we still worked together for the good of our state. Also killed was Christina-Taylor Green. She was only nine years old and had just been elected Class President at her elementary school. Their families will never be whole again, just as the Kirk family will never be whole again, and I hold them all in my heart.
I call on my colleagues in Washington to show courage, not cowardice. I call on them to show loyalty to our country and our common values, and to do the single most important thing they can for their constituents: keep them safe.
* * *

Please, take a second to read this...
As a victim of political violence, Gabby Giffords has led the fight to save more lives from gun violence for more than a decade, but she can’t do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to pass commonsense gun safety legislation across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/61660?c0=giffords-em-sep25.Kx2kIW&refcode=em250912-1-b&t=4&akid=10868%2E3935704%2EupJER6)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=10868%2E3935704%2EupJER6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: James Talarico
subject: I’ve made a decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
After a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision...
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf)
Peter —
I’ve heard from a lot of Texans this summer. And after a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate.
**[I’m asking you to make one of the first donations to my campaign. Split it between my campaign and Heartland Patriots. This is a massive undertaking, and it would mean the world to me to know you have my back.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf)**
Right now, there’s something broken in America. Our economy is broken. Our politics are broken. Even our relationships with each other feel broken.
**That’s because the most powerful people in the world want it that way.**
The biggest divide in America is not left versus right — it’s top versus bottom.
Billionaires want us looking left and right at each other instead of looking up at them.
The people at the top work so hard to keep us angry and divided because our unity is a threat to their wealth and power. So their cable news networks and their social media algorithms tear us apart.
They divide us by party, by race, by gender, by religion so we don’t notice they’re defunding our schools, gutting our healthcare, and cutting taxes for themselves and their rich friends.
It’s the oldest strategy in the world: divide and conquer. But we will not be conquered.
**The fight ahead will not be easy. We’re the underdogs.**
We’re going up against these billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. We’re going up against a rigged system. And we’re going up against a lot of money.
But I’m a former middle school teacher — I don’t scare easily. And Texans don’t scare easily.
**Big Money is powerful, but it's nothing compared to people power.**
That’s why this is going to be a campaign fueled by people like you. I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I refuse to start now. So I need you with me.
**[Please split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Heartland Patriots today to become a Founding Donor. We need as many people as possible chipping in on day one to prove our movement is strong enough.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to James Talarico and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250912-9403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9403%2E614464%2E8Q8Atf)

We're going to make history, and we're going to do it together.
Let’s go.
James

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I made a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now.

name: James Talarico
subject: $5 to take back Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
$5. That’s my ask, Peter.
If you’re fired up and can afford to give, you can add your donation here: [**https://jamestalarico.com/FoundingDonor**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250910-1&t=1&akid=35%2E1347274%2EE4vPXp)
I know we’ve asked a lot already, and I promise it won’t be like this every day.
I hope you take it as a sign of just how important it is to start this campaign strong. Please understand that your $5 really matters.
$5 to help us recruit thousands of organizers and volunteers to register and turn out voters.
$5 to keep me on the road so I can go everywhere and talk to everyone across Texas.
$5 because nobody can win a race like this alone — especially not in a state as big as Texas.
[**Please use this link to donate $5 or whatever you can spare to our campaign. What matters most is that as many people as possible chip in within the first few days.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250910-1&t=2&akid=35%2E1347274%2EE4vPXp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

We’re going up against the political establishment, billionaire mega-donors, and a whole lot of money — but if we do this together, I know we’ll have what it takes.
We will take back Texas. We will take back the Senate majority. And we will take back power for working people.
Thanks for being a part of this fight.
James

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m proud to be running for reelection, Peter.
body:
Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250912-2?refcode=em-20250912-2&refcode2=612_1086043_wSnpKz&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)
Hey, Peter – it’s Wes Moore.
I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me: **I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland.**
Our work to make this Maryland’s decade is just getting started, and I’m incredibly grateful to have your support in this race. Now, can you take the next step to support my reelection campaign?
**[Would you please make a contribution of $5 – or any amount that feels right to you – to my campaign? I can’t win this race without you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250912-2?refcode=em-20250912-2&refcode2=612_1086043_wSnpKz&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250912-2?amount=5&refcode=em-20250912-2&refcode2=612_1086043_wSnpKz&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)**
Over the past three years, we’ve made tremendous strides to support Maryland families. From ensuring our children receive a world-class education, to building pathways to good jobs, to lowering taxes for the middle class, I couldn’t be prouder of how far we’ve come together.
But these past couple weeks have made one thing crystal clear: **Republicans are already gearing up to take my seat in 2026.**
They’re afraid of the results we’ve delivered for Maryland. From public safety improvements to funding public education, our opponents are trying to roll it all back.
But here’s what they don’t know: I will always stand up for Maryland. If they want to tear down our accomplishments, _let them try._
Peter, that’s why I need you with me. In order to stay in this fight, I’m asking for your early support as we launch our reelection so we can keep delivering results for Maryland.
**[Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way. I’d be so grateful if you’d make a $5 donation to my campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250912-2?refcode=em-20250912-2&refcode2=612_1086043_wSnpKz&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250912-2?amount=5&refcode=em-20250912-2&refcode2=612_1086043_wSnpKz&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)**
Elevate,
Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250912-2&t=2&refcode2=612_1086043_wSnpKz&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=612%2E1086043%2EwSnpKz)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Hi, it's **Brigadier General (Ret.) Shawn Harris**. I led troops in combat overseas--never in my life did I think I'd have to fight to keep our military from being used against our own people here at home. But Donald Trump keeps pushing this dangerous idea--and Marjorie Taylor Greene cheers him on every step of the way. Troops should _never_ be used against American citizens. Period. I'm running for Congress to stop her, defend our Constitution, and make sure our military is never turned into a political weapon. We're building momentum, but MTG's big donors are flooding her with cash. [**Can you rush a contribution right now so we can take the fight to her? Every $15, $25, or $50 gets us closer to ending this embarrassment for our district.**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/dZWQSa_8Bw5ixnsA_62K0A~~/AAPPABA~/CRnH2-1xGMQz1OIhgHAEBLS7MSj72uxsdutRCWDorRYxQT-m2T_Tgm-nOxsp7fa8XlQfNepmvlxQJLs2Nto7xE-mQKlAQj3btuLudY6mXyNluEuUv6GYgd49d-d5tjBHnQIl5I5-OFTf75Z-n7osj4o3-iHuFGl86Ale1I2uJRci9qkCvhQmi6VrMAMXE2r7jtj7lYE0WSqZF_jT27DKEFep__CnClcXFZfm1bupyYy1QvbIuLUYD_QSOoc5Ii9yUeuqGAHaQdKoNaKNLDmT1yvLTtDc80dWt5-8BviTGJtH7YWtGKuiwq2xzzhUrF2k)

subject: For the first time ever…
body:
SRHR is recognized as a human right | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115092569/569161584/2141984067?sourceid=1150869&utm_campaign=26emcgl-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=srhr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDA4ZGI1ZS1lZThmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VKGeIenqqn9GyofN-Qlus7w6U1sXsAsbkwTAANsYz0=&emci=e4a2e258-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3008db5e-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115092570/569161585/2141984067?sourceid=1150869&utm_campaign=26emcgl-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=srhr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDA4ZGI1ZS1lZThmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VKGeIenqqn9GyofN-Qlus7w6U1sXsAsbkwTAANsYz0=&emci=e4a2e258-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3008db5e-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)
---|---
Dear Peter,

We're thrilled to share a groundbreaking victory: the United Nations (UN) Human Rights Council adopted a resolution that— _for the first time ever_ —explicitly recognizes sexual and reproductive health and rights (SRHR) as human rights.

[**This historic step comes after weeks of intense negotiations and represents one of the most significant advancements in UN human rights standards _in the last 30 years._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115092571/569161586/2141984067?sourceid=1150869&utm_campaign=26emcgl-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=srhr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDA4ZGI1ZS1lZThmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VKGeIenqqn9GyofN-Qlus7w6U1sXsAsbkwTAANsYz0=&emci=e4a2e258-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3008db5e-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Led by Canada and adopted by consensus, the resolution focuses on ending violence against women and girls through the fulfillment of economic, social, and cultural rights. Significantly, it includes the concept of sexual rights and recognizes them as human rights, applying this standard to women and girls without exception. It also reaffirms the right to bodily autonomy and the right to sexual and reproductive health.

[**At every stage, our Geneva team worked closely with Member States to secure strong SRHR language and counter anti-rights efforts to weaken human rights commitments, providing technical expertise and mobilizing support at the highest levels.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115092572/569161587/2141984067?sourceid=1150869&utm_campaign=26emcgl-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=srhr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDA4ZGI1ZS1lZThmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VKGeIenqqn9GyofN-Qlus7w6U1sXsAsbkwTAANsYz0=&emci=e4a2e258-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3008db5e-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Despite efforts by anti-rights actors to dilute the language, all hostile amendments were defeated—a powerful testament to the strength of our global movement and the importance of collaboration between civil society and Member States. This marks not only a significant advancement in global human rights standards, but also a clear political commitment to making these rights a reality for _all._

[**At a time when fundamental rights are under attack around the world, this win is a beacon of progress and possibility. The resolution not only sets a new global standard; it affirms that the fight for gender equality, dignity, and freedom is far from over, and that together, we can win.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115092573/569161588/2141984067?sourceid=1150869&utm_campaign=26emcgl-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=srhr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDA4ZGI1ZS1lZThmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VKGeIenqqn9GyofN-Qlus7w6U1sXsAsbkwTAANsYz0=&emci=e4a2e258-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3008db5e-ee8f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Join us in celebrating this major milestone—and let's keep pushing forward.

With gratitude,

Enid Muthoni Ndiga

clean_body: SRHR is recognized as a human right | | | ---|--- Dear Peter, We're thrilled to share a groundbreaking victory: the United Nations (UN) Human Rights Council adopted a resolution that— for the first time ever —explicitly recognizes sexual and reproductive health and rights (SRHR) as human rights. Led by Canada and adopted by consensus, the resolution focuses on ending violence against women and girls through the fulfillment of economic, social, and cultural rights. Significantly, it includes the concept of sexual rights and recognizes them as human rights, applying this standard to women and girls without exception. It also reaffirms the right to bodily autonomy and the right to sexual and reproductive health. Despite efforts by anti-rights actors to dilute the language, all hostile amendments were defeated—a powerful testament to the strength of our global movement and the importance of collaboration between civil society and Member States. This marks not only a significant advancement in global human rights standards, but also a clear political commitment to making these rights a reality for all. Join us in celebrating this major milestone—and let's keep pushing forward. With gratitude, Enid Muthoni Ndiga Chief Program Officer, Global Advocacy & Regional Programs | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

body:
Considering recent events, this interview will probably be swept under the rug. But we need still need to call it out. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1XOzWwI8x0oGi4eBneQTXneidWO2-tL1NSSiRhkFhjpk4g_tQ8O0GxPyx8_qKe2J41EuYEV8XADJGetXKTH4MgzImImkmT2FKxqG2mOu9R3-iLARDM2ytsSMiM21pQBMNoxKX0W_xw6mLqIrFpmRnezkuDVglesv79Ov0TUXeXuExmGuo7zKtwE8NdCkvbxaZzgDciIGgDAnRGeVri-rPgqOBFPuSU1hAVEOuddQ3-L_RCJGx1m9c7x3xdmh16C9_MecVu6bJ3dOxM7GPppjYiTMB-B-5mvgf7oPjfKHEgLDyFWPWT0tVLDjHW51A_pzIw/4ju/144dUntwRqaiX_iucH-1bw/h0/h001.aMnbTNHbIkZ-AhgMWBhfKuMu3MMeHubNQkMS3cksKpA)

Friends, Donald Trump isn't hiding it anymore. He's bragging about unchecked power -- and it's terrifying. In a Friday morning interview, he said: **_" We have actually more power in DC. I can change the mayor if I want. I can do whatever I want."_** **_" One thing I say is we have to have quick trials. I called it quick trial. 'Cause in China they do have quick trials, you know? ... They should have a trial the following day."_**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1XOzWwI8x0oGi4eBneQTXneXeKOwNkIai5awY3rto7rC4djIi7NCptzThXlASNSw3fBztJgPxXI6mIJZlxh0Qz2T22bOzff82Ab2OiqlcJMDl7RHzZh7OkSmGseO6Vdy-QJadbuwT8W6cGMZT_-Sdt5mf4j16ROhRztKHvXYSEcnAJ9Q3epqV0Z6NdGZ0ZpCl7s2XUFNsbPeWA9Eyh-H2TLWH1csS4G-F-1OneJ1wL7OJB20EVORyhHX_4Snj-2rSg7NBCBQWcKJclNkv9oIySNZyDp2uiOq95goDvMZttpUW7goyOxN1wuAQOardwS4UQ/4ju/144dUntwRqaiX_iucH-1bw/h1/h001.qPN4n2swVVj-xCtO3Zy_lR4LInvFhIQ68-hve4w8zxA)

**Let 's be clear: this is authoritarianism in plain sight.** **_He 's claiming he could remove an elected mayor at will. He's fantasizing about fast-tracking trials like China -- eliminating due process and shredding the Constitution._** These moments are getting buried in this week's insane news cycle, but we cannot look away. We have to make sure EVERYONE sees this. The slow coup is speeding up -- and Trump is openly laying out his dictatorship playbook. [**No Dem Left Behind is fighting back with everything we 've got. We're investing in the toughest races -- places where democracy is under siege and MAGA thinks no one's watching. But we can't do this alone. clean_body: Considering recent events, this interview will probably be swept under the rug. But we need still need to call it out. | | Friends, Donald Trump isn't hiding it anymore. He's bragging about unchecked power -- and it's terrifying. In a Friday morning interview, he said: " We have actually more power in DC. I can change the mayor if I want. I can do whatever I want." " One thing I say is we have to have quick trials. I called it quick trial. 'Cause in China they do have quick trials, you know? ... They should have a trial the following day." | Let 's be clear: this is authoritarianism in plain sight. He 's claiming he could remove an elected mayor at will. He's fantasizing about fast-tracking trials like China -- eliminating due process and shredding the Constitution. These moments are getting buried in this week's insane news cycle, but we cannot look away. We have to make sure EVERYONE sees this. The slow coup is speeding up -- and Trump is openly laying out his dictatorship playbook. This fight is real. This fight is now. And grassroots support is the only thing standing between Trump's dictatorship-in-waiting and a functioning democracy. In the fight, No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . body:
It’s World Suicide Prevention Day, a reminder that too many of us have been impacted by the tragedy of suicide. | | | [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/SeykASVjZ9NOaPjopSHKHtgOn4MhreDndgvNlyIOaEFtdiHKRcywh3Fv7Obndh3rcvhItPDyjSoFWeVQpHvdENhzWH79a_XZqWLr5zmv6oXvS-7b3sC9-Yn9OqUett4cU-Eg7ZEBKRu8zDd4yYoNiAPitR0kE1UjG0OLetHqNYC_37eEDNv568e6o8GbMXxsYxs4R3a1FC04__ApNVzDBOFtqflLU3sl5etukiUR87eG9A8wu9_xGLDObLIEGHTVKxeRCBmEW9SZ1JrfZ0b4krvC6KkiGeq_G009YVWBM-UievJlyoL7o3bQDGBy4MHPi3zeUfbkYDChY4oxyLnFwZwApGXGlevXdzOAih-n9st4cFiW7ZxGKUnYw66_IRpUCb3YgHZ7myi3awKMW8uPgipUSrQMDCiy-D6OI07eB1A4RD6L4WaVhgud-BreuVv2nBV9C9E6RrVlhw6Z_d77bLr_B_STRrKehSzySGMP9JnCkrgvLKm2ZHa6Uin2zH8XYgzCM13lAnkNFW3v6CLkzCYybaKJIEHYCHmGUxY3tsuyCkSFy208SKLWhVqnkZ67wL7Dnn21lMBvY-infbB_yavW4ubErAHCF7dRid_PwF_GRA5MqEUB6dPYwA1PttvXPGebA395RftDYEQQU5lbb3TzsCUOL7WZhXfuGgV2aDkqF0cZj51CAmojjHn1arr94rD6lFxMfB3eX7ibvG2EuW4w4R_2H5dfB7wlPqQavt2eLAXCwhdwcG0DddcqvZvDoAaJ-JQ9V6C5qkgsLseKuAZT_BEDrP297IUu9ipE9SsV72VMTqGdihcfSF8NPBxKsPY-cnrS_p4Fh5eKdE4RemkGSzPQ4ZEv1IkE4kvUMxnZzS2MLy_xqnIA6dsbjM5YY-nabuucmCgZ8n09_jORAzmax9-kbBt85bZx9WPFnn-inhiRlU1gkKEW/s9cc5iiWvF_qnhhAPRx6zHMDk2clG9H_/12) Peter, On Wednesday, we recognized World Suicide Prevention Day, a reminder that too many of us have been impacted by the tragedy of suicide. Throughout my time in Colorado’s General Assembly, I've fought for mental health resources and worked to ensure that every Coloradan, no matter who they are, has access to the support they need. **I co-sponsored a bill that made us the _first state in the country_ to require insurers to cover annual mental wellness exams just as they do annual physicals.** That’s why I'm devastated by the Trump administration’s recent elimination of specialized support on the 988 national suicide prevention hotline for young LGBTQ+ callers. **However, please know that Colorado's call-takers are trained to support LGBTQ+ youth. You can still reach the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline anytime by calling or texting 988.** **For additional specialized support, The Trevor Project offers 24/7 crisis support at 1-866-488-7386.** Make sure to check in with the people around you. Share these resources with those in need. Sometimes a simple 'how are you doing?’ can go a long way to getting those we care about the help they need. _You are not alone._ Brianna Follow Brianna Online: [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/d4AYQyBbE8M62jpQzL0KeehqDafywN7sF0lg-aur5Bmk6xjwvzp-5DoxSzTflPVHYwfA6Sawrm8eTMSQ6P88PudwjifratAdAYSRYZU8dF-LHMlnGG-Oc_uCwwaspoReT6zm2nRhlrjb9fd_Rnpul9g7jR_4SfOPscVqAKYTZ_cTfJw69aKsMwbrg-DN9FbVRO6NKopaeNb2bc5g1du2nby0ONRhH0eA65di3k_jlM-x0AnUBPM8AMShz9d86qP68oL-GSJliWtXH168CboMHLL0UqmGJ6BpIlentnilo0nFUuN1CSzqaCOCVLN9VmWk7wN2RSCxdcIyYttbuk2OQvuoeqL7liEBhyn-K8dpb1iep9Th7PqQWAWFQh8j1WnChr6HtYZH__4pMgIkTdUg2IwVU-bmN7MIwZQsSCmLF-TsQsehfQ/Uir5f-Ktg18YRmxGcdPtWnW8ujtnk4hB/12) Patriot,

First, Beto O’Rourke mobilized his political group to raise money and hold rallies to prop up the derelict House Democrats who abandoned their jobs.

Now, he’s laying the groundwork and plotting the Left’s biggest play in Texas yet!
**[“I’m going to do whatever I can to raise money, register voters and turn them out in November.”](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=4b015bdaef8a436b9fd2d955daa5d10a&_e=8d46vKdwKqvaDWfF2ael4fh5t1mU0h3-G4zKRhosc9ylLhz0Zw6hTc5lRCmsngodChgzyoA05HY2BEsZ2Pm7bjXRDnSiHmJzpDam6ruJ-tONXaDPAV581oebE2ipKduWJmiMvAtfsWwx7Dr8dB5ItvyKpNG-XGlNePS0UthxOwIrp9hjLWP5WGZTk88_J3K-leV5k2UKFoEPpj78zt-dXWPK1JTCD0Lp-V_cHqVBERdTCtZigQUeuv09VWKcPHuaP-_BOYnEZHMpStRhsQj2Uv_eizx9Jb_SEm4nMD2YuJvD0g-zoPAb9pcT2UYuGewsesDOagiGqOuHUE2rdhIg014flxYOm86RlGGAaYy5jZHegkV_NT_nY28mugOh6cvnwehrXb0lvHIwg73xvKWiJfiOLUhmhuesheIr56aN-yQvpyamhfKkmZL9KrFlSQ5JVfqkQDsbe4MDiaYX_ezam6Frs9ZJuA5NSVaEbCCWoxMBL9gweVUB-obgVNqx-6DX6zRrMU1OppHxofB7qfdAYGDexCjJpnqeM_K_PUCvFhrNc1gHoPCdm1r2b-VICPNIOLlTJNyJVv7PfwxAJ8OFzP87EtBEyx0HeBOsHMeoGx-ULDWI7krq-BtMLNO2NpphstWRjzR6JfJetHfJOGmbpEkxMdzthb4KhQVbiyWTzx2KBr65ZU-uzVo6TlMN63mi)
\- Beto O’Rourke**
_**They have the funding.

They have allies in the national media.

And they have an army of activists and out-of-state megadonors pouring resources into Texas.**_

Together, we’re building a campaign that reflects the values of hard work, fairness, and justice for all.
