clean_body: This is personal. | | | = Derek, As I travel across Virginia and talk to voters and constituents – there’s something that comes up over and over again: Just about everyone is impacted in some way by Donald Trump’s gutting of Medicaid, the skyrocketing cost of health care, or the reckless cuts to our nation’s premier medical research. And let me tell you: It’s personal for me too. During the last years of my mother’s life, we watched her slow and difficult fight with Alzheimer’s disease. For 11 years she lived with the disease, and nine of those years, she couldn't speak. \------------------ Frankly, it’s something I don’t talk about often because it was just an awful disease and a difficult time for my family and me. But it’s a reality far too many Americans know well – and it’s why I was disgusted and heartbroken to watch the DOGE bros freeze, delay and cut funding for lifesaving dementia research. Lifesaving Alzheimer’s Research Delayed by Trump Funding Cuts: The Trump administration is freezing, delaying and revoking funding for dementia research, setting back discoveries of potential future treatment – Scientific American How many years of progress did we lose by Donald Trump’s reckless administration? How many more families will have to go through what my family went through? And when will enough be enough for my Republican colleagues? When will they stand up to the stupid, harmful policies of the Trump administration? \------------------ Every day in the Senate, I am fighting back against these dangerous policies – introducing legislation to repeal the health care provisions in the ‘Big, Ugly Bill’ and permanently extend the Affordable Care Act’s tax credits; fighting to expand health care and benefits for Virginia’s nearly 700,000 veterans; and speaking out about the administration’s cuts to health and science research. And I’ve pushed my friends across the aisle to vote with their conscience and stand up to Trump’s reckless agenda. Unfortunately, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather cave to Trump than stand up for their constituents. It’s why we’ve got to take back the Senate next year. It’s why I’m fighting like hell to hold onto this seat for Democrats next year and doing all that I can to support Democrats in Virginia and in critical races across the country. Thank you for being in this fight with us. More soon, Mark Warner Before you go: Mark Warner is leading the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable – but that could make his race a top Republican target next year. We need to be prepared for his toughest and most expensive reelection campaign yet. =****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Katie Porter
subject: What’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40133%2E3422442%2EvDMHTy)
Peter,
I’ve said from the start that our campaign for governor won’t be a walk in the park—and the past few weeks have proved it.
One of our opponents launched an attack ad against me, spending big money to tear down the movement we’re building to lower costs, defend health care, and stand up to Donald Trump.
**Here’s the truth:** our campaign is being targeted because I’m the Democratic frontrunner. Poll after poll has shown us in the lead—and gaining momentum fast.
But that could change on a dime. More wealthy candidates could jump in and flood the airwaves with ads. Republicans, already close behind in the polls, could lean on their super PACs to drown out our message.
We need to be ready. Reaching voters across California—on TV, online, and in every community—takes serious resources.
I’ve never shied away from a big fight, and right now the stakes could not be higher. California’s next governor has to be ready to take on Trump every time he goes after our state. I’m ready for that challenge, but I can’t do it alone.
Peter, can you help me build a campaign strong enough to stand up to the attacks and reach voters across California with a donation today?
Use this link to chip in: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250912_1_ak?refcode=em20250912-40133](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250912_1_ak?refcode=em20250912-40133&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40133_3422442_vDMHTy&akid=40133%2E3422442%2EvDMHTy)**
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250912-40133&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40133_3422442_vDMHTy&akid=40133%2E3422442%2EvDMHTy)**

name: Team Heidi Hall
subject: Picking fights with Adam Schiff?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250912_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250912_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Friend, Kevin Kiley will do literally anything to avoid actually doing his job and delivering on the issues that our communities have been yelling about for years—he'll even pick a fight with Senator Adam Schiff.
Kevin Kiley has made himself Trump's point man in the state and is putting all his attention into making sure that the Republican Party's majority in the House, and his seat in particular , stays safe. We can see through his politician-speak because this is all out of saving his political career.
Friend, our communities are tired of Kiley's pointless political posturing and do-nothing attitude.
If he were to show up to a town hall, he would know that we need someone in Congress who will fight relentlessly to protect our district from wildfires, provide us with the health care resources that we desperately need, and represent working-class families.
Instead, he voted for a nearly 44% reduction in wildfire suppression funding, voted to gut Medicaid (putting an even greater strain on rural hospitals like ours), and is at the beck and call of his wealthy D.C. donors and billionaires like Elon Musk.
Friend, it's time we unseated Kevin Kiley and elected a leader with a long record of delivering results. Will you chip in what you can to help us flip one of EMILYs List's "key 2026 flip targets" and elect Heidi Hall to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250912_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250912_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250912_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250912_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250912_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8973%2E5257348%2ExoY9C7 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I am alarmed
by Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s tenure as Secretary of Health and Human
Services.

People have lost confidence in the health leadership in the United States
because of people like RFK Jr.

He’s putting conspiracy theories ahead of science.

He’s gutting the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention — ousting the
head of the department and firing every member of the Advisory Committee
on Immunization Practices.

He’s replacing these doctors and scientists with anti-vaxxers and
conspiracy theorists.

We now have a CDC full of people we cannot trust to make sound
recommendations about our health and safety.

And the result is that Covid vaccines may be unavailable or unaffordable
for millions of Americans who need them. Already, there is uncertainty at
pharmacies about who can receive a vaccine and whether insurance companies
will pay for them. People are being turned away, and our healthcare is
suffering.

Former CDC directors, ranging from the Carter administration to Trump’s
first term, are speaking out against RFK Jr.’s changes.

Derek, we need to
fight back. Facts and science should be the basis for decision-making —
not dangerous conspiracy theories.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250912_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8973%2E5257348%2ExoY9C7 ]Help me respond to RFK Jr.’s lies and keep our communities safe. Pitch

clean_body: was really hoping it wouldn't come to this, Peter... I hate to tell you this, but I got word that we fell short of our CRUCIAL Fundraising Deadline Goal last night. This is a crushing blow. But I'm not about to quit on our movement, Peter. I've launched an internal extended deadline for the next ten minutes to give us one more shot at reaching this key Goal! Now, you have a choice. You can: Give up on our fight to keep Virginia red. The country will think conservatives aren't committed to building a better tomorrow for our nation and here in Virginia. completely counting on you! I know we can finally reach this Goal and close the MASSIVE fundraising gap between me and my Leftist opponent. don't ignore this request - I'm begging you. I can't thank you enough for your support, Peter. I can't wait to see your donation process. God bless,Winsome | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | | |

name: Haley Stevens
subject: a quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
we can flip the Senate, but we have to win in MI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5882?t=2&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)
---
Hi null, it’s Haley Stevens, and I have some important updates to share on our battleground Senate race in Michigan.

But first, we have a critical $150,000 fundraising goal coming up in three days, so I have to ask: **[Will you chip in $5 now to help us hit our goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5883?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)**
Alright. Here’s what’s going on with our must-win race – and what’s at stake:
🔍 **It’s all about Michigan:** Our race is rated a Toss Up by experts – meaning it could go either way – so what we do here in Michigan will likely decide control of the Senate.

🆚 **Polls don’t lie:** Multiple polls show I’m the best Democrat to beat my Republican opponent – including among independent voters, who could be THE deciding factor.

💸 **Big money:** Trump has formally endorsed my MAGA opponent and a GOP super PAC has already raised $5 million to try to buy this seat.
We can win this race, null. But the truth is, we need resources to fight back and reach voters all across the state.

**[Will you rush $5 now to help us hit our urgent $150,000 goal, fight back against Trump’s chaos agenda, and flip the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5883?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5884?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5885?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5886?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5887?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)
---
Thank you for standing with me. I’m grateful you’re on this team, null.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5888?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5882?t=10&akid=808%2E49239%2EDetTEd)

You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

You’re right, Republicans. Yet since summer recess ended and I got back to D.C., it seems like too many folks are asking why _Democrats_ are threatening to shut the government down. name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: September Statewide call Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Election Day is approaching!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_sep_call_invite&n=1)
---
| Join us September 15th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u9pL5MpT6VqtFQJKvKaK-Pv0usEvJWAodng1xp_Fl6hl2CdSPB3JPxJiFZLsBSsc6WQ2RTEo6kiNcYGKrK3lZ1Y&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_sep_call_invite&n=2) Election day is less than 2 months away. If you haven't researched the people running in your area, this is a great time to do it. There's still time to support a candidate you like or to mount a write in campaign of your own. Our communities and media are forgetting that all politics is local and these races are the foundation of our whole political system. Let's make this foundation a little stronger this year by getting involved in our communities. Maybe if we regularly saw examples of neighbors working though their disagreements through the political process, our national conversation could emulate that. Join our call Monday to share what you'd like to see.
### **2025 Elections**
We have endorsed candidates for races across the state, and more are on the way. Check out the link below for current and past endorsed candidates. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uzABh1W1uH2xRkdqrl5MmdduHYqLYJPChLV9rtPhvKsj5wshbg8fI0_4jcVHS2lzfw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_sep_call_invite&n=3 "Endorsed Candidates") [Endorsed Candidates](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uzABh1W1uH2xRkdqrl5MmdduHYqLYJPChLV9rtPhvKsj5wshbg8fI0_4jcVHS2lzfw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_sep_call_invite&n=3)

clean_body: Election Day is approaching! | | | Join us September 15th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. Election day is less than 2 months away. If you haven't researched the people running in your area, this is a great time to do it. There's still time to support a candidate you like or to mount a write in campaign of your own. Our communities and media are forgetting that all politics is local and these races are the foundation of our whole political system. Let's make this foundation a little stronger this year by getting involved in our communities. Maybe if we regularly saw examples of neighbors working though their disagreements through the political process, our national conversation could emulate that. Join our call Monday to share what you'd like to see. 2025 Elections We have endorsed candidates for races across the state, and more are on the way. Check out the link below for current and past endorsed candidates. | "Endorsed Candidates" We also have at least 4 volunteers running for Judge of Elections this year as Forward Party Candidates. We'll be happy to hear from them on Monday's call. For those of you in the Southeast Region, there's also a call the following day on 9/16. This will be a great time to dig in to events happening in your area as well as supporting local candidates. Click below to see more Help support these events from our partner organizations. And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Before our mid-month deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds.
Hi Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I'm respectfully asking: **[Will you split a $10 contribution right now between my campaign and Heartland Patriots, before our mid-month deadline?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94631?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94631?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy)
---
As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation.
That's why we've knocked on over 250,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history.
_This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._
Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win.
_Well, together, we pulled off the impossible._
**Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.
It may sound small, but your $10 contribution would help us make sure we can continue sharing our agenda with voters.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute $10 (or even more!) right now to my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we raise the resources we need by our mid-month deadline? Every dollar adds up and allows us to fund ads, organizers, yard signs, and other critical investments.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94631?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=10&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=11&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=12&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=13&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=14&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94632?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=15&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94631?refcode=em20250912-9408&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=16&akid=9408%2E614464%2EHjNmjy)
---
Thank you so much,
Abigail Spanberger

clean_body: This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds. Hi Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I'm respectfully asking: If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots instantly: As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation. That's why we've knocked on over 250,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history. This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds. Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win. Well, together, we pulled off the impossible. Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term. National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line. It may sound small, but your $10 contribution would help us make sure we can continue sharing our agenda with voters. If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots instantly: Thank you so much, Abigail Spanberger | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

subject: Did you catch this, folks?
body:
|
#
Friend, **In case you missed it, national headlines are now saying what we’ve been warning about: MI-08 is the GOP’s top target...** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115109088/569217101/1362877131?refcode=em-9.12.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDFkNGIxMC0xMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KwLy73yJX6k2pBoBXZhBcAWhIAc7BK705_w7xMJSrEA=)
**House GOP recruits candidates in Ohio, Michigan Trump districts held by Democrats**
_“[Top of mind for Republicans is] Michigan's 8th Congressional District, represented by freshman Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet.”_
---
That’s Republicans making clear that flipping MI-08 is right at the top of their list. And they’ve _already_ spent nearly $1 million on attack ads to try to take us down.
**Here’s the reality:** if Republicans flip MI-08, they are almost certain to keep their fragile majority. But if we hold the line, we’re one step closer to a Democratic House that fights for working families.
We’re up against a wave of MAGA and special-interest money – and the only way we’ll compete is with a surge of grassroots support from folks like you.
[**So please, will you chip in today to help us fight back and keep MI-08 blue? $3 from you would go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115109096/569217108/1362877131?refcode=em-9.12.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDFkNGIxMC0xMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KwLy73yJX6k2pBoBXZhBcAWhIAc7BK705_w7xMJSrEA=)

**➤➤ NEW: Trump says he plans unconstitutional executive order to mandate ID for voters** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115109483/569218078/55160957?refcode=em-9.12.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTFkNGIxMC0xMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0XjeafR2MaUyzvY62LZqFV_N9ka2brqXpzTO6NlGJqY=)**
* * *
Friend, Donald Trump just posted on social media that he plans to issue an executive order **requiring voter ID and banning mail-in ballots with almost no exceptions.** Let us be crystal-clear: this policy isn’t just unconstitutional, it’s an assault on voting access itself. Under the Constitution, the right to set voting rules belongs to the states and Congress. **Not the President.** And here’s the truth: voter ID laws do not stop fraud – because the kind of fraud they claim to prevent simply doesn’t exist at any significant level. **In fact, you are more likely to be struck by lightning than to catch someone pretending to be another voter at the polls.** Our Democratic Secretaries of State are the first line of defense against these attacks. They are the ones protecting secure elections, expanding access to the ballot, and making sure every eligible voter’s voice is heard. [**But Trump and his allies are targeting them precisely because they stand in the way of his dangerous agenda. Will you chip in $3 to fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115109484/569218079/1071238056?refcode=em-9.12.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTFkNGIxMC0xMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0XjeafR2MaUyzvY62LZqFV_N9ka2brqXpzTO6NlGJqY=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115109485/569218080/1071238056?refcode=em-9.12.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTFkNGIxMC0xMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0XjeafR2MaUyzvY62LZqFV_N9ka2brqXpzTO6NlGJqY=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ NEW: Trump says he plans unconstitutional executive order to mandate ID for voters = Friend, Donald Trump just posted on social media that he plans to issue an executive order requiring voter ID and banning mail-in ballots with almost no exceptions. Let us be crystal-clear: this policy isn’t just unconstitutional, it’s an assault on voting access itself. Under the Constitution, the right to set voting rules belongs to the states and Congress. Not the President. And here’s the truth: voter ID laws do not stop fraud – because the kind of fraud they claim to prevent simply doesn’t exist at any significant level. In fact, you are more likely to be struck by lightning than to catch someone pretending to be another voter at the polls. Our Democratic Secretaries of State are the first line of defense against these attacks. They are the ones protecting secure elections, expanding access to the ballot, and making sure every eligible voter’s voice is heard. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. I'm running for Congress because our neighbors deserve a representative who will fight for working families, not his own bank account. As mayor of Scranton for the past six years and through my work across government, I've dedicated my career to helping people in Northeastern Pennsylvania build better lives and trust their government again.

But right now, we have a representative who is voting to gut vital programs while giving tax breaks to billionaires. Even worse? He's trading stocks in the same industries he regulates, after running for Congress promising to ban congressional stock trading. **He's saying one thing and doing another.**

The people of Pennsylvania's 8th District deserve a representative with the fight to actually help people — not someone trading stocks for personal profit while voting against the interests of his constituents.
****[**We can win this race and send a new kind of leader to Congress — one who has a track record of independence and isn't afraid to disrupt the old system. Will you become a Founding Donor to our campaign by splitting a $10 donation between me and EMILYs List now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115109549/569218403/-1739079254?refcode=WUEFH919_20250912_PaigeSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056982&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjRjN2M2OC0xMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rN3e71sz3sTMoBgjlw18FB-ReRuk4JIz8Isr1pRjOoA=)****

clean_body: | = Peter, I'm Mayor Paige Cognetti, and last week, I launched my campaign to represent Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District in the U.S. House. **= | = I'm running for Congress because our neighbors deserve a representative who will fight for working families, not his own bank account. As mayor of Scranton for the past six years and through my work across government, I've dedicated my career to helping people in Northeastern Pennsylvania build better lives and trust their government again. But right now, we have a representative who is voting to gut vital programs while giving tax breaks to billionaires. Even worse? He's trading stocks in the same industries he regulates, after running for Congress promising to ban congressional stock trading. He's saying one thing and doing another. The people of Pennsylvania's 8th District deserve a representative with the fight to actually help people — not someone trading stocks for personal profit while voting against the interests of his constituents. =** = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, and I'm excited for what we can build together. Mayor Paige Cognetti = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: Mystic Dream, Finish Your Book, and a Raccoon Rescue
body:
Michelle Vanek, a 35-year-old mother of four, [disappeared while hiking](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOqNlwQEKF39Dl7-9Ehm8jvfO2Mh2gnj7U_IK185Io_m-r_ty1-w5PP7rnZR92KXYuAQ6s6dSKC37lQtvJpHeLQfO7orPtMb4syCgFDCJFhej2V9LXxtliZC6mlQ7yGGAQUqonSJDq5x0DyOst8kM7UgauxbsOBnZYVezeq_B1CICSAnNuE2rbLd-7Ld-7SxVPZDhElPzHTkUR9Zf8UWp2eJee-VKOXLV_atwrnA-z7OROMK7rHDOjoThrI-DdCIjYhBabNHHpE0Ue3yGovmdfSiFI3-QEYny9qSUheVghKNU4VwnZY6Tved8G6oeHrtm_7lQ_uzupfA3AAD___rKhlY) Colorado's Mt. of the Holy Cross, triggering the largest search for a missing hiker in state history with 850 searchers combing the mountain for eight days before giving up empty-handed.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQhZ8Gd7vix6xxQRHparubNiXCMNiT8GMB3iu_feRNlBdIe86nmaPvx6f5tBgxr99tAh3WYHooJsNXi9A7VJPO1tH5CjYFzNi2sxx1KeWX4ZTLG51vjBtvMZ5mHLwOABzEAJpNcproJCUdNj1LOSu1sMmzJVjHuH84vwixcKXCQ7AB9XWNzoxzSqWkd-XmRTI3qtGNiwhARgoee6n3nwVz3yDEs7yg3l1JQ9Rb73sj4hvhT8KfmF_Q-n23zrZyEVcsnkdPppWjOiDiA5LFSPjjChN4PBIRH7tFf9tt7Rlq23D_2zubdotrfhP_SqbobWTC_FFwZOzWMDpJJQRVdB6q9vsXxojtMZGRrtfD99z-355fmv8OAAD__89Wk_Q) | |
# Friday, September 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** This week, we're captivated by a [story out of Colorado](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOqNlwQEKF39Dl7-9Ehm8jvfO2Mh2gnj7U_IK185Io_m-r_ty1-w5PP7rnZR92KXYuAQ6s6dSKC37lQtvJpHeLQfO7orPtMb4syCgFDCJFhej2V9LXxtliZC6mlQ7yGGAQUqonSJDq5x0DyOst8kM7UgauxbsOBnZYVezeq_B1CICSAnNuE2rbLd-7Ld-7SxVPZDhElPzHTkUR9Zf8UWp2eJee-VKOXLV_atwrnA-z7OROMK7rHDOjoThrI-DdCIjYhBabNHHpE0Ue3yGovmdfSiFI3-QEYny9qSUheVghKNU4VwnZY6Tved8G6oeHrtm_7lQ_uzupfA3AAD___rKhlY): a hiker missing for 19 years was finally found thanks to a vivid dream and a determined team of six female rescuers. Have you ever had a dream so extraordinary that it stuck with you? We'd love to hear about it. Just hit reply to this email. On this week's _Feel Good Flyover_ podcast, Amy Hess sits down with longtime rescuer and pastor Scott Beebe, the man whose dream set the search in motion. Don't miss his incredible recounting. ## Women Find Hiker After Mystic Dream
Michelle Vanek, a 35-year-old mother of four, [disappeared while hiking](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOqNlwQEKF39Dl7-9Ehm8jvfO2Mh2gnj7U_IK185Io_m-r_ty1-w5PP7rnZR92KXYuAQ6s6dSKC37lQtvJpHeLQfO7orPtMb4syCgFDCJFhej2V9LXxtliZC6mlQ7yGGAQUqonSJDq5x0DyOst8kM7UgauxbsOBnZYVezeq_B1CICSAnNuE2rbLd-7Ld-7SxVPZDhElPzHTkUR9Zf8UWp2eJee-VKOXLV_atwrnA-z7OROMK7rHDOjoThrI-DdCIjYhBabNHHpE0Ue3yGovmdfSiFI3-QEYny9qSUheVghKNU4VwnZY6Tved8G6oeHrtm_7lQ_uzupfA3AAD___rKhlY) Colorado's Mt. of the Holy Cross, triggering the largest search for a missing hiker in state history with 850 searchers combing the mountain for eight days before giving up empty-handed. For 19 years, the case remained one of Colorado's most baffling mysteries, generating wild theories and podcast episodes, until 2023, when longtime rescuer and pastor Scott Beebe had an extraordinary dream where Michelle visited him and told him "she wanted to be found by a team of women." [Six female volunteers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAURp9GOwxeUcaCYhu72XZLg3iRuwMyAUbj2_9xXuHvv5yc7_x7zk9Nnvbtrw6o7GbnYuO845k9loJpDlcuZNaEOljaKbsrftIS42sGDj3jI2thXjX5axb1qiwiYFejamUvJZd9z2unhnFZYFg6qWGBgfOH6biWHHkrQQjZ1qRuGh9bAM77njcPMy59a8RDGLF0FivBcaUSU_M_0l4cWn_FA1NjYqi9cqW8c9X9qWCqYDrPszk0-a_Wvahgui9VMFkM2iPzuLKMOhnHAhmH3iM79I4vFihn2jfm6IWJhfjZC4uWFYfMRX8xk2K-QXVS6_sk7ykPshJ8C5r816b8OuOh4CcAAP__0HGKuA) from Vail Mountain Rescue took up the challenge, spending months analyzing old search data and mapping unexplored areas. In August 2024, the women flew to Holy Cross and sat on the ridge where Michelle was last seen, with team member Emily Brown recalling: _"The wind came up, and we were all like, 'She's down there, I can just feel it.'"_ Weeks later, rescuer Erika German spotted a red piece of fabric and a blue mitten among the rocks, leading to the discovery of Michelle's remains in a boulder field where she had apparently fallen while seeking water. The find finally brought peace to Michelle's family after nearly two decades of agonizing uncertainty, with her husband Ben saying, _"It feels like a cloud was lifted around our house and family."

## Descendants of WWII Heroes Reunite
Descendants of a heroic [B-17 bomber crew reunited](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAURp_G7rAAQ7ALim3cZdstEYaLfXcwREBi-e1HiTRPMO3R9yOdf3dztxgxbX_tATpswbSQTYKzRmgNijmu2tD5AvYImLDuV36WNecvwymXhM6EceMtxsuI3usAwGHsQTMllaJKStrvWjDGuKOOsRtjyjsHEwhBrWfTNFqYe9TvNTozzimVkg6Tm1fJnJiEE-sYoBMUPLZchv8ZU9shxCu_oAwuH33Ue2uP2o1_Or50fDnPc7DJQW3legc6vriOLz-IrDFvb_asLR9QSG25INRPE5GshClS4Jkwp75o_zgxRqw31Qm6HRbj57T92tZL8-8AAAD__-psgZM) for the first time, 80 years after their ancestors flew together in World War II. The crew of the Yankee Rebel survived over 30 missions, including [one harrowing flight](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3SpCAUAE-jGRYi-BMQbGI2m25oITz07SBMPZihvP3W7BW-C3R195_H9jAYMB6_zQXaH34rPm0Rag5QCtB23bmgdQTm8hgxn3d6057ScxNcKMYX1ovNGQz3JlunPYCAoQXdT2qa-KQUb08t1a6c5eNgejeOFuTi5OyNG8w-q8naFvWXxpdeCM6V4t1sl131Vs7Syn3w0EgODkui7m_CWE7w4U4foM6mqw36LOWVm-FXI9ZGrLXW7kjJfTMilJro2SU6GrE6yBaiM7Fkljw7gRJaVisi8wGPszBLUFl-04swg2MVy8kI3hFTZMYXIDZzdoOh3Ii1Je1eFUPAPE6N5MdlMPxXKj9--dHiXwAAAP__13GO3Q) in which the pilot was wounded and lost his consciousness, and the co-pilot landed the badly damaged plane without landing gear. The reunion began when Lisa Elzey, granddaughter of the ball turret gunner, uncovered her grandfather's story in a 1944 newspaper article and began tracking down the other crew members' families. They gathered at the National Museum of the Mighty Eighth Air Force in Georgia, sharing stories, artifacts, and emotional connections.

clean_body: Michelle Vanek, a 35-year-old mother of four, Colorado's Mt. of the Holy Cross, triggering the largest search for a missing hiker in state history with 850 searchers combing the mountain for eight days before giving up empty-handed. | | | | | | Friday, September 12, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! This week, we're captivated by a : a hiker missing for 19 years was finally found thanks to a vivid dream and a determined team of six female rescuers. Have you ever had a dream so extraordinary that it stuck with you? We'd love to hear about it. Just hit reply to this email. On this week's Feel Good Flyover podcast, Amy Hess sits down with longtime rescuer and pastor Scott Beebe, the man whose dream set the search in motion. Don't miss his incredible recounting. . Today's sponsor, , a fast-growing vacation home co-ownership company backed by top investors, offers everyday investors the chance to join at just $2.90/share. | Women Find Hiker After Mystic Dream Michelle Vanek, a 35-year-old mother of four, Colorado's Mt. of the Holy Cross, triggering the largest search for a missing hiker in state history with 850 searchers combing the mountain for eight days before giving up empty-handed. For 19 years, the case remained one of Colorado's most baffling mysteries, generating wild theories and podcast episodes, until 2023, when longtime rescuer and pastor Scott Beebe had an extraordinary dream where Michelle visited him and told him "she wanted to be found by a team of women." from Vail Mountain Rescue took up the challenge, spending months analyzing old search data and mapping unexplored areas. In August 2024, the women flew to Holy Cross and sat on the ridge where Michelle was last seen, with team member Emily Brown recalling: "The wind came up, and we were all like, 'She's down there, I can just feel it.'" Weeks later, rescuer Erika German spotted a red piece of fabric and a blue mitten among the rocks, leading to the discovery of Michelle's remains in a boulder field where she had apparently fallen while seeking water. The find finally brought peace to Michelle's family after nearly two decades of agonizing uncertainty, with her husband Ben saying, "It feels like a cloud was lifted around our house and family." 📣 Amy Hess has a of Pastor Scott Beebe, sharing his personal account on today's . Young Teacher Adopts Student At 24, Paige Bramlett to William, a student she met while working as his behavioral specialist. After learning he needed a permanent home, she stepped in--navigating court delays, pandemic hurdles, and doubts about her age--before officially adopting him in 2021. Now a single mom of two, to support others navigating foster care and adoption. She says William is her "strength in the storm," inspiring her through the toughest moments. Descendants of WWII Heroes Reunite Descendants of a heroic for the first time, 80 years after their ancestors flew together in World War II. The crew of the Yankee Rebel survived over 30 missions, including in which the pilot was wounded and lost his consciousness, and the co-pilot landed the badly damaged plane without landing gear. The reunion began when Lisa Elzey, granddaughter of the ball turret gunner, uncovered her grandfather's story in a 1944 newspaper article and began tracking down the other crew members' families. They gathered at the National Museum of the Mighty Eighth Air Force in Georgia, sharing stories, artifacts, and emotional connections. | Flying together with our sponsor Former Zillow Exec Opens Door to $1.3T Market Austin Allison sold his first company for $120M. Now, after adding 10 new international destinations, Pacaso is hitting their stride. And unlike his previous stops, you can invest in Pacaso as a private company. But you don't have time to waste. . | ➤ A 25-pound Spaniel mix named Manchis likely saved her household after someone threw a lit stick of dynamite into the yard and she chewed the fuse until it went out. The explosion was averted, but the heroic dog lost her bark due to damage to her vocal cords. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Paxton came after us because we dared to take a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Because we’ve dared to stand up, speak the truth, and build real grassroots power in communities all across Texas, we find ourselves having to fight the full force of the Texas Attorney General’s office. Ken Paxton is doing everything he can to shut us down, stop us from speaking out, and keep Powered by People from registering and turning out the voters who will decide the future of our country.
Over the last month we’ve spent nearly $400,000 in legal fees fighting him in courts in Tarrant County, El Paso County, the 15th District and the Texas Supreme Court.
He’s tried to freeze our assets and even threatened to put me in jail.
This has nothing to do with the law. It’s a political witch hunt — a dangerous attempt to silence us and crush democracy in Texas. But we won’t be silent and we won’t stop fighting for a government of, by, and for the people of Texas.
We’ve faced long odds before, and every time people with the courage of their convictions have stepped up and carried this movement forward.
[**Now I’m asking: if you’re with us in this work, will you contribute $3 to Powered by People today to help us stand strong, fight back against Paxton’s abuse of power, and keep organizing in every part of Texas?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67110?t=2&akid=240350%2E444211%2EZI-ckS)
**[DONATE](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67110?t=3&akid=240350%2E444211%2EZI-ckS)**

name: Dudley
subject: Just got off the phone
body:
I’ve got something that I think you’ll be interested in...
Please read the urgent message below from Dudley Brown and the National Association for Gun Rights.

* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Fellow Patriot,

I just got off the phone with a generous donor out of Texas who’s been watching the news, social media, everything over the past couple days – and he is LIVID.

He knows the vultures are circling and **they want us to SHUT UP**.

_I firmly told him that we will not let the Left dictate our First Amendment right to protect our Second Amendment rights_.

I also expressed that we will never compromise on our God-given freedoms, in fact, we’re doubling down.

And just like that, he said he would raise our doubling down by **quadrupling down**.

In fact, he’s willing to match **every dollar you're able to give** to this email, up to **_400%_** to ensure we have the funds to take on whatever anti-gun threats in Congress come our way.

That means **he’s giving $4 for every $1 you can commit today**.

He asked me to extend this offer only to our most loyal and dedicated supporters.

**[>>> If you could give $250, another $1,000 will be automatically added](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1yultts1oxj3zekrwfzfojuwoj24807d6b1lq11vyia3h36mzwzjopnssl5kactcmo264hbzkm2xfv1bxqvwcgead86ppz0eafegcrc6czs420fwl32h894t01emis6pacnledj1fxom5hrmx7ov4yndfegi6642vc1n0qq2kvgcz83xdsr5oht7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ht72&__onlt=h)!**

**[>>> If you could give $100, another $400 will be automatically added](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1yultts1oxj3zekrwfzfojuwoj24807d6b1lq11vyia3h36mzwzjopnssl5kactcmo264hbzkm2xfv1bxqvwcgead86ppz0eafegcrc6czs420fwl32h894t01emis6pacnledj1fxo6h6wicw9f8mpoid2rt5868dx793dxq5ujcc47qsstvlti&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ht72&__onlt=h)!**

**[>>> If you could give $50, another $200 will be automatically added](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=88my59wrg2kfe9onp65fpba8wqokhv39pzomqde2zbi1w4fyrgp4vhr94k0jgc49nfvlw7vaumtakcaqfxhxdkqcng598mee8ahnxo4nyr7nv8zdryo9xv6i2u1v6dimesn7lro2t2ne9t6jv8otapwk5rajnp4ij1q1n927m5tlp18h2hb7jb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ht72&__onlt=h)!**

**[>>> If you could give $25, another $100 will be automatically added](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=88my59wrg2kfe9onp65fpba8wqokhv39pzomqde2zbi1w4fyrgp4vhr94k0jgc49nfvlw7vaumtakcaqfxhxdkqcng598mee8ahnxo4nyr7nv8zdryo9xv6i2u1v6dimesn7lro2t2mrsijjg4112sk68lupqzlilamt2xu292yv1j15xahaf8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ht72&__onlt=h)!**

It’s not often that we’re able to offer any of our supporters anything like this, so there really has never been a better time to give.

It’s also never been more important.

Fellow Patriot, your support for the National Association for Gun Rights proves you’re a person who understands what it means to fight – _just like the generous donor who is making this 4X Matching Grant possible_.

He wanted me to extend this offer for you as a way of letting you know how much he appreciates all you do.

**[If you can agree to give generously today, you’ll be making a tremendous impact with this 400% match](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1u6wlh1ee557ar569sf9vt8lvwwff29c6zob4t0rr4lkq2bhscmjlzy73qz9ltkhj2knhonsclfyiv5av3gg18ep0qww6yn4jumfbnefn0p8b44y2rpbl8a96xj81ha1rxusxunmnwyrox7rg7s5laknw26oobqpy9w6xbb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ht72&__onlt=h)**.

Thank you for all you do for our Second Amendment rights, Fellow Patriot.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

---

Friend — I’ve really had enough of Randy Fine.
He’s only been in Congress for a few months, but he’s already outpaced his Republican colleagues on being the most unprofessional, racist, callous, and anti-immigrant member of their caucus.
Let me clear: **The point of these racist attacks is to rile up his far-right MAGA base against someone who stands in the way of Trump’s agenda.**
Given everything we’ve seen in today’s political climate, and especially this week, members of Congress should be turning down the hateful rhetoric — not taking to Twitter to throw gasoline on the fire.
So in response to Randy Fine’s continued attacks, I’m asking for your help.
**[Chip in $10**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250912-2-180&t=3&akid=1818%2E791427%2EDCuwks) to support my campaign as we fight for the dignity of immigrant communities and to defeat hateful people on the far-right like Randy Fine at the ballot box.

clean_body: Friend — I’ve really had enough of Randy Fine. He’s only been in Congress for a few months, but he’s already outpaced his Republican colleagues on being the most unprofessional, racist, callous, and anti-immigrant member of their caucus. Let me clear: The point of these racist attacks is to rile up his far-right MAGA base against someone who stands in the way of Trump’s agenda. Given everything we’ve seen in today’s political climate, and especially this week, members of Congress should be turning down the hateful rhetoric — not taking to Twitter to throw gasoline on the fire. So in response to Randy Fine’s continued attacks, I’m asking for your help. to support my campaign as we fight for the dignity of immigrant communities and to defeat hateful people on the far-right like Randy Fine at the ballot box. to help us send a message that our progressive movement will not and can not be intimidated — we will continue to push for our positive vision of America where everyone gets the respect and prosperity they deserve. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

---

Hi there!
All of us staff and volunteers on Saikat's campaign have been having a blast each week canvassing and talking to voters at farmers markets. I really don't want anyone to miss out -- especially YOU!
**[Please sign up for a Saturday canvass event here.](https://substack.com/redirect/6aa7b300-54af-4064-82a7-3699b3dc31c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Or [sign up for a Farmers Market leafleting event here.](https://substack.com/redirect/1c749276-2573-400f-844e-16b21e8c46c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
And that includes TOMORROW! Meet us for canvassing at:
**Dolores Park, at 19th and Dolores -- Sept. 13, 11:00 AM.**
We'll get you out on the doors really fast. Bring a friend, go out in a pair. Or go alone, or with another volunteer as you choose.
Here's Saikat on why canvassing is so important -- and some scenes of what to expect:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b407db3a-be9d-472d-ae73-bff3b449722b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We have a huge goal to achieve: We've got to talk to at least 100,000 voters at their doors plus tens of thousands more at events. And I don't mean just saying hi and waving. We're identifying supporters, who we will turn out to vote, and undecided voters, who we will inform about Saikat and why he's running.
It's all part of a tech- and data-enhanced operation that we've been building for months, but the most important part is YOU. It all comes down to talking with our neighbors and other San Franciscans about the issues that matter to them, and giving them a reason to hope for change.
OK, thanks for reading! Hope to see you tomorrow or soon!
In solidarity,
Zack Exley
Campaign Manager
Saikat for Congress

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Any plans Thursday, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our virtual Build Our America event is Thursday, September 18th, at 5 pm PT/8 pm ET. You don’t want to miss this!
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250912-5423-footer&t=1&akid=5423%2E420207%2E6zyi3N)
Hi, Peter!
I have some exciting news to share with you!
**I’m thrilled to invite you to my annual Build Our America virtual event next Thursday, September 18th, at 5 pm PT / 8 pm ET!**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vboa2025?refcode=middleseat&refcode2=5423_420207_6zyi3N&akid=5423%2E420207%2E6zyi3N)
This is my most important event of the year – and after a chaotic and draining year, it couldn’t come any sooner. This is our chance to regroup, build community, and mobilize to meet the moment and flip the House and Senate next November.
[**Peter, will you join me virtually next Thursday, September 18th? Make sure to RSVP, purchase your ticket ahead of time, and spread the word to your loved ones – every new changemaker grows our movement’s power.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vboa2025?refcode=middleseat&refcode2=5423_420207_6zyi3N&akid=5423%2E420207%2E6zyi3N)
**[RSVP ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vboa2025?refcode=middleseat&refcode2=5423_420207_6zyi3N&akid=5423%2E420207%2E6zyi3N)**
The best part? All funds raised go towards my campaign’s year-long organizing efforts to win the midterms next November.
I can’t wait to come together – because after Thursday, we’ll be empowered like never before to protect our communities, stand up to Trump, and win the midterms.
See you then!
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250912-5423-footer&t=2&refcode2=5423_420207_6zyi3N&akid=5423%2E420207%2E6zyi3N)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Jay Jones
subject: this changes everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Folks, it’s Jay Jones – Democrat running for Attorney General of Virginia.
Did you know that Virginia is one of just five states that have their statewide elections in an off-year?
It’s presenting its own share of hurdles for our campaign – I’ll dive into them in just a moment. But if you already know just how important our race is, can I count on you to chip in $20.25 for our off-year 2025 race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=20.25]
DONATE $20.25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=20.25]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
I’ll be honest, running this race in an off-year changes everything. Let me break it down for you:
1️⃣ Lower voter turnout is a concern for campaigns like ours because we don’t have midterms or a presidential election cycle to bank on. This means fewer voters may know that an election is even happening!
2️⃣ Decreased media attention is also a factor we’re considering as our communications team works tirelessly to get the word out about our campaign. We’re competing with a lot of different races that aren’t happening until 2026.
3️⃣ Shorter election cycles are common for states like ours as they come off the heels of an intense presidential election. This shrinks our campaign’s runway to set up shop and build the momentum we need to win.
4️⃣ Donors are tapped out after an aggressive 2024 fundraising cycle with countless campaigns asking for their support. It makes powering our campaign at full-capacity a difficult task.
So that’s the gist.
But even with all of these roadblocks in front of us, our campaign is still polling within the margin of error to Jason Miyares, taking his MAGA mega-donors to task, and scaring the socks off of national Republicans. So we cannot take our foot off the gas. Especially not when the election is less than two months away.
For these reasons, can I ask you to chip in $20.25 to support our high-stakes 2025 campaign for Attorney General? We won’t be able to defeat Miyares and the national GOP donor machine without grassroots supporters like you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=20.25]
DONATE $20.25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=20.25]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
With gratitude,
- Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YqPmCIa7-kyhl9zzn7GjiQ2?unsubscribedata=qBhrZTPB%2Fk04XB76SvIBMmj8T9ypDAHjKXvBbxwLhGcNpf9Ga99wTuo5NVMmSp59EfBFcIifbrI%2FN6R1Njh%2FsMWreWvwFNW6zbo30TR02wTYZalX1I2XGthnavlnZ5869ssvUSvIWHNJltrjMQw6F4WlWgH6D8aDH1QzJuioWYaEVFwa6hp2MNOdgJ4onweJT2OY9xMqlOEWi4GDDJpBCH2UsCDVjJJEuZNWuV08kbXvLXkn1CxnQ4O1pCJuf%2FuvHTG8w%2FXZNq7WVii1yFq5Jn2n7MNp18F%2B7d%2Bl%2BUpdrWxOR2QQe%2BKVGctv7gd52StUW%2F%2BLkQCkio87EA6a1tVz2Mam%2BlseS0V747JdSDCECgubqMSCW5jvVdn2ey8wCyUVWaJ2YRlhmJg6s4iBEKXOZgQwTLHINJgvaD8cuCBU3B8JjYA3v51WXonPHuRVqnA1 .

* * *
Peter — This week is a stark reminder that gun violence can strike anywhere, at any time in America. _When will we say "enough?”_ Even as gun deaths declined in 2024, we still lost nearly 47,000 Americans to firearms the previous year. We endured 499 mass shootings. More than 5,100 children and teenagers were shot. Researchers estimate that if there were a national assault weapons ban and high-capacity magazine restrictions, we'd see 70% fewer deaths in mass shootings. It's a painfully simple solution that could save thousands of lives. **Congress has the power to act.** They can reinstate the assault weapons ban. They can pass universal background checks. They can get weapons of war off our streets before more Americans lose their lives. **_But they won't act unless we force their hand._** **[Unite the Country is collecting petition signatures to demand Congress take immediate action to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic. Add your name to join the fight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115111064/569223366/1917208339?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljZWM4MTBjLTFhOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wqo-yR-vpO0dEErPHCgftcm-ErbRLbC_nduIPbO3DPw=&emci=8f8c68c5-0290-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9cec810c-1a90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16951753)** **[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115111066/569223368/1917208339?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljZWM4MTBjLTFhOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wqo-yR-vpO0dEErPHCgftcm-ErbRLbC_nduIPbO3DPw=&emci=8f8c68c5-0290-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9cec810c-1a90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16951753)** We can't normalize gun violence. We can't accept that shootings are just part of American life. We can't let another year pass with thousands more preventable deaths. _The time for action is now._ Thanks for your support, Unite the Country

clean_body: No more mass shootings. No more political assassinations. No more grieving families. | Peter — This week is a stark reminder that gun violence can strike anywhere, at any time in America. When will we say "enough?” Even as gun deaths declined in 2024, we still lost nearly 47,000 Americans to firearms the previous year. We endured 499 mass shootings. More than 5,100 children and teenagers were shot. Researchers estimate that if there were a national assault weapons ban and high-capacity magazine restrictions, we'd see 70% fewer deaths in mass shootings. It's a painfully simple solution that could save thousands of lives. Congress has the power to act. They can reinstate the assault weapons ban. They can pass universal background checks. They can get weapons of war off our streets before more Americans lose their lives. But they won't act unless we force their hand. We can't normalize gun violence. We can't accept that shootings are just part of American life. We can't let another year pass with thousands more preventable deaths. The time for action is now. Thanks for your support, Unite the Country | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable and expose his broken promises — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on you to join Unite the Country in this fight. = = = Follow along:** | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. ## **Frozen Odds Movie Update:**
**I am so thankful to all the people who bought tickets to “Frozen Odds” I was able to put together an amazing setup for equipment and little did I know that AFPI, America First Policy Institute would be so interested in working directly with me to help make content, do presentations, and show my movie all over the country. I have been working with them for a couple months now planning our strategy in Michigan, which is facing a ballot measure to get RCV in Michigan in 2026. The movie will be 45 minutes, the first trailer will come out in October and the movie release will be December or January for Alaska.****I am working directly with AFPI executive team and we plan to bring big name people to various events to get large crowds, their goal is 400-500+ per event and plan to do events across Michigan, having my movie as the main showcase with a panel doing Q &A at the end.****I am not charging AFPI for the movie, videos, or content I have created for them. I believe they will pay for the events, marketing, and flying me to Michigan for the various events. I had no idea that my work would make such a difference and I am very proud and thankful to all the people that have supported all of my efforts.****Seeing Charlie Kirk die reminds me that the work doesn’t stop, it never will and we have to carry on doing what he started.****Our work doesn’t stop in Michigan, I am also working with AFPI in Georgia and Minnesota next.**
---
|

---
|

Unlike the left and a handful of well-paid "Republican" RCV supporters, it has actual, you know, data and history that proves the absolute folly of RCV. It is critical that Michigan voters understand that RCV acts against them. If you don't want your ballot sent to the trash can (ie, eliminated through RCV recounting) then please make sure you oppose the pro-RCV Constitutional Amendment coming to MI in 2026. Oh. And its not just Michigan. Sixteen states (WV, WY, TN, FL, ID, SD, MT, KY, AL, MS, LA, OK, MO, AR, KS, ND) have banned RCV. If you're not in one of those - look out - oppose RCV now before it's too late.

I’m reaching out personally today to ask if you can **[chip in $10 to support my campaign before our upcoming mid-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115111270/569223980/-896270057?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_091225_MM1_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDIzMjgwNC0xYjkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEqCxSAEoDQtiDH-1xVcx541Dwapst_cF6B5N7MsUrU=)** Here’s why this moment matters: At the end of this month, we’re facing our end-of-quarter FEC deadline, where all of our fundraising numbers will go public. The numbers we report are a snapshot of our campaign’s strength, our momentum, and our readiness to win. Putting up a strong report is critical to showing Republicans we're not backing down after they pushed through a budget that puts the ultra-wealthy and special interests ahead of working families. The GOP has made its priorities clear by favoring the wealthy elite while putting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security at risk. **And now, Republicans are gearing up to protect their majority by any means necessary. ** I’m not taking anything for granted, Peter. name: Indiana GOP
subject: Honoring Charlie Kirk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Honoring Charlie Kirk**_
---
Friends, I want to begin by addressing what I know is front of mind for all of us, the assassination of Charlie Kirk. To see a young man, a husband and father, and a staunch defender of free speech be gunned down for the ideas he expressed has been devastating, and I would ask that each of you join me in lifting up his family in prayer. I am glad to be able to say that President Trump announced this morning, "with a high-degree of certainty" that the killer has been identified and is now in custody. I want to thank President Trump and Governor Braun for directing flags to be flown at half-mast to honor Charlie, and I have been very glad to see an outpouring of support for his family and loved ones from Hoosiers across the state. Charlie died practicing what he preached, engaging in open debate and standing up for the principles we hold so dear. He will continue to inspire each and every one of us, and this heinous act will not erase the good he did and love he had for this nation and his countrymen. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
| | |
---
---
| | _**Governor Braun Orders Flags at Half-Staff in Remembrance of Charlie Kirk**_
---
---
Governor Mike Braun has ordered flags at state facilities to be flown at half-staff through Sunday, Sept. 14, in accordance with President Trump’s directive honoring Charlie Kirk. He also encouraged Hoosiers and businesses to join in this tribute. a "I am deeply saddened by the tragic murder of Charlie Kirk. Political violence has no place in our communities. My prayers are with his family." \- Governor Braun via a [x](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/mqk_XHSoh2OCh1z_BIdX9T-epDFz2t99CKS8QeJlk3Hb7L5ZnFXM4zAfO8AxXV09IXQnXoqcmpfO0nlZI9LSRZeZ04jT3SMEnX-YW3x-Y49b_6mQwVpwibEW3KsvKQYF9SfFr3M5VNhuXYQYB25eGpq-X0QCZ_vp7RRsi6p419cpujuO-5EsWJ1Id4zntcw6OhcpPpKyGJRyOhvjowsl2bvdJxNyOEbje6GQSBrKnnM5G7hOiO8fkOgzEz-gtcKbkTTo_QLxZaaZFQzIvtn2sLZ_YzNGsO6aNeb2Ty7luKsK4cSW9J12jOEbOUseEL_DfPm3Co0KAZSvOG_N6pRFr6uEOuplLqao6nxZw_ioE-FWgekig4pUzDEu6xPKPJhXS1T8anGMjN84tTWWOZ9Rpd1M6LfwAe0rPDRgQM84dA/88I4ZThyS7Gb9RXGVfLB8sXt3Oo0I9oe/12)

_**Governor Braun leads the nation in removing discriminatory business practices**_
---
---
Indiana has become the first state to request a federal waiver to remove race and gender-based requirements from the Disadvantaged Business Enterprise (DBE) program in highway construction contracts. If approved, the Indiana Department of Transportation would instead use race and gender neutral criteria focused on economically disadvantaged small businesses. "I am a firm believer in offering equal opportunity for all to compete and succeed. If granted, this waiver will further position Indiana as a state one would want to do business with and as a place to grow your business," \- Governor Braun via a [press release](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/JanPSBEsNT2e0mEziB60Ncn5NEcPT7xrWHW5M-tl3Q-trkAnyZJoY8g4vcXJ9rdejRIBvPQb9tUsUcJKkd8CkphfjEPkEtL11F2Kd6uvJdv7nMY6Ns5PDcYSO4MwOo4_dGTlXz2v7vh8wpEklT-9NhE6D5ihTQJodTkkWnB0xdoPnhLiXAR60hJ2CVqXSgRSUkyCRIokha6WRwUY7GXZTCd7qrZtyixCcxNKq5cRSnCmp0ovz_Fuh7ZucwDsSNDdO8JZrbQM2M0p9ih8Njj0fvezJa1VKImfK4uDAsnUU_Cqxll83ZZbgCBGoGsP1jvdeeWmHgeMLoGSMGU0YzoYeUhmgIZO5sRFLFN3ko3UkcAR-eBH_d2waWuZRwNtL_ULOn-xTD3NA2jZJbF8P3TeU5sZkXJDLblyHqrwqYmPVIATQaWjPhdojsf5h_PmlpibRWxDPsUPj8siLqU8kdmUWWmuKDV68b_txMhBozfdlde-l1cbX9gIsrM_N8E4CLH7kZ22oqjltUxjseTY8ySXLrdW8KKhDFQc6Ubz8s6h3K335xxu8OpFSf7Twxn_VIgdWLbERlmPbW5-mcEqeVpziDG0cG68evd-JtGlVwrmNluc9Mlc5zXXAnJphMtteEQ0Gc6VfLyOnvaNtlI6Mmnnauc7l1hdsRSApwsYg6HDWpp3GdzosNeuFCoOQLYuE__aTlTbxCj8YCpbZw9qddWtzt-ovWw2xIr1sGpCVG7j8mVkGazluDPgjeycWgY1SAM/1K87IddF4RLJxK6nrbcyoIPsJyGUCRdF/12)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Honoring Charlie Kirk Friends, I want to begin by addressing what I know is front of mind for all of us, the assassination of Charlie Kirk. To see a young man, a husband and father, and a staunch defender of free speech be gunned down for the ideas he expressed has been devastating, and I would ask that each of you join me in lifting up his family in prayer. I am glad to be able to say that President Trump announced this morning, "with a high-degree of certainty" that the killer has been identified and is now in custody. I want to thank President Trump and Governor Braun for directing flags to be flown at half-mast to honor Charlie, and I have been very glad to see an outpouring of support for his family and loved ones from Hoosiers across the state. Charlie died practicing what he preached, engaging in open debate and standing up for the principles we hold so dear. He will continue to inspire each and every one of us, and this heinous act will not erase the good he did and love he had for this nation and his countrymen. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with. | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor Braun Orders Flags at Half-Staff in Remembrance of Charlie Kirk Governor Mike Braun has ordered flags at state facilities to be flown at half-staff through Sunday, Sept. 14, in accordance with President Trump’s directive honoring Charlie Kirk. He also encouraged Hoosiers and businesses to join in this tribute. a "I am deeply saddened by the tragic murder of Charlie Kirk. Political violence has no place in our communities. My prayers are with his family." \- Governor Braun via a Governor Braun leads the nation in removing discriminatory business practices Indiana has become the first state to request a federal waiver to remove race and gender-based requirements from the Disadvantaged Business Enterprise (DBE) program in highway construction contracts. If approved, the Indiana Department of Transportation would instead use race and gender neutral criteria focused on economically disadvantaged small businesses. "I am a firm believer in offering equal opportunity for all to compete and succeed. If granted, this waiver will further position Indiana as a state one would want to do business with and as a place to grow your business," \- Governor Braun via a | Franklin County Switzerland County Ripley County Jefferson County Chairwoman's County Visits: 78 | Congress of Counties 2026 | Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? The Indiana Republican Party is now accepting applications for our Summer and Fall Internship Program! ✅ Gain hands-on experience in campaign strategy, communications, and event planning ✅ Work alongside state leaders and build valuable connections ✅ Make a real impact on Republican efforts in Indiana Apply Today! Spots are limited! | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Mike Braun attended both and County Lincoln Days this week to discuss what his freedom and opportunity agenda means for Hoosiers across the state. Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith a meaningful roundtable in Southwest Indiana today, bringing together local pastors to listen and gain a deeper understanding of the challenges facing their communities. He was joined by Rep. Alex Burton and Councilwoman Jill Hahn, who helped foster stronger connections between civic leaders and faith communities. Secretary Diego Morales Indiana at the National Meeting of Securities Regulators. Secretary Morales commented on his attendance at the conference saying, "Investor protection is at the core of what we do. Hoosiers deserve a fair and transparent marketplace, and conferences like this allow us to exchange ideas, strengthen regulatory practices, and ensure Indiana remains at the forefront of safeguarding investors." Treasurer Daniel Elliott and Pastors, along with leaders from Israel and across the USA, at the Jerusalem Prayer Breakfast to speak about and celebrate Indiana's alliance with the state of Israel. Comptroller Elise Nieshalla "" the American Legislative Exchange Council (ALEC) for recommending Indiana Senate Resolution 51, that sounds the alarm on the national debt, serve as a model for state legislatures to pass across the country. Attorney General Todd Rokita that his office is leading a 17-state effort in support of the Indiana Department of Transportation's request for a waiver against utilizing the U.S. Department of Transportation's Disadvantaged Business Enterprise program which requires race and gender-conscious requirements. In the letter to the Department of Transportation, the Indiana-led multistate coalition argues that such requirements violate the Constitution and the recent Supreme Court decision in Students for Fair Admissions. Senator Todd Young Indiana-based Delta Faucet to discuss issues affecting the plumbing industry and their Hoosier workforce. Senator Jim Banks with Northeast Indiana Honor Flight #52 at the World War II Memorial in D.C. Congressman Rudy Yakym with Hoosier veterans in DC with Honor Flight Northeast Indiana. The trip was made possible in part by the Walorski Family Foundation. Congressman Yakym praised former Congresswoman Jackie Walorski efforts to advocate for veterans stating, "Jackie was a tireless advocate for veterans, and I'm honored to carry on her legacy. We are a grateful nation." Congressman Marlin Stutzman on Meet the Press Now on Tuesday to discuss a variety of issues including Republicans' plans to keep the government funded. Congressman Jim Baird the reintroduction of the PART act to help reduce catalytic converter thefts and provide local law enforcement officers with the tools to reduce these often costly thefts. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz the Indiana Family Institute to discuss addressing fiscal issues affecting Hoosier families. Congressman Jefferson Shreve colleagues in the House Transportation Committee to advance FEMA reforms to ensure that relief efforts are fast and fair. Congressman Mark Messmer, along with other Indiana and Kentucky lawmakers, Secretary Duffy to unveil the progress on the I-69 Ohio River Crossing Project. Congresswoman Erin Houchin Eli Lilly's leadership team at the Capital praising their work and how they continue to be a leader in health and innovation. | Upcoming Events Across the State September 13: September 14: "Johnson Republican Party Chairman’s GOP Rally and Cookout" September 15: September 20: September 20: "Brown County’s Big Beautiful Bash" September 20: September 25: "Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner" September 26: October 5: October 16: "Monroe County Lincoln Day Dinner" October 20: October 28: October 28: "Delaware County Lincoln Day Dinner" October 29: "DeKalb County Lincoln Day Dinner" February 20: "Congress of Counties 2026" June 19: "Indiana Republican State Convention 2026" | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Derek Tran
subject: If you read one email from me this week, make it this one.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115111788/569225683/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODc2YjJkOTYtMWI5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qs1Ly0OozOD8lwwGixMqIciBl4DSnPXSunzu-bkKv2Q=)
After our big win last November, you might have expected our campaign to take a breather. **Honestly, I did too.** But the truth is, the fight to hold this seat never really stopped, and I want to be upfront about why:
* **We flipped this district by just 653 votes.** That makes me one of the most vulnerable Democrats in America -- and national Republicans have already named me a top target.
* Running a campaign in Orange County -- one of the most expensive media markets in the nation -- **costs up to 16x more** than other House races. And the same GOP super PACs that broke spending records against me in 2024 are gearing up again.
* **I refuse money from Big Pharma and Big Oil.** That means my campaign depends entirely on grassroots support -- on people like you chipping in what you can, when you can.

**[I know it feels early, but our biggest fundraising deadline yet hits this month and the stakes couldn’t be higher. If you’re ready to make a contribution to keep me in Congress, I hope it’s today, and I hope it’s through this email.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115111791/569225686/1527952032?refcode=em-9.12.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODc2YjJkOTYtMWI5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qs1Ly0OozOD8lwwGixMqIciBl4DSnPXSunzu-bkKv2Q=)**
