name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Mariannette Miller-Meeks doesn't want to work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're watching political loyalty take priority over public service.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115111907/569225980/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDZiMmQ5Ni0xYjkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sg4aeObB135Spk478FuEoTOrERWMRPjtZtCPzTIx3V8=)

I wish I were writing to you about better news, Peter,

Our nation is staring down a government shutdown at the end of the month, and instead of working to prevent it, Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her colleagues are taking their cues from their party bosses. **Rather than sitting down with Democrats to make sure the government stays funded, they are treating one of the most basic responsibilities of Congress like a political game.**

This isn’t how our government is supposed to work. No party should serve a president. Both parties are meant to serve the American people. At moments like this, every elected official has a duty to work across the aisle and ensure that the needs of every American are met. Instead, we’re watching political loyalty take priority over public service.

A shutdown would hurt everyone. **Here in Iowa, it would throw more than 10,000 federal employees into uncertainty, disrupt access to programs like WIC, slow down critical healthcare services, and weaken our economy — all just as families are preparing for the holidays.**

I have always believed that our leaders should be willing to work with anyone if it means delivering for the people they represent. That’s the job. I will be a leader for everyone in this district, not just those who voted for me, because that’s what Iowans deserve.

Mariannette Miller-Meeks has already said she won’t work across the aisle to prevent this crisis. That is a _choice_ to put politics and personal ambition over the people of Iowa’s 1st District and it should infuriate every single one of us.

**[We cannot afford to let extremists in Congress push this country into chaos. clean_body: We're watching political loyalty take priority over public service. | = I wish I were writing to you about better news, Peter, Our nation is staring down a government shutdown at the end of the month, and instead of working to prevent it, Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her colleagues are taking their cues from their party bosses. Rather than sitting down with Democrats to make sure the government stays funded, they are treating one of the most basic responsibilities of Congress like a political game. This isn’t how our government is supposed to work. No party should serve a president. Both parties are meant to serve the American people. At moments like this, every elected official has a duty to work across the aisle and ensure that the needs of every American are met. Instead, we’re watching political loyalty take priority over public service. A shutdown would hurt everyone. Here in Iowa, it would throw more than 10,000 federal employees into uncertainty, disrupt access to programs like WIC, slow down critical healthcare services, and weaken our economy — all just as families are preparing for the holidays. I have always believed that our leaders should be willing to work with anyone if it means delivering for the people they represent. That’s the job. I will be a leader for everyone in this district, not just those who voted for me, because that’s what Iowans deserve. Mariannette Miller-Meeks has already said she won’t work across the aisle to prevent this crisis. That is a choice to put politics and personal ambition over the people of Iowa’s 1st District and it should infuriate every single one of us. Thank you, Christina Bohannan Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. name: Voter Research // Voter Action Project
subject: Will they keep the USPS ballot division?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
A few years ago the United States Postal Service created a special division to handle election mail issues as part of an effort to ensure swift and secure delivery of ballots during elections. Now the Trump Administration is hacking and slashing away at both our government agencies and our fundamental right to vote through executive orders.
We want to hear from voters in your area about the USPS. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Are you concerned that the USPS mail-in ballot division is under threat?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=091225_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=091225_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091225_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091225_2&amount=20]

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: About Jack Ciattarelli
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Peter, as Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent
#
Peter, as Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and his plans for our state if we let him win this race.
And after reading this email, if you agree that my opponent is the wrong person to be leading New Jersey, I hope you’ll **[split whatever you can between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help me win this upcoming election.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94943?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94943?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa)**
**On abortion rights:** Jack Ciattarelli supports a statewide abortion ban and wants to defund Planned Parenthood healthcare centers in New Jersey, which would lead to patients losing access to not only abortion care, but also cancer and STI screenings, routine gynecological exams, and more.
**On affordability:** My opponent proudly stood alongside Trump as Washington Republicans cut Medicaid, set Medicare on track for disaster, took away food assistance, and gave billionaires a massive tax break in their price hike bill. Not only did he urge Republican Members of Congress to vote for Trump’s agenda — _he’s promising to implement it at the state level here in New Jersey, too._
**On Trump:** Ciattarelli got Trump’s endorsement in this race after shamelessly begging for it. He praises the disastrous policies Trump is implementing in Washington and promises, and even said this: “When I’m governor, we’re gonna do the same in New Jersey.”
Peter, it’s abundantly clear — **Jack Ciattarelli is out of touch with New Jersey, and we cannot let him become the next governor of our state.**
But with far-right super PACs lining the pockets of his campaign, I’m relying on my grassroots supporters now more than ever to help us out in the final stretch of this campaign.
**[If you’re with me, please split whatever you can between my team and State Democrats Committee to help our campaign fight back against Jack Ciattarelli and his far-right backers and win this election.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94943?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94944?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94944?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94944?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94944?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94944?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94944?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94943?refcode=em20250912-9418&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9418%2E614464%2EPuyYQa)

\- Mikie

name: The Cedar Key Progress Team
subject: [SIGN] Stop Trump's Fascist D.C. Takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:

clean_body: Three Democratic justices are up for retention, and their victories are critical to maintaining a Democratic majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. | | | | | ---|--- Did you know that there are majority-deciding state supreme court races in Pennsylvania this November? Three Democratic justices are up for retention, and their victories are critical to maintaining a Democratic majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. Here’s the bottom line: State supreme court races have serious implications because they rule on voting rights, abortion, and redistricting. The PA Supreme Court has the authority to strike down rigged maps. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: My reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250912_1_ossoff?refcode=em20250912-2318&amount=5&refcode2=2318_582294_1prHM4&akid=2318%2E582294%2E1prHM4)
**$5**.
That is the contribution I’m asking you to make — today — to my reelection campaign here in Georgia and Chris Pappas in New Hampshire.
**$5** to respond to the never-ending onslaught of attack ads from right-wing, billionaire-funded Super PACs.
**$5** to build out a massive organizing and mobilization effort that will reach every Georgian all across the state.
**$5** because this will be one of the closest and most expensive elections in the country, and it will take all of us working together to win it.
You might think that a single $5 contribution can’t make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one.
But as you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their own $5 — and it adds up fast when lots of people chip in.
[**Please use this link to split a $5 contribution between my reelection campaign and Chris Pappas today. My team and I will put your donation right to work WINNING this U.S. Senate race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250912_1_ossoff?refcode=em20250912-2318&amount=5&refcode2=2318_582294_1prHM4&akid=2318%2E582294%2E1prHM4)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250912_1_ossoff?amount=5&refcode=em20250912-2318&refcode2=2318_582294_1prHM4&akid=2318%2E582294%2E1prHM4)**
Gratefully,
Jon Ossoff
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250912-1?t=1&refcode2=2318_582294_1prHM4&akid=2318%2E582294%2E1prHM4)**

clean_body: Our fundraising is tracking far behind where we need to be to meet our goals for the quarter. Team, our campaign is facing a major test when our end-of-quarter deadline expires on September 30th. But as we come up on the midpoint of the month, our fundraising is tracking far behind where we need to be to meet our goals for the quarter. So we’re setting a flash goal of raising $10,000 by midnight on September 15th to ensure we’re on track to meet our quarterly goal and raise the resources we need to keep Colorado BLUE. = = | | = Friend, September 30th marks our FIRST FEC reporting deadline since another extreme MAGA Republican entered the Senate race against John. That means when the FEC releases our fundraising report to the public, National Republicans will compare the strength of our grassroots team against our opponents’ numbers — and if they see any path to taking John down, they won’t hesitate to surge MILLIONS into Colorado to bury us under a mountain of attack ads. We can’t leave any trace of weakness in our campaign.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you for stepping up, Hickenlooper HQ | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. With the GOP watching our every move, it’s critical that we hit our fundraising goals and show the strong, grassroots support behind our campaign. We have one week to meet our mid-month target, and I need your help. Republicans are watching my every move, hoping to find anything they can use to attack my character, say that I don’t care about my District, and accuse me of serving the “woke agenda” instead of the people I represent.
Just this past weekend, the NRCC lied about me, claiming I voted to shut down rural hospitals.
The hypocrisy is almost laughable.
Let’s not forget that **it’s the _Republican_ party — not Democrats — who voted to gut American health care by slashing _$990 billion_ in the OBBB budget cuts.**
Republicans are always looking to shift the blame to someone else, which is why they are spending their resources to attack me in CA25.
And while it’s tempting to think their efforts will fail, MAGA Republicans are master manipulators.
Despite clear evidence that they’re harming working families and destroying health care, people will believe their dangerous narratives if we don’t fight back.
[Will you chip in $10 right now to send a strong message to watching Republicans that CA-25 will not be deceived? Let’s keep CA-25 blue and flip the House in 2026 — Americans deserve good healthcare policy and the whole truth.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115113446/569231031/1243549332?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_091225_MM1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJjMGRjYTItMWY5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7uspNwyT6Ex2IiDU2oHh4LxcEDVub4wnTrvzn0dHM_s=) | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115113449/569231034/1243549332?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_091225_MM1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJjMGRjYTItMWY5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7uspNwyT6Ex2IiDU2oHh4LxcEDVub4wnTrvzn0dHM_s=)**

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: Dudley
subject: Just got off the phone
body:
I’ve got something that I think you’ll be interested in... [unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0gf4n3jz5jsjn6z1a11h5x6v5l4rv1wen2a25spswsvxih929au904rj3axtn2v5fbw63olt6n0xsnz1ufvk2idaonj9&__stmp=t2hvuh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read this urgent message below from Dudley Brown and the National Association for Gun Rights.

Steve Thompson, Editor
* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Fellow Patriot,

I just got off the phone with a generous donor out of Texas who’s been watching the news, social media, everything over the past couple days – and he is LIVID.

He knows the vultures are circling and **they want us to SHUT UP**.

_I firmly told him that we will not let the Left dictate our First Amendment right to protect our Second Amendment rights_.

I also expressed that we will never compromise on our God-given freedoms, in fact, we’re doubling down.

And just like that, he said he would raise our doubling down by **quadrupling down**.

In fact, he’s willing to match **every dollar you're able to give** to this email, up to **_400%_** to ensure we have the funds to take on whatever anti-gun threats in Congress come our way.

That means **he’s giving $4 for every $1 you can commit today**.

He asked me to extend this offer only to our most loyal and dedicated supporters.

**[>>> If you could give $250, another $1,000 will be automatically added](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1lvvjrg5ccb8nlkzq793uglmv9ep4o2kr4hkh7vi89kxkibkr51w6p7yru11rnn3mt9s00d6q35ntayqge4jal1rw43jrartjfjj2uf0djx7l83wvsy7ei4kxx0fr77g6lusw9rfpaws0vr8o23b361303xmy46ady6v2cg09a2f492ebmcv2pplm6icdr8vrjy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2hvuh&__onlt=h)!**

**[>>> If you could give $100, another $400 will be automatically added](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1lvvjrg5ccb8nlkzq793uglmv9ep4o2kr4hkh7vi89kxkibkr51w6p7yru11rnn3mt9s00d6q35ntayqge4jal1rw43jrartjfjj2uf0djx7l83wvsy7ei4kxx0fr77g6lusw9rfpawq7w7zz5xivgei4l3ewttte3h0kodkf0gtpcn7tcvidm658f9h8p1nhje&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2hvuh&__onlt=h)!**

**[>>> If you could give $50, another $200 will be automatically added](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=m26cz1rrwya8rcf5jz7f38o632mgr75kd4tg9tlsiirsbl5qu5m5q8pgml0dsdliqei293fx3frar9isbnjlwaq00wei0yrswufka0br6qeaz2d2cuht00b45dapk7mrxhm7owentuz8ed3ep67kt34ypf7dvsfkx29hsxmkpo1rva6ez68yk098kw8z4ov1j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2hvuh&__onlt=h)!**

**[>>> If you could give $25, another $100 will be automatically added](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=m26cz1rrwya8rcf5jz7f38o632mgr75kd4tg9tlsiirsbl5qu5m5q8pgml0dsdliqei293fx3frar9isbnjlwaq00wei0yrswufka0br6qeaz2d2cuht00b45dapk7mrxhm7owentuyu33ee2542k6o49gbwjzi5rg8j6b8v38amlu5fog7thcr6haio8yqxm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2hvuh&__onlt=h)!**

It’s not often that we’re able to offer any of our supporters anything like this, so there really has never been a better time to give.

It’s also never been more important.

Fellow Patriot, your support for the National Association for Gun Rights proves you’re a person who understands what it means to fight – _just like the generous donor who is making this 4X Matching Grant possible_.

He wanted me to extend this offer for you as a way of letting you know how much he appreciates all you do.

**[If you can agree to give generously today, you’ll be making a tremendous impact with this 400% match](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1g8pmoqrzs1251d6tx17zs6qk54r2aya84c2ortndy7cx9hwiquxmxye1vc4t6jeldldc3vv4jpvrfs9g1nr2bfnl4lg8rzqm81sad5qjzuc9w7g1ey4bpl5xpxc7vuzqqv40wpux9ep2h2nbfgufbwu6s1ifxwfn6l0tl7m8thylchlt9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2hvuh&__onlt=h)**.

Thank you for all you do for our Second Amendment rights, Fellow Patriot.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

---

---

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115113624/569231362/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGJiNmUwZS0yMDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnw_eVKYrA6pjwT-RSsLl-Kf9qQ1Stsqzt8rIs3r3EY=&emci=e279e8fe-5c8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=08bb6e0e-2090-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter, _I want to level with you:_

The stakes of winning this seat go far beyond protecting the progress we’ve made here in WA-08.

Democrats have a huge job to do in Congress—we have a responsibility to shine a light on the GOP’s reckless agenda, **which is being carried out without any checks and balances.**

We have to make sure the American people know what’s happening behind the scenes, and we need to ensure our constituents are protected and have their voices heard before big decisions are made.

How do we do that? We win back the majority, get back the gavels, and get back to actually performing congressional oversight. Yes—the reason you haven’t seen oversight hearings about Signal-gate, the release of the January 6 felons, the presidential profiteering off cryptocurrency and stock market manipulations, and RFK Jr.’s disastrous mismanagement of our nation’s public health infrastructure is that Republicans control the House and want us to all just look the other way. They’d prefer to sweep it all under the rug. If we want answers and accountability, we need a Democratic House.

_That’s why it’s so critical we hold WA-08 and continue the work we’ve started together._ One of the best ways to guarantee we have the resources we need to win and hold onto this seat is with a steady stream of recurring donations. Donating to our campaign monthly allows us to plan ahead for when we can launch our ads, start knocking on doors, and begin strategically mobilizing our team at the moments that matter most.

[**Peter, can I count on you to become a recurring donor to help me power this campaign to victory?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115113625/569231363/-2117271196?refcode=em25_250910_recurr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250910_recurr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=08bb6e0e-2090-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGJiNmUwZS0yMDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnw_eVKYrA6pjwT-RSsLl-Kf9qQ1Stsqzt8rIs3r3EY=) | [MAKE A RECURRING DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115113626/569231364/-2117271196?refcode=em25_250910_recurr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250910_recurr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=08bb6e0e-2090-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGJiNmUwZS0yMDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnw_eVKYrA6pjwT-RSsLl-Kf9qQ1Stsqzt8rIs3r3EY=)

Thank you for all that you do,

Kim

P.S. If you’re not ready to commit to a recurring donation, [**consider chipping in a one-time donation of $15, or anything you can, today. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115113627/569231365/-2117271196?refcode=em25_250910_recurr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250910_recurr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=08bb6e0e-2090-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGJiNmUwZS0yMDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnw_eVKYrA6pjwT-RSsLl-Kf9qQ1Stsqzt8rIs3r3EY=)

We have to make sure the American people know what’s happening behind the scenes, and we need to ensure our constituents are protected and have their voices heard before big decisions are made. How do we do that? We win back the majority, get back the gavels, and get back to actually performing congressional oversight. Yes—the reason you haven’t seen oversight hearings about Signal-gate, the release of the January 6 felons, the presidential profiteering off cryptocurrency and stock market manipulations, and RFK Jr.’s disastrous mismanagement of our nation’s public health infrastructure is that Republicans control the House and want us to all just look the other way. They’d prefer to sweep it all under the rug. If we want answers and accountability, we need a Democratic House. That’s why it’s so critical we hold WA-08 and continue the work we’ve started together. One of the best ways to guarantee we have the resources we need to win and hold onto this seat is with a steady stream of recurring donations. Donating to our campaign monthly allows us to plan ahead for when we can launch our ads, start knocking on doors, and begin strategically mobilizing our team at the moments that matter most. = | = Thank you for all that you do, Kim P.S. If you’re not ready to commit to a recurring donation, = Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Outrage doesn’t begin to cover it, Friend. DOGE has our Social Security numbers and personal data. ICE has our Medicaid records. And now RFK Jr. wants an autism registry - an apparatus to scrape and stockpile information that could be weaponized against the human rights and dignity of autistic people. We know where this road leads. RFK Jr.’s registry proposal echoes the logic of eugenics - catalog, control, and ultimately dehumanize. We refuse to let that happen again. **As a proud American with a disability, I founded Able Dems to FIGHT BACK.** We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stop this dystopian agenda in its tracks - and I’m so proud that thousands of donors like you are backing our work. clean_body: | | | ** **** Outrage doesn’t begin to cover it, Friend. DOGE has our Social Security numbers and personal data. ICE has our Medicaid records. And now RFK Jr. wants an autism registry - an apparatus to scrape and stockpile information that could be weaponized against the human rights and dignity of autistic people. We know where this road leads. RFK Jr.’s registry proposal echoes the logic of eugenics - catalog, control, and ultimately dehumanize. We refuse to let that happen again. As a proud American with a disability, I founded Able Dems to FIGHT BACK. We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stop this dystopian agenda in its tracks - and I’m so proud that thousands of donors like you are backing our work. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Let’s be clear: under Trump, the National Institutes of Health floated an initiative that could create “disease registries” to “research” autism - an alarming step the Autism Science Foundation has publicly flagged. We’ve learned to expect the worst from Republican skullduggery because, time and again, they’ve shown us exactly that. We cannot stand idle as history threatens to repeat itself. An autism registry would chill privacy, corrode dignity, and undermine decades of progress toward acceptance and inclusion. This is a five-alarm fire.** Thank you for standing with us, Jeff Person, Founder, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: BREAKING: Missouri becomes one of the most gerrymandered states in the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is not only legally indefensible, it is also morally wrong.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115113772/569232003/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1Mjk5OTRhLTIwOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pm4AnvV4Y7o5fIf3lO_jiy2dYhYHByrXHJcJT1C99SY=&emci=d216890b-0f90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d529994a-2090-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

**A message from Attorney General Eric Holder on the extreme gerrymander Missouri just passed:** Peter, Missouri is now poised to join North Carolina and Texas as among the most egregiously gerrymandered states in the nation. Missouri Republicans have ignored the demands of their constituents in order to follow the demands of a power-hungry administration in Washington. Missouri Republicans rejected a similar gerrymander just three years ago. But now they have caved to anti-democracy politicians and powerful special interests in Washington who ordered them to rig the map. These same forces ripped away health care from millions of Americans and handed out a tax cut to the very wealthy. Republicans in Congress and the White House are terrified of a system where both parties can compete for the House majority, and instead seek a system that shields them from accountability at the ballot box. Missourians will not have fair and effective representation under this new, truly shameful gerrymander. It is not only legally indefensible, it is also morally wrong. This fight is far from over. More soon, — Eric H. Holder, Jr.

body:

name: Dan Steiner
subject: What if America just quietly erased its future?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/43509502bae848f4be4c0dfb9db56942-c2fea005b4114be2ba2b519a935c8a3f/63)
---
# **
America’s birth rate has fallen to 1.599 . . . the lowest point in our nation’s history.
**

---
# This isn’t just a number. It’s a wake-up call.

We’re watching our nation quietly disappear one preborn child, one fearful decision, one cultural compromise at a time.

As abortion surges again, fueled by easy access to the abortion pill, and fewer families feel equipped or encouraged to bring new life into the world, we must ask: **Is this just a shift in values . . . or is it a spiritual crisis?

** At PreBorn!, we believe this is more than a cultural trend. **It’s a moment God has called us to step into. Boldly.

** Our Network Clinics are helping women in crisis find clarity, courage, and the hope of Christ. We offer **free ultrasounds** , holistic care, and gospel truth. And when a mother sees her baby on the screen:

**80% of the time, she chooses life.

** But we want to hear from you:

---
# **
**[**Do YOU believe this is a national crisis worth confronting?

** ✅ YES, this is deeply concerning
❌ NO, I’m not concerned, but life should still be protected**
**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/43509502bae848f4be4c0dfb9db56942-c2fea005b4114be2ba2b519a935c8a3f/63)

---
# Your voice matters.

Your opinion can make a difference.

Your action can save a life.

Let us know what you think at this link: [https://resources.preborn.com/live-poll-americas-declining-birth-rate ](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/43509502bae848f4be4c0dfb9db56942-c2fea005b4114be2ba2b519a935c8a3f/63)

Dan Steiner
President, PreBorn!
---

DCDailyJournal.com

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m running.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| It’s Governor Wes Moore. The Voter Protection Project said I could reach out today to share some important news with you.

When we first launched our campaign four years ago, I had never run for political office. I was an Army Captain, the son of a single mom, and I ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country.

So I traveled the state, listening to your stories and sharing mine. I heard the same thing again and again: That the career politicians had been telling us everything was great, when we knew it wasn’t.

Ever since I took office, I’ve been on a mission to change that. To lower taxes for middle class families. To make health care and prescription drugs cheaper. To make our communities safer.

But our mission is far from over.

**Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Because our work isn’t done yet.**

[Will you split a contribution of $10 or more to my campaign and the Voter Protection Project now to help power our movement?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93902?t=6&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf)

While we’ve made a lot of progress over the last three years, our fight is even more important now because of who is in the White House.

The President of the United States is bending over backwards for billionaires and big corporations. He’s firing federal civil servants, gutting Medicaid, and raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries for families. His reckless attacks are hitting Maryland hard.

It’s time for us to come together across counties and party lines to prove that even in the face of dysfunction in D.C.: We can show there’s a better way forward.

[We already have Republican opponents in this race, and with the President and his allies working to undo our progress, the stakes couldn’t be higher. This campaign has always been about partnership – I’m grateful to have the Voter Protection Project’s support in this race, and I’d like to have yours too. So please, give whatever you can and split a contribution between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93902?t=7&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Wes Moore and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93903?t=8&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93904?t=9&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93905?t=10&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93906?t=11&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93902?t=12&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf)
Join us. Let’s build a state where we leave no one behind.

Elevate,
Wes
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21197%2E878179%2EmAlUhf)
---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | | | | | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxE/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble request from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia’s highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I’m running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we’ve been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I’m facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I’ve been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger’s campaign coffers and there wasn’t a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can’t make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I’m making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine;__please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxE/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn’t ask you to stay in this fight if I didn’t think the battle was worth it. And patriot, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I’m not asking you to write a big check; all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxE/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

---

---

---

---
[ DONATE $65 >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxJ/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[ DONATE $47 >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxK/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[ DONATE $33 >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxL/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxE/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you _please keep me and my team in your prayers!_**I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!**Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears _Immigrant_ _Marine_ _First black female Lt. Governor of VA_
---
[ ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxE/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxE/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, and I’ve held many titles in my life. Each one hasn’t been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I’ve tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would’ve made it easier, but I’ve found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That’s why I’m reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxE/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baxE/?__vbtrk=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MTk0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) | Paid for by Winsome for Governor

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: I’m not backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=wVcXrYtBdmVQpsrjTuTlnGCUF7QkBMifP6SYERfGdMoDWkKeSn4dlRTKxIkfqk9H%2Fk4RH33cfLVfkJNqax7PSd%2BQe4B479YwncvVIGIHKuCMKtky%2FLtEWSBmt4Z9Qhqy45e03Cly2N7hKFsJnhtgc6j7W%2Fkp%2BKF55JuVkq0v1hYhq1W16fa00PKndh3c8%2Bs6zi5ofThWLq1QqZTWR7b%2FH4JVsjr9C2j%2Flg%2FMHJEaf%2B%2BvMZs1ReOcaytn6vuM7zVzcFuUMm55WLIE6bnMLJ3k%2BaV8WC%2BOo9p5dZFyCAf5hiU6uwMrsG8To%2FLc41%2FUxgyXdg69u7lVWdCrNiNsh98aPtBVNnG0o2iC5hPxT%2BKK44KgsiOeCjJxxcEOirx4YrthZW6jFxZvBctHEiPjLwnrTnc4thEb2CKH4bxWbhTgTW0%3D)
---
| |
---
It’s Gabe. Over the past few weeks, the attacks on our campaign have ramped up — and one thing is clear: Mike Johnson and his Republican allies are dead set on launching a full scale attack on our campaign and hand-picking a MAGA nominee to flip NM-02. One word that keeps popping up in their attacks? _Vulnerable_. And I’ve got to be honest with you: for once, they’re telling the truth. I _am_ vulnerable if we don’t raise the money it takes to WIN. They’ve got billionaire donors and unlimited dark money behind them, and I’m one of the few members of Congress that isn’t wealthy and doesn’t trade stocks. If the last two elections taught me anything about running a race in New Mexico’s 2nd District, it’s that **we can win this together**. Grassroots supporters like you have had my back every step of the way — and now, as we prepare to take on whoever the GOP throws at us, **I need you again**. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Protecting the firefighters risking their lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
For decades, the U.S. Forest Service hasn’t properly protected its firefighter crews.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115150/569236192/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWNkNGY5Zi0yNjkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Worc5VlkgFcjsF-x7wFf2undKr-22IOYw2Nx405j8yU=&emci=0318661f-1290-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=45cd4f9f-2690-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215)
---

| | For decades, the U.S. Forest Service hasn't properly protected its firefighter crews — sending them into toxic smoke without proper masks or warnings about the risks of smoke inhalation. Too many firefighters put their lives on the line, only to be left without the support, protection, or resources they deserve. _That's unacceptable._ Now, Trump's Department of Agriculture is considering closing the Forest Service's Region 6 headquarters in Portland and the Pacific Northwest Research Station in Corvallis. **These closures would gut our wildfire response capacity, cripple long-term scientific research, and abandon hundreds of expert staff at the very moment we're facing longer, more destructive fire seasons.** Forests cover over half of Oregon — more than 15.6 million acres. They support over 62,000 family-wage jobs. And they are central to the health of our communities and our planet. Closing these offices would undermine both our ability to fight today's wildfires and prepare for the future. The Forest Service is already stretched thin, and the last thing we should be doing is making it harder for our firefighters to succeed. **That's why I led my Democratic colleagues to demand answers from USDA and press them to reverse course.** And, earlier this week, we learned that our efforts were successful; the Forest Service reversed course and will now allow firefighters to wear masks while fighting fires. We need to protect our forests. We need to protect our communities. And we absolutely must protect the firefighters risking their lives to defend both. clean_body: For decades, the U.S. Forest Service hasn’t properly protected its firefighter crews. | | | | For decades, the U.S. Forest Service hasn't properly protected its firefighter crews — sending them into toxic smoke without proper masks or warnings about the risks of smoke inhalation. Too many firefighters put their lives on the line, only to be left without the support, protection, or resources they deserve. That's unacceptable. Now, Trump's Department of Agriculture is considering closing the Forest Service's Region 6 headquarters in Portland and the Pacific Northwest Research Station in Corvallis. These closures would gut our wildfire response capacity, cripple long-term scientific research, and abandon hundreds of expert staff at the very moment we're facing longer, more destructive fire seasons. Forests cover over half of Oregon — more than 15.6 million acres. They support over 62,000 family-wage jobs. And they are central to the health of our communities and our planet. Closing these offices would undermine both our ability to fight today's wildfires and prepare for the future. The Forest Service is already stretched thin, and the last thing we should be doing is making it harder for our firefighters to succeed. That's why I led my Democratic colleagues to demand answers from USDA and press them to reverse course. And, earlier this week, we learned that our efforts were successful; the Forest Service reversed course and will now allow firefighters to wear masks while fighting fires. We need to protect our forests. We need to protect our communities. And we absolutely must protect the firefighters risking their lives to defend both. Onward! name: Josh Harder
subject: See it with your own eyes
body:
I wish I could say I was shocked. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115269/569236487/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM3NmVlMDAtMjc5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F9CCK7aiWA5g6zW-3cXq8Xcz_VvYdmXBw8Pk_hLRaTE=) | Peter, When the _Wall Street Journal_ reported that Donald Trump signed a birthday letter to Jeffrey Epstein, he sued them and called it “fake news.” **Well, now you can see it with your own eyes: Trump lied straight to our faces.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115271/569236489/-704830606?&refcode=E15197-20250912-EpsteinLetter-Image-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM3NmVlMDAtMjc5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F9CCK7aiWA5g6zW-3cXq8Xcz_VvYdmXBw8Pk_hLRaTE=)** Peter, this is disgusting. I wish I could say I was shocked. **But what’s even worse? Not a single Republican in Congress has had the courage to stand up to Trump or hold him accountable. They’re just looking the other way — or worse, going along with it.** I’ll be honest: I’m angry. Angry that the man who disgraced the presidency still has so much control. clean_body: I wish I could say I was shocked. | = | Peter, When the Wall Street Journal reported that Donald Trump signed a birthday letter to Jeffrey Epstein, he sued them and called it “fake news.” Well, now you can see it with your own eyes: Trump lied straight to our faces. = Peter, this is disgusting. I wish I could say I was shocked. But what’s even worse? Not a single Republican in Congress has had the courage to stand up to Trump or hold him accountable. They’re just looking the other way — or worse, going along with it. I’ll be honest: I’m angry. Angry that the man who disgraced the presidency still has so much control. Angry that too many in Washington care more about protecting Trump than protecting our country. We deserve leaders who tell the truth. Leaders who will stand up for what’s right — even when it’s hard. That’s what I’m doing every single day. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- — Josh *

subject: Are you happy with Florida's direction?

We're conducting a poll to get a pulse on how Floridians are feeling about our state's leadership, and we want to hear from you, Peter. | | Please take just _30 seconds_ and let us know what you think: **ARE YOU HAPPY WITH THE DIRECTION FLORIDA IS HEADED?**
---
| [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115659/569237519/1424804919?refcode=em_JJR_PET_Poll_091225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI3ZGU0OTUtMjg5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iN0Gb5olJN3tfvSpwL_wK8yrfc0q6_dhNdhV_6MnULQ=&emci=09dfef65-1190-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8b7de495-2890-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115660/569237520/1424804919?refcode=em_JJR_PET_Poll_091225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI3ZGU0OTUtMjg5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iN0Gb5olJN3tfvSpwL_wK8yrfc0q6_dhNdhV_6MnULQ=&emci=09dfef65-1190-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8b7de495-2890-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386)
---|---
Here's what we're seeing across Florida right now:
* Families are **paying some of the highest costs in the nation** — from skyrocketing insurance premiums to the biggest utility rate hikes in U.S. history, while our leaders protect corporate interests instead of working families.
* Our state government is **putting our children's health at risk** by eliminating vaccine requirements that have protected Florida kids from deadly diseases like polio and measles for decades.
* Ron DeSantis is **wasting over $200 million of your hard-earned taxpayer dollars** on detention facilities that courts have called illegal, while Florida families struggle with rising costs.
* And we have an Attorney General who would **rather sit on his hands than fight back against the corrupt special interests** making life in Florida more expensive and less safe for working families.

Jose Javier Rodriguez is ready to take on the corruption, tackle rising costs, and be the People's Lawyer Florida families deserve. But first, we want to know if you're with us.
**Are you happy with the direction Florida is headed?**
| | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115661/569237521/1424804919?refcode=em_JJR_PET_Poll_091225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI3ZGU0OTUtMjg5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iN0Gb5olJN3tfvSpwL_wK8yrfc0q6_dhNdhV_6MnULQ=&emci=09dfef65-1190-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8b7de495-2890-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115662/569237522/1424804919?refcode=em_JJR_PET_Poll_091225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI3ZGU0OTUtMjg5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iN0Gb5olJN3tfvSpwL_wK8yrfc0q6_dhNdhV_6MnULQ=&emci=09dfef65-1190-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8b7de495-2890-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386)

Team Rodriguez

President Donald Trump **[visited the New York Yankees](https://substack.com/redirect/739e6d9f-898c-4430-933a-eb21d135a8a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** clubhouse before their game against the Detroit Tigers on September 11th, telling players "You're gonna win. You're gonna go all the way," and his prediction came true as the Yankees won 9-3.
**[Watch the incredible moment Trump enters the locker room to meet the team:](https://substack.com/redirect/739e6d9f-898c-4430-933a-eb21d135a8a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/739e6d9f-898c-4430-933a-eb21d135a8a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/739e6d9f-898c-4430-933a-eb21d135a8a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Aaron Judge's stellar performance** : Yankees slugger Aaron Judge hit two home runs (his 45th and 46th of the season) after shaking hands with Trump in the clubhouse, with Trump praising Judge as "an unbelievable player" before the game.
* **High security and warm reception** : Trump watched from the bulletproof glass-protected Steinbrenner family suite on the 24th anniversary of 9/11, with heightened security including Secret Service agents on rooftops, while receiving loud cheers and "USA" chants from fans when shown on the video board.
* **Political entourage and departure** : Trump was accompanied by several Republican congressional members, administration officials including Attorney General Pam Bondi and EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin, and conservative commentator Bill O'Reilly, before leaving in the seventh inning after performing his signature dance to "YMCA" and receiving chants of "Donald Trump! Donald!"

# **[RFK Jr drops BOMBSHELL at US Senate hearing](https://substack.com/redirect/fbfeed3d-e395-49dc-9863-5152c42e297a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# Suspected Charlie Kirk shooter raised Mormon, allegedly fired shot just after Kirk praised Mormon Church
Charlie Kirk was allegedly shot and killed by Tyler Robinson just **[moments after Kirk had glowingly praised the Mormon Church](https://substack.com/redirect/f8674fd4-b365-473c-8dc2-fb235c9751ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , saying "I love how Mormons send missionaries around the world, I love how polite they are... Mormons are great people" to huge cheers from the Utah Valley University crowd.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f8674fd4-b365-473c-8dc2-fb235c9751ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Robinson's Mormon upbringing** : The 22-year-old alleged assassin Tyler Robinson was raised as a devout Mormon and attended the local LDS church when he was younger, according to neighbor Kristin Schwiermann who knew his family through their shared church and school community.
* **Neighbor's shock and description** : Schwiermann, who worked as a head custodian at Robinson's elementary school for 18 years, described him as someone who "carried himself nicely" and was "very nice" and "smart," reportedly having earned a full-ride college scholarship, making her "shocked that this was even him."
* **Church statement** : The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints issued a statement condemning "violence and lawless behavior" and calling for people to "treat one another with greater kindness, compassion and goodness," reaffirming the teaching to "love our neighbor," though this was released before Robinson had been identified as Mormon.

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: A personal appeal from me to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
Peter,
I’ll be honest up front. I’m about to ask for your help. But before you close out of the email, I just ask that you give me one minute of your time so I can share with you why this is so important and what your help would mean.
You’re still reading? Amazing... I appreciate you. 🙏
**The Democratic Party is in a do-or-die moment.** We lost a winnable election to a creepy authoritarian billionaire. But our party leaders and establishment consultants learned the exact wrong lessons. They want to entrench us even further as the milquetoast, say-nothing, stand-for-nothing party. A party with no excitement, no moral clarity, and no agenda.
**Michigan is the epicenter of the battle for the soul of the Democratic Party.** If we screw it up here, we’re doomed elsewhere. We are _the_ key swing state with a wide-open primary to determine who’ll fight the Republicans for a must-win U.S. Senate seat.
**The same establishment leaders who botched the last election have their thumb on the scales in this primary.** They’ve handpicked a Democrat who votes at times like a Republican, who schmoozes with corporate PACs, and wins over AIPAC folks. They believe the way to win is to be as quiet as possible about key issues. And they’ll sell their loyalty to whoever writes the largest check as long as it affords them enough money for an extra TV ad or two.
**They’re dead wrong.** And if their milquetoast moderate wins this primary, we could lose not only Michigan’s Senate seat, but any shot we have at reshaping the future of this party to give us a fighting chance at taking power back from Donald Trump.
Now, it’s easy to critique. And folks will say, _“Abdul, what do you propose?”_ I’ll answer that.
* **How about a Democratic Party with candidates we are — for once — _excited_ to vote for?** Candidates who aren’t afraid to speak their minds and capture attention in an age where social media is such a critical and powerful tool.

* **How about a Democratic Party that stands for something concrete?** Medicare for All. Tax the billionaires. Stop funding genocide in Gaza.

* **How about a Democratic Party that brings in new voters, young voters, and disillusioned voters?** Offer a real alternative to the false choice between “status quo moderation” and “right-wing authoritarianism.”

My friends, we can be that Democratic Party. But if we lose to the establishment here in Michigan, we may be set back in that mission for years to come.
So today, I’m asking you for help. Not just to elect me as the next U.S. Senator from Michigan — **but to transform the Democratic Party as we know it into an exciting, purpose-driven, and tent-expanding team that can defeat Trumpism and wannabe oligarchs for decades to come.**
I don’t want to come off as cocky or overconfident, but depending on the poll, we’re nearly tied for first or second place in this race. Winning isn’t some unachievable hurdle. And if we out-raise our opponents in this critical quarter, we will do two things:
1. We will have enough resources to spread the word about our campaign and build a solid lead heading into the primary.

2. We will attract serious attention from the national politicians and pundits who will see that we represent the best path forward for the Democrats to win in November.

Not everyone can give the same amount — and that’s the beauty of a people-powered campaign. Some will step up with larger gifts, others with smaller ones. Together, we build something stronger than corporate PACs ever could.
* If you have done well and can afford it, please consider giving a bit more for those who can’t. [**Click here to donate $1,000, $500, $100, or as much as you can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250912-1-ak?amount=500&refcode=em20250912-890&refcode2=910_251025_dTSl1T&akid=910%2E251025%2EdTSl1T)

* If you can pitch in at the grassroots level, [**click here to donate $25 or any amount you’re comfortable with.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250912-1-ak?amount=25&refcode=em20250912-890&refcode2=910_251025_dTSl1T&akid=910%2E251025%2EdTSl1T)

* If you can’t give right now, that’s okay. Help share our message on social media, forward this email to a friend, or [**sign up to volunteer.**](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/339?utm_source=em20250912-890&t=2&akid=910%2E251025%2EdTSl1T) Your support is just as essential to this movement as any donation.

I can’t thank you enough for reading my email. I know it was long. But I hope it left you feeling a sense of purpose and hope heading into this primary.
We have work to do, but we _can_ win.
Your friend in the fight,
Abdul

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you, so thank you for reading this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=3&akid=910%2E251025%2EdTSl1T)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=910%2E251025%2EdTSl1T)

Email us: [info@abdulformichigan.com](info@abdulformichigan.com)
Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate.

But our party leaders and establishment consultants learned the exact wrong lessons. They want to entrench us even further as the milquetoast, say-nothing, stand-for-nothing party. A party with no excitement, no moral clarity, and no agenda. Michigan is the epicenter of the battle for the soul of the Democratic Party. If we screw it up here, we’re doomed elsewhere. We are the key swing state with a wide-open primary to determine who’ll fight the Republicans for a must-win U.S. Senate seat. The same establishment leaders who botched the last election have their thumb on the scales in this primary. They’ve handpicked a Democrat who votes at times like a Republican, who schmoozes with corporate PACs, and wins over AIPAC folks. They believe the way to win is to be as quiet as possible about key issues. And they’ll sell their loyalty to whoever writes the largest check as long as it affords them enough money for an extra TV ad or two. They’re dead wrong. And if their milquetoast moderate wins this primary, we could lose not only Michigan’s Senate seat, but any shot we have at reshaping the future of this party to give us a fighting chance at taking power back from Donald Trump. Now, it’s easy to critique. And folks will say, “Abdul, what do you propose?” I’ll answer that. How about a Democratic Party with candidates we are — for once — excited to vote for? Candidates who aren’t afraid to speak their minds and capture attention in an age where social media is such a critical and powerful tool. How about a Democratic Party that stands for something concrete? Medicare for All. Tax the billionaires. Stop funding genocide in Gaza. How about a Democratic Party that brings in new voters, young voters, and disillusioned voters? Offer a real alternative to the false choice between “status quo moderation” and “right-wing authoritarianism.” My friends, we can be that Democratic Party. But if we lose to the establishment here in Michigan, we may be set back in that mission for years to come. So today, I’m asking you for help. Not just to elect me as the next U.S. Senator from Michigan — but to transform the Democratic Party as we know it into an exciting, purpose-driven, and tent-expanding team that can defeat Trumpism and wannabe oligarchs for decades to come. I don’t want to come off as cocky or overconfident, but depending on the poll, we’re nearly tied for first or second place in this race. Winning isn’t some unachievable hurdle. And if we out-raise our opponents in this critical quarter, we will do two things: 1. We will have enough resources to spread the word about our campaign and build a solid lead heading into the primary. 2. We will attract serious attention from the national politicians and pundits who will see that we represent the best path forward for the Democrats to win in November. Not everyone can give the same amount — and that’s the beauty of a people-powered campaign. Some will step up with larger gifts, others with smaller ones. Together, we build something stronger than corporate PACs ever could. If you have done well and can afford it, please consider giving a bit more for those who can’t. If you can pitch in at the grassroots level, If you can’t give right now, that’s okay. Help share our message on social media, forward this email to a friend, or Your support is just as essential to this movement as any donation. I can’t thank you enough for reading my email. I know it was long. But I hope it left you feeling a sense of purpose and hope heading into this primary. We have work to do, but we can_ win. Your friend in the fight, Abdul

body:
I want you to know this
| | |

Shabbat Shalom, friend.
My husband, Larry, and I are about to sit down for Shabbat dinner, but I wanted to share something with you before logging off.
**I’ve always been guided by the Jewish principle of “Tikkun Olam” – acting with kindness to repair the world. That hasn’t changed just because President Trump and the GOP are making it harder.**
Like you, I couldn’t be more concerned about what’s being done to make the lives of hardworking Americans worse. But I know that we can still build a better tomorrow for our kids and future generations if we stand together now.
That’s why I want you to know what a blessing it is to have you on my team, friend. When Democrats take back the Senate and repair the damage from Trump’s time in office – it will be thanks to dedicated people like YOU standing with us at this critical time.

Peter, we’re PANICKING. Our Q3 FEC deadline is just 18 days away. In 18 days, our Q3 fundraising numbers will go PUBLIC for the last time before the on-year. **That’s right:** This is our LAST CHANCE to prove we have what it takes to re-elect Jon Ossoff and flip the Senate blue in 2026. Republicans will be watching our numbers for any signs of weakness more than ever before — and we can’t afford to fall short by a single dollar. But here’s the thing, Peter: To stay on track to hit our Q3 goal, we need to raise $18,000 by Monday at midnight. And right now, we’re pacing far behind where we need to be. [So, will you rush $10 to the Democratic Party of Georgia right now to help us raise $18,000 before Monday at midnight??](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115805/569238117/-1560775800?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_091225_MM_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWY1NDQxYy0yYTkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5N4JQMJKmXbHtRl1tCf8PW-tN3NqbDNm_7fgdu-ljzk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115813/569238126/-1560775800?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_091225_MM_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWY1NDQxYy0yYTkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5N4JQMJKmXbHtRl1tCf8PW-tN3NqbDNm_7fgdu-ljzk=) Peter, the GOP Senate primary here in Georgia might look like a hot mess right now — but we can’t count them out yet. Their nominee will have millions of dollars in dark money behind them. And we need to go dollar for dollar. Let’s be clear: What happens in Georgia will determine Senate control. **_We_** have the power to make or break Donald Trump’s Republican trifecta. But it’s going to take all of us. [Peter, every dollar counts in a fight this important. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Some exciting news…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

I want you to hear this from me: I’ve been appointed Ranking Member of the new January 6th Subcommittee . I’m honored by the trust placed in me, and I’m ready to get to work.

As a former prosecutor, I know what it takes to follow the facts, protect the integrity of an investigation, and uphold the rule of law. My commitment is simple: no fear, no favor, and no shortcuts. We will pursue the evidence wherever it leads and work to ensure that those responsible are held accountable.

This isn’t about politics. It’s about protecting our democracy, making sure something like January 6th never happens again, and defending the rule of law. The American people deserve a full accounting — and I won’t rest until that happens.

But I can’t do this work alone. Standing up to extremism takes resources – to organize, to communicate, to make sure the truth cuts through the noise.

STAY IN THE FIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-September?&refcode=E15185-20250912-Jan6Subcommittee-SB-GOP&amount=25]

Thank you for standing with me. Together, we will defend our institutions and prove that no one is above the law.

- Eric

**Peter, I hate to bother you with so many requests for support, but failing to meet our fundraising goals could sink our campaign. Here’s why:**
We already know how to win a competitive race here in North Carolina. Both of my elections for Governor were extremely close — and both those victories came in years that Donald Trump carried the state in the presidential election. But this race for the U.S. Senate may be unlike anything we’ve faced before.
To win, we will have to enact an ambitious campaign of voter outreach, meeting with folks in Raleigh and Charlotte and Asheville, but also in the most rural, hardest-to-reach corners of the state — just as we have before. That itself doesn’t come cheap. **And we will also have to go toe-to-toe with the GOP.**
The path to the majority runs through North Carolina, so right-wing Republicans are prepared to spend hundreds of millions trying to defeat me. We have to meet them dollar for dollar in spending for TV ads, on the ground canvassing efforts, and in any other avenues that could decide this toss-up race. If we fail to raise what we need to stay competitive, we risk coming up short on Election Day.
**[Your investment in our work now will help us build the most effective campaign possible — a campaign that can _win._ We are relying on you. Please give anything that fits in your budget right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115115981/569238562/-1743631236?refcode=ea.e4966f3d-2b90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.e4966f3d-2b90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDk2NmYzZC0yYjkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=diU9zD5zN0TgJoH2xJOC8LEgW6VnW-WIWuGf6JKgjZ0=)**

* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

Here’s why: We already know how to win a competitive race here in North Carolina. Both of my elections for Governor were extremely close — and both those victories came in years that Donald Trump carried the state in the presidential election. But this race for the U.S. Senate may be unlike anything we’ve faced before. To win, we will have to enact an ambitious campaign of voter outreach, meeting with folks in Raleigh and Charlotte and Asheville, but also in the most rural, hardest-to-reach corners of the state — just as we have before. That itself doesn’t come cheap. And we will also have to go toe-to-toe with the GOP. The path to the majority runs through North Carolina, so right-wing Republicans are prepared to spend hundreds of millions trying to defeat me. We have to meet them dollar for dollar in spending for TV ads, on the ground canvassing efforts, and in any other avenues that could decide this toss-up race. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Just pointing something out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Simply put, the rules work differently for different groups of people

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2641%2E4032634%2EZryJKB)
---
Republicans love to preach a “pull yourself up by your bootstraps” and “no government handouts” mentality — until they’re talking to a billionaire. They love to claim that we simply don’t have the money to pass any policies that will help working people, but they’ll miraculously find the money to subsidize tax cuts for corporations and the wealthy. For example: The Big Beautiful Bill gave Meta a $15 billion check by cutting food benefits and Medicaid. That’s more than our federal government spends on child care in an entire year. I’m done being surprised at their hypocrisy, but I’m not done fighting back. Simply put, the rules work differently for different groups of people — and I’m doing everything in my power to put a stop to this rigged system and change this. [**Will you pitch in $28 or anything you can to power this critical work? We can — and we must — make our government actually work for working people. I know we can. But we can’t throw up our hands and accept defeat in this moment, we’ve got to keep fighting.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3141?amount=28&t=8&akid=2641%2E4032634%2EZryJKB)

I need you to hear this from me: After 14 years of failing the hardworking folks of AZ-01, political pundits say that my GOP opponent, **David Schweikert, is strongly weighing a run for governor.** It should be no surprise that Schweikert is considering abandoning his district once again to pursue a higher office and align himself further with the GOP extremists that are running our country into the ground. I’m running for Congress to unseat Schweikert, fight for working families, and take on the Trump administration’s corruption — and yes, I’m _actually_ in this race to serve AZ-01. **[_Will you please rush a donation before my final deadline of the summer to show Schweikert what this movement is made of?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115116489/569240257/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.12_Governor-Speculations_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjVhZDE1OGItMmM5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y7VAyxA3owU4zdo7cHr_uvUDT-kGWbbkKafDC0Wg_c0=)** | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115116495/569240260/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.12_Governor-Speculations_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjVhZDE1OGItMmM5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y7VAyxA3owU4zdo7cHr_uvUDT-kGWbbkKafDC0Wg_c0=)

If you’ve been paying attention to Schweikert’s abysmal leadership, a run for higher office should be out of the question.
❌ He voted for the largest cut to Medicaid and SNAP benefits in American history.
❌ He continues to support an administration that has threatened critical benefits for our veterans.
❌ He has championed legislation that would put an end to reproductive freedom.
**Whether he runs for governor or stays in the race for AZ-01’s Congressional seat, one thing is clear: David Schweikert has no business representing Arizonans. [_So I’m personally asking you, friend, can you chip in $5 right now — before my final deadline of the summer — to help me replace Schweikert in Congress?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115116502/569240267/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.12_Governor-Speculations_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjVhZDE1OGItMmM5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y7VAyxA3owU4zdo7cHr_uvUDT-kGWbbkKafDC0Wg_c0=)**
